---
title: "Corn silage modelling"
output: slidy_presentation
---

# 2019 to 2021 data

```{r message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, echo=F}
set.seed(77)
library(readr)
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(readxl)



#silage = read_csv("/mnt/field_reports_2021/density_curves/data/silage_database_with_QC_flags_2021Nov22 (2).csv")

silage = read_csv("/mnt/files/corn_silage_2019_to_2021_updated_may19th_2022_1.csv")

#silage = read_csv("/mnt/files/corn_silage_2019_to_2021_updated_may19th_2022.csv")

silage$midas_field_id=as.character(silage$midas_field_id)
silage$PLT_midasPlotId=as.character(silage$PLT_midasPlotId)
silage$midas_plot_id=as.character(silage$midas_plot_id)
silage$midas_field_id=as.character(silage$midas_field_id)
silage$midas_test_set_entry_id=as.character(silage$midas_test_set_entry_id)
silage$midasInventoryId=as.character(silage$midasInventoryId)
unique(silage$ENT_group1)

unique(silage$protocolDescription)

unique(silage$ENT_group1)
unique(silage$ENT_group2)

unique(silage$SETS_setName)
#remove 2022 year
silage = silage %>% filter(FIELD_year!=2022)

#dplyr::select the density trials
#silage_1 = silage %>% filter(ENT_group1 %in% c("D1","D2","D3","D4","D5","D6"))

silage_1 = silage %>% filter(!ENT_group1 %in% c("2MQ","4MQLF","3MQL","1M","Harvest1","Harvest2","Harvest3","Harvest4","Harvest5"))

#silage_1 = silage %>% filter(!ENT_group1 %in% c("2MQ","4MQLF","3MQL","1M"))

obs=unique(silage_1[,c(65,64)])


unique(silage_1$ENT_group1)

unique(silage_1$protocolDescription)

unique(silage_1$ENT_group2)

silage_1 = silage_1 %>% mutate(hybrid_name = ifelse(ENT_group2 %in%c("D1","D2","D3","D4","D5","D6"),ENT_group1,ENT_group2))

#silage_1 = silage_1 %>% mutate(same_hybrid_name = ifelse(hybrid_name==productName,"TRUE","FALSE"))

#silage_combined_2019_to_2022 = bind_rows(silage_1,silage_2022)

data_2020 = filter(silage, FIELD_year==2020)
unique(data_2020$productName)

unique(data_2020$SETS_setName)

unique(data_2020$FIELD_Location)



#silage_1_no_name = filter(silage_1,)

#assign target densitites
#D1:65,D2:80,D3:95,D4:110,D5:125;D6:140

#silage_1 = silage_1 %>% mutate(target_density = ifelse(ENT_group2 %in%c("D1"),65,ifelse(ENT_group2 %in%c("D2"),80, ifelse(ENT_group2 %in%c("D3"),95,ifelse(ENT_group2 %in%c("D4"),110,ifelse(ENT_group2 %in%c("D5"),125,ifelse(ENT_group2 %in%c("D6"),140,"NA")))))))

#silage_1 = silage_1 %>% mutate(target_density_1 = ifelse(ENT_group1 %in%c("D1"),65,ifelse(ENT_group1 %in%c("D2"),80, ifelse(ENT_group1 %in%c("D3"),95,ifelse(ENT_group1 %in%c("D4"),110,ifelse(ENT_group1 %in%c("D5"),125,ifelse(ENT_group1 %in%c("D6"),140,"NA")))))))

#silage_1 = silage_1 %>% mutate(final_target_density = ifelse(is.na(target_density),target_density_1,target_density))


#silage_1_na = silage_1 %>% filter(final_target_density=="NA")
```

# Sets and locations per year

```{r message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, echo=F,eval=F}

silage_combined_2019_to_2022 = silage_combined_2019_to_2022%>% unite(trait, OBS_observationRefCd, OBS_observationName,OBS_uom,sep="_",remove=F)

#unique set name

silage_combined_2019_to_2022 = silage_combined_2019_to_2022%>% unite(unique_set_name, SETS_setName, midas_field_id,FIELD_year,sep="_",remove=F)

#unique plot name

silage_combined_2019_to_2022 = silage_combined_2019_to_2022%>% unite(unique_plot_id, SETS_setName, midas_field_id,PLT_midasPlotId,FIELD_year,sep="_",remove=F)

silage_combined_2019_to_2022 = silage_combined_2019_to_2022%>% unite(unique_location_name, FIELD_Location, FIELD_field_latitude,FIELD_field_longitude,FIELD_year,sep="_",remove=F)

silage_summary = silage_combined_2019_to_2022[,c(32,44,6,31,7,83)]

silage_summary = unique(silage_summary)

commerical_names = read_csv("/mnt/files/Copy of BDD_PCM_CM_laurent_hybrid_names_mapping.csv")

silage_summary = merge(silage_summary, commerical_names, by.x="hybrid_name", by.y="PCM Hybrid Code",all.x=T)

silage_summary_1 = silage_summary %>% mutate(hybrid_name_1 = ifelse(is.na(`Product Identifier`),hybrid_name,`Product Identifier`))

#summary

silage_summary_1_summary = silage_summary_1 %>% group_by(hybrid_name_1) %>% summarise(number_of_seasons_tested = length(unique(FIELD_year)),seasons_tested=paste(sort(unique(FIELD_year)), collapse="; "), number_of_countries=length(unique(FIELD_Country)),countries_tested=paste(sort(unique(FIELD_Country)), collapse="; "), number_of_locations=length(unique(unique_location_name)),locations_tested=paste(sort(unique(unique_location_name)), collapse="; "))

names(silage_summary_1_summary)[1] = "hybrid_name"
write_csv(silage_summary_1_summary,"/mnt/files/Silage_summary_by_hybrid_2019_to_2022.csv")

#silags_summary = silage_combined_2019_to_2022 %>% group_by()

silage_summary = silage_1 %>% group_by(FIELD_year,SETS_setName,protocolNumber,protocolTitle,FIELD_Country,FIELD_State,FIELD_County,FIELD_Location) %>% summarise(number_of_hybrids_tested=length(unique(hybrid_name)))

write_csv(silage_summary, "/mnt/files/silage_data_sets_locations_by_year_summary.csv")

silage_summary_1 = silage_1 %>% group_by(FIELD_year,SETS_setName,protocolNumber,protocolTitle) %>% summarise(number_of_hybrids_tested=length(unique(hybrid_name)))

write_csv(silage_summary, "/mnt/files/silage_data_sets_locations_by_year_summary.csv")
```


# Understanding the FTS based QC flags

```{r message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, echo=F}


#remove plot deactivated
table(silage_1$PLT_isPlotDeactivated)

length(unique(silage_1$PLT_midasPlotId))

plot_deactivation_df= filter(silage_1,PLT_isPlotDeactivated=="TRUE")
plot_deactivation_df_1 = unique(plot_deactivation_df[,c(29,48,61,56,57,22,23,24,26)])
plot_deactivation=as.data.frame(table(plot_deactivation_df_1$PLT_deactivatedReason))

ggplot(plot_deactivation,aes(reorder(Var1,Freq),Freq))+geom_bar(stat="identity")+coord_flip()+ylab("Number of deactivated plots")+xlab("Plot deactivation - Reason")

table(silage_1$REP_isRejected)
table(silage_1$REP_isRelinquished)
table(silage_1$REP_isMapped)
table(silage_1$REP_isAbandoned)

library(UpSetR)

#flags_df=complete_dataset_flags_density_yield_with_all_flags[,c(12,123,132)]
#flags_df_1=unique(flags_df)

flags_df_1_long = plot_deactivation_df_1[,c(3,4,7)] %>% gather(type,value, 2:3)%>%
    mutate(value=ifelse(value=="TRUE",1,0))
 #gsp2_harvest_file_joined_summary_5 = unique(gsp2_harvest_file_joined_summary_5)
  
  flags_df_1_long = flags_df_1_long %>% spread(type, value,-1) %>% as.data.frame()
  
  
  suppressWarnings(upset(flags_df_1_long, order.by = "freq"))


silage_2 = silage_1 %>% filter(PLT_isPlotDeactivated=="FALSE")

table(silage_2$REP_isRejected)
table(silage_2$REP_isRelinquished)
table(silage_2$REP_isMapped)
table(silage_2$REP_isAbandoned)

#remove abandoned reps
silage_3 = silage_2 %>% filter(REP_isAbandoned=="FALSE")
table(silage_3$REP_isRejected)
table(silage_3$REP_isRelinquished)
table(silage_3$REP_isMapped)
table(silage_3$REP_isAbandoned)
table(silage_3$OBS_isDeactivated)
table(silage_3$OBS_isDsrDeactivated)
table(silage_3$OBS_deactivateReason)



#remove deactivated obervations




obs_deactivation_df= filter(silage_3,OBS_isDeactivated=="TRUE")
obs_deactivation_df_1 = unique(obs_deactivation_df[,c(48,61,64,74,76)])
plot_deactivation=as.data.frame(table(obs_deactivation_df_1$OBS_observationName))

ggplot(plot_deactivation,aes(reorder(Var1,Freq),Freq))+geom_bar(stat="identity")+coord_flip()+ylab("Number of observations")+xlab("Observation Name")


silage_4 = silage_3 %>% filter(OBS_isDeactivated=="FALSE")

# is dsr deactivated
obs_deactivation_df= filter(silage_4,OBS_isDsrDeactivated=="TRUE")
obs_deactivation_df_1 = unique(obs_deactivation_df[,c(48,61,64,74,76)])
plot_deactivation=as.data.frame(table(obs_deactivation_df_1$OBS_observationName))

ggplot(plot_deactivation,aes(reorder(Var1,Freq),Freq))+geom_bar(stat="identity")+coord_flip()+ylab("Number of observations")+xlab("Observation Name")

silage_5 = silage_4 %>% filter(OBS_isDsrDeactivated=="FALSE")


table(silage_5$OBS_isDeactivated)
table(silage_5$OBS_isDsrDeactivated)
unique(silage_5$SETS_season)

unique(silage_5$SETS_setName)

unique(silage_5$OBS_observationName)


table(silage_5$REP_isRejected)
table(silage_5$REP_isRelinquished)
table(silage_5$REP_isMapped)
table(silage_5$REP_isAbandoned)
table(silage_5$OBS_isDeactivated)
table(silage_5$OBS_isDsrDeactivated)
table(silage_5$PLT_isPlotDeactivated)


```

```{r message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, echo=F}
silage_5 = silage_5%>% unite(trait, OBS_observationRefCd, OBS_observationName,OBS_uom,sep="_",remove=F)

#unique set name

silage_5 = silage_5%>% unite(unique_set_name, SETS_setName, midas_field_id,FIELD_year,sep="_",remove=F)

#unique plot name

silage_5 = silage_5%>% unite(unique_plot_id, SETS_setName, midas_field_id,PLT_midasPlotId,FIELD_year,sep="_",remove=F)

silage_5 = silage_5%>% unite(unique_location_name, FIELD_Location, FIELD_field_latitude,FIELD_field_longitude,FIELD_year,sep="_",remove=F)

silage_1 = silage_1%>% unite(unique_plot_id, SETS_setName, midas_field_id,PLT_midasPlotId,FIELD_year,sep="_",remove=F)

##Sets summary before QC
all_data_sets_summary_before = silage_1%>% group_by(SETS_setName,FIELD_year) %>% summarise(number_of_trials=length(unique(FIELD_locationName)),number_of_hybrids=length(unique(hybrid_name)),number_of_plots = length(unique(unique_plot_id)),number_of_reps=length(unique(REP_repetitionNumber)) )

##Sets summary after QC
all_data_sets_summary = silage_5%>% group_by(SETS_setName,FIELD_year) %>% summarise(number_of_trials=length(unique(FIELD_locationName)),number_of_hybrids=length(unique(hybrid_name)),number_of_plots = length(unique(unique_plot_id)),number_of_reps=length(unique(REP_repetitionNumber)) )

#country summary

all_data_country_summary = silage_5%>% group_by(FIELD_Country,FIELD_year) %>% summarise(number_of_trials=length(unique(FIELD_locationName)),number_of_plots = length(unique(unique_plot_id)),number_of_reps=length(unique(REP_repetitionNumber)),years= paste(unique(FIELD_year),collapse="; "),sets = paste(unique(SETS_setName),collapse="; ") )

all_data_country_summary = silage_5%>% group_by(FIELD_Country) %>% summarise(number_of_trials=length(unique(FIELD_locationName)),number_of_plots = length(unique(unique_plot_id)),number_of_reps=length(unique(REP_repetitionNumber)),years= paste(unique(FIELD_year),collapse="; "),sets = paste(unique(SETS_setName),collapse="; ") )

#ggplot(all_data_country_summary, aes(FIELD_year,number_of_trials, fill=FIELD_Country))+geom_bar(stat="identity",position="dodge")+xlab("Year")+ylab("Number of trial locations")+ggtitle("Number of Corn-Silage trial locations by country per year") #+geom_text(aes(label=number_of_trials))#+facet_grid(~FIELD_Country)


#silage_2019 = filter(silage_3, FIELD_year==2019)

#Get all obervations

traits = unique(silage_5[,c(65,66,67,68)])

#get all hybrids
hybrids = unique(silage_5[,c(62,63,83)])

#network data

network_data = unique(silage_5[,c(32,44,31,62)])
network_data = filter(network_data, productName!="NA")

#write_csv(network_data, "/mnt/files/silage_network_data.csv")

#hybrid summary
all_data_hybrids_summary = silage_5%>% group_by(hybrid_name,protocolNumber) %>% summarise(number_of_countries=length(unique(FIELD_Country)),number_of_trials=length(unique(FIELD_locationName)),number_of_seasons=length(unique(FIELD_year)),number_of_plots = length(unique(unique_plot_id)),number_of_reps=length(unique(REP_repetitionNumber)),years= paste(unique(FIELD_year),collapse="; "),sets = paste(unique(SETS_setName),collapse="; ") )

#

#trials summary
all_data_trials_summary = silage_5%>% group_by(FIELD_locationName,midas_field_id,FIELD_year,SETS_setName) %>% summarise(number_of_hybrids=length(unique(hybrid_name)),hybrids =paste(unique(hybrid_name),collapse="; "), number_of_seasons=length(unique(FIELD_year)),number_of_reps=length(unique(REP_repetitionNumber)),years= paste(unique(FIELD_year),collapse="; "),sets = paste(unique(SETS_setName),collapse="; ") )

#years summary
all_data_years_summary = silage_5%>% group_by(FIELD_year,FIELD_Country) %>% summarise(number_of_hybrids=length(unique(hybrid_name)),hybrids =paste(unique(hybrid_name),collapse="; "), number_of_seasons=length(unique(FIELD_year)),number_of_reps=length(unique(REP_repetitionNumber)),years= paste(unique(FIELD_year),collapse="; "),sets = paste(unique(SETS_setName),collapse="; ") )

#Sets summary
all_data_sets_summary = silage_5%>% group_by(SETS_setName,FIELD_year) %>% summarise(number_of_trials=length(unique(FIELD_locationName)),number_of_hybrids=length(unique(hybrid_name)),hybrids =paste(unique(hybrid_name),collapse="; "), number_of_seasons=length(unique(FIELD_year)),number_of_reps=length(unique(REP_repetitionNumber)),years= paste(unique(FIELD_year),collapse="; "),sets = paste(unique(SETS_setName),collapse="; ") )

all_data_sets_summary_1 = silage_5%>% group_by(unique_set_name,FIELD_year) %>% summarise(number_of_trials=length(unique(FIELD_locationName)),number_of_hybrids=length(unique(hybrid_name)),hybrids =paste(unique(hybrid_name),collapse="; "),number_of_plots=unique(length(unique_plot_id)), number_of_seasons=length(unique(FIELD_year)),number_of_reps=length(unique(REP_repetitionNumber)),years= paste(unique(FIELD_year),collapse="; "),sets = paste(unique(SETS_setName),collapse="; ") )

#plots summary
all_data_plots_summary = silage_5%>% group_by(unique_plot_id) %>% summarise(number_of_traits=length(unique(trait)),number_of_hybrids=length(unique(hybrid_name)),hybrids =paste(unique(hybrid_name),collapse="; "), number_of_seasons=length(unique(FIELD_year)),number_of_reps=length(unique(REP_repetitionNumber)),years= paste(unique(FIELD_year),collapse="; "),sets = paste(unique(SETS_setName),collapse="; ") )

#get the harvest population

#silage_3_wide = silage_3 %>% spread(trait,OBS_numValue)

#silage_4 = silage_3 %>% filter(OBS_observationName=="Harvest Population")

#silage_4_wide = silage_4 %>% spread(trait,OBS_numValue)

##number of unique plots
#length(unique(silage_5$unique_plot_id))
 

silage_6= silage_5 %>% filter(trait=="HVPOP_Harvest Population_1000 Plants/Hectare")

length(unique(silage_6$unique_plot_id))

#no_hvpop = filter(silage_6,is.na(OBS_numValue))

silage_6_wide = silage_6 %>% spread(trait,OBS_numValue)
silage_6_wide_1 = silage_6_wide[,c(80,82)]

#silage_6_wide = silage_6_wide %>% left_join(silage_5_wide_1)

#silage_6_wide_1 = silage_6_wide_1 %>% mutate(hvpop_round=round(`HVPOP_Harvest Population_1000 Plants/Hectare`,0),hvpop_round_10=plyr::round_any(`HVPOP_Harvest Population_1000 Plants/Hectare`, 5, f = ceiling),hvpop_density=`HVPOP_Harvest Population_1000 Plants/Hectare`*1000,hvpop_density_round=plyr::round_any(hvpop_density, 5000, f = ceiling))

#ERPOP_Early Stand_1000 Plants/Hectare

silage_7= silage_5 %>% filter(trait=="ERPOP_Early Stand_1000 Plants/Hectare")

silage_7_wide = silage_7 %>% spread(trait,OBS_numValue)
silage_7_wide_1 = silage_7_wide[,c(80,82)]

silage_6_wide_1 = silage_6_wide_1 %>% left_join(silage_7_wide_1)


#FNSI_Intended Final Stand Count_Plants/Plot

silage_8= silage_5 %>% filter(trait=="FNSI_Intended Final Stand Count_Plants/Plot")

silage_8_wide = silage_8 %>% spread(trait,OBS_numValue)
silage_8_wide_1 = silage_8_wide[,c(80,82)]

silage_6_wide_1 = silage_6_wide_1 %>% left_join(silage_8_wide_1)

# #FNSC_Final Stand Count_Plants/Plot
# 
silage_9= silage_5 %>% filter(trait=="FNSC_Final Stand Count_Plants/Plot")

silage_9_wide = silage_9 %>% spread(trait,OBS_numValue)
silage_9_wide_1 = silage_9_wide[,c(80,82)]

silage_6_wide_1 = silage_6_wide_1 %>% left_join(silage_9_wide_1)
# 
# #ERSC_Early Stand Count_Plants/Plot
# 
silage_10= silage_5 %>% filter(trait=="ERSC_Early Stand Count_Plants/Plot")

silage_10_wide = silage_10 %>% spread(trait,OBS_numValue)
silage_10_wide_1 = silage_10_wide[,c(80,82)]

silage_6_wide_1 = silage_6_wide_1 %>% left_join(silage_10_wide_1)
# 
# #STAND_Stand Count Per Plot_Plants/Plot
# 
silage_11= silage_5 %>% filter(trait=="STAND_Stand Count Per Plot_Plants/Plot")

silage_11_wide = silage_11 %>% spread(trait,OBS_numValue)
silage_11_wide_1 = silage_11_wide[,c(80,82)]

silage_6_wide_1 = silage_6_wide_1 %>% left_join(silage_11_wide_1)

#SYLD_BE_Silage Yield - Best Estimate_Metric Tons/Hectare
#silage_6 = silage_3 %>% filter(trait=="SYLD_BE_Silage Yield - Best Estimate_Metric Tons/Hectare")

silage_12= silage_5 %>% filter(trait=="SYLD_BE_Silage Yield - Best Estimate_Metric Tons/Hectare")

silage_12_wide = silage_12 %>% spread(trait,OBS_numValue)
silage_12_wide_1 = silage_12_wide[,c(80,82)]

silage_6_wide_1 = silage_6_wide_1 %>% left_join(silage_12_wide_1)

#"SYLD_Silage Yield_Metric Tons/Hectare"
#silage_6_1 = silage_3 %>% filter(trait=="SYLD_Silage Yield_Metric Tons/Hectare")

silage_13= silage_5 %>% filter(trait=="SYLD_Silage Yield_Metric Tons/Hectare")

silage_13_wide = silage_13 %>% spread(trait,OBS_numValue)
silage_13_wide_1 = silage_13_wide[,c(80,82)]

silage_6_wide_1 = silage_6_wide_1 %>% left_join(silage_13_wide_1)


#"SYLDFR_Silage Fresh Yield_Metric Tons/Hectare"

#silage_8= silage_3 %>% filter(trait=="SYLDFR_Silage Fresh Yield_Metric Tons/Hectare" )

silage_14= silage_5 %>% filter(trait=="SYLDFR_Silage Fresh Yield_Metric Tons/Hectare")

silage_14_wide = silage_14 %>% spread(trait,OBS_numValue)
silage_14_wide_1 = silage_14_wide[,c(80,82)]

silage_6_wide_1 = silage_6_wide_1 %>% left_join(silage_14_wide_1)




#root lodging
#"RTLP_Root Lodged Percent_Percent"
silage_23= silage_5 %>% filter(trait=="RTLP_Root Lodged Percent_Percent" )

silage_23_wide = silage_23 %>% spread(trait,OBS_numValue)
silage_23_wide_1 = silage_23_wide[,c(80,82)]

silage_6_wide_1 = silage_6_wide_1 %>% left_join(silage_23_wide_1)

#"TDPP_Total Damaged Plants Percent_Percent"
silage_24= silage_5 %>% filter(trait=="TDPP_Total Damaged Plants Percent_Percent" )

silage_24_wide = silage_24 %>% spread(trait,OBS_numValue)
silage_24_wide_1 = silage_24_wide[,c(80,82)]

silage_6_wide_1 = silage_6_wide_1 %>% left_join(silage_24_wide_1)


#""GSPP_Greensnap Percent_Percent""
silage_25= silage_5 %>% filter(trait=="GSPP_Greensnap Percent_Percent" )

silage_25_wide = silage_25 %>% spread(trait,OBS_numValue)
silage_25_wide_1 = silage_25_wide[,c(80,82)]

silage_6_wide_1 = silage_6_wide_1 %>% left_join(silage_25_wide_1)


#"TGSPP_Total Greensnap Percent_Percent"
silage_26= silage_5 %>% filter(trait=="TGSPP_Total Greensnap Percent_Percent" )

silage_26_wide = silage_26 %>% spread(trait,OBS_numValue)
silage_26_wide_1 = silage_26_wide[,c(80,82)]

silage_6_wide_1 = silage_6_wide_1 %>% left_join(silage_26_wide_1)

#"SMUTPC_Calculated Percent Of Plants Per Plot Infected With Smut_Percent"
silage_27= silage_5 %>% filter(trait=="SMUTPC_Calculated Percent Of Plants Per Plot Infected With Smut_Percent" )

silage_27_wide = silage_27 %>% spread(trait,OBS_numValue)
silage_27_wide_1 = silage_27_wide[,c(80,82)]

silage_6_wide_1 = silage_6_wide_1 %>% left_join(silage_27_wide_1)

#"STLP_Percent Stalk Lodging_Percent"
silage_28= silage_5 %>% filter(trait=="STLP_Percent Stalk Lodging_Percent" )

silage_28_wide = silage_28 %>% spread(trait,OBS_numValue)
silage_28_wide_1 = silage_28_wide[,c(80,82)]

silage_6_wide_1 = silage_6_wide_1 %>% left_join(silage_28_wide_1)

#"BARP_Percent Barren Plants Per Plot_Percent"
silage_29= silage_5 %>% filter(trait=="BARP_Percent Barren Plants Per Plot_Percent" )

silage_29_wide = silage_29 %>% spread(trait,OBS_numValue)
silage_29_wide_1 = silage_29_wide[,c(80,82)]

silage_6_wide_1 = silage_6_wide_1 %>% left_join(silage_29_wide_1)


#"BARP_Percent Barren Plants Per Plot_Percent"
silage_29= silage_5 %>% filter(trait=="BARP_Percent Barren Plants Per Plot_Percent" )

silage_29_wide = silage_29 %>% spread(trait,OBS_numValue)
silage_29_wide_1 = silage_29_wide[,c(80,82)]

silage_6_wide_1 = silage_6_wide_1 %>% left_join(silage_29_wide_1)

#"FNSP_Final Stand Percent_Percent"

silage_30= silage_5 %>% filter(trait=="FNSP_Final Stand Percent_Percent" )

silage_30_wide = silage_30 %>% spread(trait,OBS_numValue)
silage_30_wide_1 = silage_30_wide[,c(80,82)]

silage_6_wide_1 = silage_6_wide_1 %>% left_join(silage_30_wide_1)


#"STYLD_BE_Starch Yield - Best Estimate_Quintals/Hectare"

silage_31= silage_5 %>% filter(trait=="STYLD_BE_Starch Yield - Best Estimate_Quintals/Hectare" )

silage_31_wide = silage_31 %>% spread(trait,OBS_numValue)
silage_31_wide_1 = silage_31_wide[,c(80,82)]

silage_6_wide_1 = silage_6_wide_1 %>% left_join(silage_31_wide_1)

#"STYLD_Starch Yield_Quintals/Hectare"

silage_32= silage_5 %>% filter(trait=="STYLD_Starch Yield_Quintals/Hectare" )

silage_32_wide = silage_32 %>% spread(trait,OBS_numValue)
silage_32_wide_1 = silage_32_wide[,c(80,82)]

silage_6_wide_1 = silage_6_wide_1 %>% left_join(silage_32_wide_1)


#"STAS_BE_Silage Starch - Best Estimate_Percent"

silage_33= silage_5 %>% filter(trait=="STAS_BE_Silage Starch - Best Estimate_Percent" )

silage_33_wide = silage_33 %>% spread(trait,OBS_numValue)
silage_33_wide_1 = silage_33_wide[,c(80,82)]

silage_6_wide_1 = silage_6_wide_1 %>% left_join(silage_33_wide_1)

silage_34_wide_1 = silage_34_wide[,c(80,82)]

silage_6_wide_1 = silage_6_wide_1 %>% left_join(silage_34_wide_1)

silage_35_wide_1 = silage_35_wide[,c(80,82)]

silage_6_wide_1 = silage_6_wide_1 %>% left_join(silage_35_wide_1)

silage_36_wide_1 = silage_36_wide[,c(80,82)]

silage_6_wide_1 = silage_6_wide_1 %>% left_join(silage_36_wide_1)

#ASH_Percent Ash_Percent

silage_52_wide = silage_52 %>% spread(trait,OBS_numValue)
silage_52_wide_1 = silage_52_wide[,c(80,82)]

#ELOS_Percent Enzyme Digestible Organic Matter_Percent

silage_52_wide = silage_52 %>% spread(trait,OBS_numValue)
silage_52_wide_1 = silage_52_wide[,c(80,82)]

#CEL_Percent Cellulose_Percent

silage_52_wide = silage_52 %>% spread(trait,OBS_numValue)
silage_52_wide_1 = silage_52_wide[,c(80,82)]

silage_6_wide_1 = silage_6_wide_1 %>% left_join(silage_52_wide_1)


#FAT_Fat_Percent

silage_52_wide_1 = silage_52_wide[,c(80,82)]

#SSG_Percent Soluble Sugar_Percent

silage_52_wide_1 = silage_52_wide[,c(80,82)]

#NFC_Non Fiber Carbohydrates_Percent

silage_52_wide = silage_52 %>% spread(trait,OBS_numValue)
silage_52_wide_1 = silage_52_wide[,c(80,82)]

silage_6_wide_1 = silage_6_wide_1 %>% left_join(silage_52_wide_1)

#CF_Crude Fiber_Percent

silage_52_wide = silage_52 %>% spread(trait,OBS_numValue)
silage_52_wide_1 = silage_52_wide[,c(80,82)]

#MEYLD_Metabolizable Energy Yield_Gj/Hectare

silage_52_wide = silage_52 %>% spread(trait,OBS_numValue)
silage_52_wide_1 = silage_52_wide[,c(80,82)]

#OADF_Organic Acid Detergent Fiber_Percent

silage_52_wide_1 = silage_52_wide[,c(80,82)]

silage_52_wide_1 = silage_52_wide[,c(80,82)]

#CPPA_Calculated Plants per Acre_Plants/Hectare

silage_52_wide = silage_52 %>% spread(trait,OBS_numValue)
silage_52_wide_1 = silage_52_wide[,c(80,82)]

silage_6_wide_1 = silage_6_wide_1 %>% left_join(silage_52_wide_1)


#IEMERG_Emergence Percent via Imagery Analysis_Percent

silage_52_wide = silage_52 %>% spread(trait,OBS_numValue)
silage_52_wide_1 = silage_52_wide[,c(80,82)]

silage_6_wide_1 = silage_6_wide_1 %>% left_join(silage_52_wide_1)


#CCVR_Canopy Cover_Percent
silage_52= silage_5 %>% filter(trait=="CCVR_Canopy Cover_Percent" )

silage_52_wide = silage_52 %>% spread(trait,OBS_numValue)
silage_52_wide_1 = silage_52_wide[,c(80,82)]

silage_6_wide_1 = silage_6_wide_1 %>% left_join(silage_52_wide_1)


#EMRIDX_Emergence Risk Index_Ratio
silage_52= silage_5 %>% filter(trait=="EMRIDX_Emergence Risk Index_Ratio" )

silage_52_wide = silage_52 %>% spread(trait,OBS_numValue)
silage_52_wide_1 = silage_52_wide[,c(80,82)]

silage_6_wide_1 = silage_6_wide_1 %>% left_join(silage_52_wide_1)


#CCVR_CV_Canopy Cover CV via Imagery Analysis_Percent
silage_52= silage_5 %>% filter(trait=="CCVR_CV_Canopy Cover CV via Imagery Analysis_Percent" )

silage_52_wide = silage_52 %>% spread(trait,OBS_numValue)
silage_52_wide_1 = silage_52_wide[,c(80,82)]

silage_6_wide_1 = silage_6_wide_1 %>% left_join(silage_52_wide_1)


#SEMR_Seed Emergence at V2 - V5 Leaf Stage Rating_Rating
silage_52= silage_5 %>% filter(trait=="SEMR_Seed Emergence at V2 - V5 Leaf Stage Rating_Rating" )

silage_52_wide = silage_52 %>% spread(trait,OBS_numValue)
silage_52_wide_1 = silage_52_wide[,c(80,82)]

silage_6_wide_1 = silage_6_wide_1 %>% left_join(silage_52_wide_1)

# Add hybrids, field info

#get all hybrids
#hybrids = unique(silage_5[,c(43,44,45,46,42,48,49,31,81,50,6,7,23,18,19,61,62)])

hybrids = unique(silage_5[,c(44,45,46,47,43,49,50,31,82,51,7,8,32,23,18,19,62,63)])
#experiment summary

complete_dataset = hybrids %>% left_join(silage_6_wide_1)

complete_dataset  = complete_dataset %>% mutate(productName= ifelse(is.na(productName),ENT_group2,productName))



complete_dataset_1 = unique(complete_dataset)

#root lodging and stalk lodging summary

root_lodging = filter(complete_dataset_1,!is.na(`RTLP_Root Lodged Percent_Percent`))

lodging_summary = complete_dataset_1 %>% group_by(unique_location_name) %>% summarise(root_lodging_percent = mean(`RTLP_Root Lodged Percent_Percent`, na.rm=T),stalk_lodging_percent = mean(`STLP_Percent Stalk Lodging_Percent`, na.rm=T),total_lodging_percent = mean(`TDPP_Total Damaged Plants Percent_Percent`, na.rm=T),total_barren_plants_percent = mean(`BARP_Percent Barren Plants Per Plot_Percent`, na.rm=T),total_greensnap_percent = mean(`TGSPP_Total Greensnap Percent_Percent`, na.rm=T),total_smut_infected_percent = mean(`SMUTPC_Calculated Percent Of Plants Per Plot Infected With Smut_Percent`, na.rm=T))

lodging_summary_by_hybrid = complete_dataset_1 %>% group_by(productName) %>% summarise(root_lodging_percent = mean(`RTLP_Root Lodged Percent_Percent`, na.rm=T),stalk_lodging_percent = mean(`STLP_Percent Stalk Lodging_Percent`, na.rm=T),total_barren_plants_percent = mean(`BARP_Percent Barren Plants Per Plot_Percent`, na.rm=T),total_greensnap_percent = mean(`TGSPP_Total Greensnap Percent_Percent`, na.rm=T),total_smut_infected_percent = mean(`SMUTPC_Calculated Percent Of Plants Per Plot Infected With Smut_Percent`, na.rm=T))

lodging_summary_by_hybrid_long = lodging_summary_by_hybrid %>% gather(flag_percent,value, 2:6)

lodging_summary_by_hybrid_long = lodging_summary_by_hybrid_long %>% mutate(value_round=round(value,1))

mine.heatmap <- ggplot(data = lodging_summary_by_hybrid_long, mapping = aes(x = flag_percent,
                                                       y = as.factor(productName),
                                                       fill = value)) +
  geom_tile() +
  xlab(label = "Observations in %") +geom_text(aes(label=value_round))+
  scale_fill_gradient(low = "green", high = "red")+scale_x_discrete(position = "top") + theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 90, vjust = 0.5, hjust=1))+ylab("Hybrid")

mine.heatmap

# ratings summary

rating_summary_by_hybrid = complete_dataset_1 %>% group_by(productName) %>% summarise(stalk_lodging_rating = mean(`STLR_Stalk Lodging Rating_Rating`),stay_green_rating = mean(`STGR_Stay Green Rating_Rating`, na.rm=T),tiller_rating = mean(`TILLR_Tiller Rating_Rating`, na.rm=T),early_vigor_rating = mean(`EVG_Early Vigor_Rating`, na.rm=T),ear_uniformity_rating= mean(`EARUN_Ear Uniformity Rating_Rating`, na.rm=T),seedling_vigor_rating= mean(`SDV_Seedling Vigor_Rating`, na.rm=T),silage_appearance_rating= mean(`SPAR_Silage Plant Appearance Rating_Rating`, na.rm=T),plant_appearance_rating= mean(`PA_Plant Appearance Rating_Rating`, na.rm=T),evenness_rating= mean(`EVN_Evenness_Rating`, na.rm=T),cold_tolerance_rating= mean(`COT_Cold Tolerance_Rating`, na.rm=T))

rating_summary_by_hybrid_long = rating_summary_by_hybrid %>% gather(rating_type,value, 2:11)

rating_summary_by_hybrid_long = filter(rating_summary_by_hybrid_long, !is.na(value))

rating_summary_by_hybrid_long = rating_summary_by_hybrid_long %>% mutate(value_round=round(value,1))

mine.heatmap <- ggplot(data = rating_summary_by_hybrid_long, mapping = aes(x = rating_type,
                                                       y = as.factor(productName),
                                                       fill = value_round)) +
  geom_tile() +
  xlab(label = "Rating observations") +geom_text(aes(label=value_round))+
  scale_fill_gradient(low = "green", high = "red")+scale_x_discrete(position = "top") + theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 90, vjust = 0.5, hjust=1))+ylab("Hybrid")

mine.heatmap


ggplot(complete_dataset_1, aes(`HVPOP_Harvest Population_1000 Plants/Hectare`,`FNSC_Final Stand Count_Plants/Plot`))+geom_point()

complete_dataset_1 = complete_dataset_1 %>% mutate(target_density = ifelse(ENT_group2 %in%c("D1"),65,ifelse(ENT_group2 %in%c("D2"),80, ifelse(ENT_group2 %in%c("D3"),95,ifelse(ENT_group2 %in%c("D4"),110,ifelse(ENT_group2 %in%c("D5"),125,ifelse(ENT_group2 %in%c("D6"),140,"NA")))))))

complete_dataset_1 = complete_dataset_1 %>% mutate(target_density_1 = ifelse(ENT_group1 %in%c("D1"),65,ifelse(ENT_group1 %in%c("D2"),80, ifelse(ENT_group1 %in%c("D3"),95,ifelse(ENT_group1 %in%c("D4"),110,ifelse(ENT_group1 %in%c("D5"),125,ifelse(ENT_group1 %in%c("D6"),140,"NA")))))))

complete_dataset_1 = complete_dataset_1 %>% mutate(final_target_density = ifelse(target_density=="NA",target_density_1,target_density))

complete_dataset_1_2021 = filter(complete_dataset_1, FIELD_year==2021)

complete_dataset_1_2021_rthx = filter(complete_dataset_1, FIELD_Location=="Theix")

complete_dataset_1_2021_rthx = filter(complete_dataset_1_2021_rthx, midas_plot_id==879559022265595)


#complete_dataset_field = filter(complete_dataset_1, midas_field_id=="879557126410223")


#Observations
#silage_be in 2020 and 2021
#silage in 2019
# Silage yield
#complete_dataset_1 = complete_dataset_1 %>% mutate(silage_yield_consensus = ifelse(is.na(`SYLD_BE_Silage Yield - Best Estimate_Metric Tons/Hectare`),`SYLD_Silage Yield_Metric Tons/Hectare`,`SYLD_BE_Silage Yield - Best Estimate_Metric Tons/Hectare`),silage_yield_consensus_uom="t/ha")

complete_dataset_1 = complete_dataset_1 %>% mutate(silage_yield_best_estimate = `SYLD_BE_Silage Yield - Best Estimate_Metric Tons/Hectare`,silage_yield_uom="t/ha")

complete_dataset_1 = complete_dataset_1 %>% mutate(silage_yield = `SYLD_Silage Yield_Metric Tons/Hectare`,silage_yield_uom="t/ha")

#Dry matter yield percent
#complete_dataset_1 = complete_dataset_1 %>% mutate(dry_matter_yield_percent_consensus = ifelse(`SDM_BE_Dry Matter Percent - Best Estimate_Percent`=="NA",`SDM_Dry Matter Percent_Percent`,`SDM_BE_Dry Matter Percent - Best Estimate_Percent`),dry_matter_yield_percent_consensus_uom="percentage")

complete_dataset_1 = complete_dataset_1 %>% mutate(dry_matter_yield_percent_best_estimate = `SDM_BE_Dry Matter Percent - Best Estimate_Percent`,dry_matter_yield_percent_consensus_uom="percentage")

complete_dataset_1 = complete_dataset_1 %>% mutate(dry_matter_yield_percent= `SDM_Dry Matter Percent_Percent`,dry_matter_yield_percent_consensus_uom="percentage")



#strach yield
#complete_dataset_1 = complete_dataset_1 %>% mutate(starch_yield_consensus = ifelse(`STYLD_BE_Starch Yield - Best Estimate_Quintals/Hectare`=="NA",`STYLD_Starch Yield_Quintals/Hectare`/10,`STYLD_BE_Starch Yield - Best Estimate_Quintals/Hectare`/10),starch_yield_uom="t/ha")


#complete_dataset_1 = complete_dataset_1 %>% mutate(starch_yield_best_estimate = ifelse(`STYLD_BE_Starch Yield - Best Estimate_Quintals/Hectare`=="NA",`STYLD_Starch Yield_Quintals/Hectare`/10,`STYLD_BE_Starch Yield - Best Estimate_Quintals/Hectare`/10),starch_yield_uom="t/ha")

complete_dataset_1 = complete_dataset_1 %>% mutate(starch_yield = `STYLD_Starch Yield_Quintals/Hectare`/10,starch_yield_uom="t/ha")

#strach percent
complete_dataset_1 = complete_dataset_1 %>% mutate(starch_content_percent = ifelse(`STAS_BE_Silage Starch - Best Estimate_Percent`=="NA",`STAS_Silage Starch_Percent`,`STAS_BE_Silage Starch - Best Estimate_Percent`),starch_content_percent_uom="percentage")

#NDF based on country
complete_dataset_1 = complete_dataset_1 %>% mutate(ndf_percent = ifelse(FIELD_Country=="France",`NDF_Neutral Detergent Fiber_Percent`,`NDFLU_Neutral Detergent Fiber LUFA_Percent`),ndf_percent_uom="percentage")

#ADF based on country
complete_dataset_1 = complete_dataset_1 %>% mutate(adf_percent = ifelse(FIELD_Country=="France",`ADF_Acid Detergent Fiber_Percent`,`ADFLU_Acid Detergent Fiber LUFA_Percent`),adf_percent_uom="percentage")

#ADF based on country
complete_dataset_1 = complete_dataset_1 %>% mutate(adf_percent = ifelse(FIELD_Country=="France",`ADF_Acid Detergent Fiber_Percent`,`ADFLU_Acid Detergent Fiber LUFA_Percent`),adf_percent_uom="percentage")


# Milk yield
complete_dataset_1 = complete_dataset_1 %>% mutate(milk_yield = `MKYLD_Milk Yield_Kilograms/Hectare`,milk_yield_uom="kg/ha")


#Biogas yield
complete_dataset_1 = complete_dataset_1 %>% mutate(biogas_yield = `GASYLD_Biogas Yield_Normcubicmeters per ha`,biogas_yield_uom="Normcubicmeters/ha")

#fat percent
complete_dataset_1 = complete_dataset_1 %>% mutate(fat_percent = `FAT_Fat_Percent`,fat_percent_uom="percentage")

#Ash percent
complete_dataset_1 = complete_dataset_1 %>% mutate(ash_percent = `ASH_Percent Ash_Percent`,ash_percent_uom="percentage")

#Cellulose percent
complete_dataset_1 = complete_dataset_1 %>% mutate(cellulose_percent = `CEL_Percent Cellulose_Percent`,cellulose_percent_uom="percentage")

#Hemicellulose percent
complete_dataset_1 = complete_dataset_1 %>% mutate(cellulose_percent = `HCEL_Percent Hemicellulose_Percent`,hemicellulose_percent_uom="percentage")

#ELOS_Percent Enzyme Digestible Organic Matter_Percent
complete_dataset_1 = complete_dataset_1 %>% mutate(enzyme_digestible_organic_matter = `ELOS_Percent Enzyme Digestible Organic Matter_Percent`,enzyme_digestible_organic_matter_uom="percentage")

#remove all HVPOP with NA
#complete_dataset_1 = filter(complete_dataset, !is.na(`HVPOP_Harvest Population_1000 Plants/Hectare`))

#complete_dataset_1 = filter(complete_dataset_1, `HVPOP_Harvest Population_1000 Plants/Hectare`>10)

#complete_dataset_1 = filter(complete_dataset_1, `HVPOP_Harvest Population_1000 Plants/Hectare`<700)



complete_dataset_2 = filter(complete_dataset_1, `SYLD_Silage Yield_Metric Tons/Hectare`!="NA")

ggplot(complete_dataset_2, aes(`TDPP_Total Damaged Plants Percent_Percent`))+geom_histogram()+ylab("Number of plots")

ggplot(complete_dataset_2, aes(`RTLP_Root Lodged Percent_Percent`))+geom_histogram()+ylab("Number of plots")

ggplot(complete_dataset_2, aes(`STLP_Percent Stalk Lodging_Percent`))+geom_histogram()+ylab("Number of plots")

ggplot(complete_dataset_2, aes(`GSPP_Greensnap Percent_Percent`))+geom_histogram()+ylab("Number of plots")

ggplot(complete_dataset_2, aes(`TGSPP_Total Greensnap Percent_Percent`))+geom_histogram()+ylab("Number of plots")

ggplot(complete_dataset_2, aes(`SMUTPC_Calculated Percent Of Plants Per Plot Infected With Smut_Percent`))+geom_histogram()+ylab("Number of plots")

ggplot(complete_dataset_2, aes(`BARP_Percent Barren Plants Per Plot_Percent`))+geom_histogram()+ylab("Number of plots")

ggplot(complete_dataset_2,aes(`HVPOP_Harvest Population_1000 Plants/Hectare`,`SYLD_Silage Yield_Metric Tons/Hectare`))+geom_point()+geom_smooth(method="lm",formula = y ~ x + I(x^2))+facet_grid(~FIELD_year)


ggplot(complete_dataset_2,aes(`HVPOP_Harvest Population_1000 Plants/Hectare`,`SYLD_Silage Yield_Metric Tons/Hectare`, fill=productName))+geom_point()+geom_smooth(method="lm",formula = y ~ x + I(x^2))

ggplot(complete_dataset_2,aes(`HVPOP_Harvest Population_1000 Plants/Hectare`,`SYLD_Silage Yield_Metric Tons/Hectare`, fill=FIELD_Country))+geom_point()+geom_smooth(method="lm",formula = y ~ x + I(x^2))+facet_grid(~FIELD_year)



#write_csv(complete_dataset,"/mnt/files/EMEA_silage_data.csv")

#expt_summary = silage_6 %>% group_by(FIELD_Country) %>% summarise(number_of_hvpop_densities=length(unique(hvpop_density_round)),hvpop_densities= paste(unique(hvpop_density_round),collapse="; "),number_of_hybrids=length(unique(hybrid_name)),hybrids =paste(unique(hybrid_name),collapse="; "),number_of_reps=length(unique(REP_repetitionNumber)))


#all_data_plots_summary = silage_6%>% group_by(unique_plot_id) %>% summarise(number_of_hybrids=length(unique(hybrid_name)),hybrids =paste(unique(hybrid_name),collapse="; "), number_of_seasons=length(unique(FIELD_year)),number_of_hvpop=length(unique(hvpop_density_round)),years= paste(unique(FIELD_year),collapse="; "),hvpop_density = paste(unique(hvpop_density_round),collapse="; ") )


```

# Adding the commercial names

```{r message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, echo=F}
commerical_names = read_csv("/mnt/files/Copy of BDD_PCM_CM_laurent_hybrid_names_mapping.csv")

complete_dataset_1 = merge(complete_dataset_1, commerical_names, by.x="productName", by.y="PCM Hybrid Code",all.x=T)

complete_dataset_1 = complete_dataset_1 %>% mutate(hybrid_name = ifelse(is.na(`Product Identifier`),productName,`Product Identifier`))

dkc_3418_old_data = filter(complete_dataset_1,hybrid_name=="DKC3418")

```

# Combining the 2022 data

```{r message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, echo=F}
data_2022 = read_csv("/mnt/files/silage_2022_data_cleaned.csv")

str(data_2022)
str(complete_dataset_1)

silage_summary_2022 = data_2022 %>% group_by(SETS_setName,FIELD_year) %>% summarise(number_of_trials= length(unique(unique_location_name)),number_of_hybrids=length(unique(hybrid_name)))

data_2022$midas_plot_id = as.character(data_2022$midas_plot_id )
data_2022$midas_field_id = as.character(data_2022$midas_field_id )
data_2022$target_density = as.integer(data_2022$target_density )
complete_dataset_1$target_density = as.integer(complete_dataset_1$target_density )

data_2022$final_target_density = as.integer(data_2022$final_target_density )
complete_dataset_1$final_target_density = as.integer(complete_dataset_1$final_target_density )
combined_data = bind_rows(complete_dataset_1,data_2022)
dkc_3418_new = filter(combined_data,hybrid_name=="DKC3418")

combined_data$`HVPOP_Harvest Population_1000 Plants/Hectare` = as.double(combined_data$`HVPOP_Harvest Population_1000 Plants/Hectare`)

```

# Combining the 2023 data

```{r message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, echo=F}
data_2023 = read_csv("/mnt/files/silage_2023_data_cleaned.csv")

str(data_2023)
str(complete_dataset_1)

silage_summary_2023 = data_2023 %>% group_by(SETS_setName,FIELD_year) %>% summarise(number_of_trials= length(unique(unique_location_name)),number_of_hybrids=length(unique(hybrid_name)))

data_2023$midas_plot_id = as.character(data_2023$midas_plot_id )
data_2023$midas_field_id = as.character(data_2023$midas_field_id )
#data_2023$target_density = as.integer(data_2023$target_density )
complete_dataset_1$target_density = as.integer(complete_dataset_1$target_density )

data_2023$final_target_density = as.integer(data_2023$final_target_density )
complete_dataset_1$final_target_density = as.integer(complete_dataset_1$final_target_density )
combined_data = bind_rows(combined_data,data_2023)
dkc_3418_new = filter(combined_data,hybrid_name=="DKC3418")

combined_data$`HVPOP_Harvest Population_1000 Plants/Hectare` = as.double(combined_data$`HVPOP_Harvest Population_1000 Plants/Hectare`)

```

# Adding the commercial names

```{r message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, echo=F}
commerical_names = read_csv("/mnt/files/BDD_PCM_CM (1).csv")

combined_data = merge(combined_data, commerical_names, by.x="hybrid_name", by.y="PCM Hybrid Code",all.x=T)

complete_dataset_final = combined_data %>% mutate(hybrid_name_final = ifelse(is.na(`Product Identifier.y`),hybrid_name,`Product Identifier.y`))

combined_data = combined_data %>% mutate(hybrid_name = ifelse(is.na(`Product Identifier.y`),hybrid_name,`Product Identifier.y`))


```




# Flags for silage yield

```{r message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, echo=F}

add_duplicated_plot_flag = function(summary.df){
  
  plot_freq=as.data.frame(table(summary.df$unique_plot_id))
  names(plot_freq)[1] = "unique_plot_id"
  summary.df = inner_join(summary.df,plot_freq)
  summary.df = summary.df %>% mutate(plot_duplication_flag= ifelse(Freq>1,"TRUE","FALSE"))
  return(summary.df)
  
}

add_density_qc_flags_sit = function(summary.df){
  
   summary.df = summary.df %>% mutate(max_density_flag=ifelse(`HVPOP_Harvest Population_1000 Plants/Hectare`>700,"TRUE","FALSE"),min_density_flag=ifelse(`HVPOP_Harvest Population_1000 Plants/Hectare`<8,"TRUE","FALSE"),missing_density_flag=ifelse(is.na(`HVPOP_Harvest Population_1000 Plants/Hectare`),"TRUE","FALSE"))
   
   
  #summary.df = filter(summary.df,`HVPOP_Harvest Population_1000 Plants/Hectare`< 700 )

#density_data_1 = filter(density_data_1,`HVPOP_Harvest Population_1000 Plants/Hectare`> 8)

#density_data_1$target_density = as.double(density_data_1$final_target_density)

#density_data_1 = density_data_1 %>% mutate(fnsp_target_density=(`FNSP_Final Stand Percent_Percent`*target_density)/100)

return(summary.df)
}



add_silage_yield_qc_flags_sit = function(summary.df){
  
  
  
   summary.df = summary.df %>% mutate(max_silage_yield_flag=ifelse(silage_yield>33,"TRUE","FALSE"),min_silage_yield_flag=ifelse(silage_yield<5,"TRUE","FALSE"),missing_silage_yield_flag=ifelse(is.na(silage_yield),"TRUE","FALSE"))
  
 
summary.df = summary.df %>% group_by(unique_location_name) %>% dplyr::mutate(mean_yield=mean(silage_yield,na.rm=T),
sd_yield = sd(silage_yield,na.rm=T))

summary.df = mutate(summary.df, yield_upper_sd_filter = mean_yield+3*sd_yield,yield_lower_sd_filter = mean_yield-3*sd_yield)

#summary.df = left_join(summary.df,mean_yield)

#yield_upper_sd_filter = mean_yield+3*sd_yield
#yield_lower_sd_filter = mean_yield-3*sd_yield

summary.df = summary.df %>% mutate(field_silage_yield_sd_filter= ifelse(silage_yield >yield_upper_sd_filter,"TRUE",ifelse(silage_yield <yield_lower_sd_filter,"TRUE","FALSE")))

summary.df = summary.df %>% dplyr::select(-yield_upper_sd_filter,-yield_lower_sd_filter)

return(summary.df)
}

#Startch yield

add_Starch_yield_qc_flags_sit = function(summary.df){

  #summary.df_1 = filter(summary.df, !is.na(starch_yield))
summary.df = summary.df %>% group_by(unique_location_name) %>% dplyr::mutate(mean_yield=mean(starch_yield,na.rm=T),
sd_yield = sd(starch_yield,na.rm=T))

summary.df = mutate(summary.df, yield_upper_sd_filter = mean_yield+3*sd_yield,yield_lower_sd_filter = mean_yield-3*sd_yield)

#summary.df = left_join(summary.df,mean_yield)

#yield_upper_sd_filter = mean_yield+3*sd_yield
#yield_lower_sd_filter = mean_yield-3*sd_yield

summary.df = summary.df %>% mutate(field_starch_yield_sd_filter= ifelse(starch_yield >yield_upper_sd_filter,"TRUE",ifelse(starch_yield <yield_lower_sd_filter,"TRUE","FALSE")))

summary.df = summary.df %>% dplyr::select(-yield_upper_sd_filter,-yield_lower_sd_filter)

return(summary.df)
}

summary.df = summary.df %>% group_by(unique_location_name) %>% dplyr::mutate(mean_yield=mean(starch_content_percent,na.rm=T),
sd_yield = sd(starch_content_percent,na.rm=T))

summary.df = mutate(summary.df, yield_upper_sd_filter = mean_yield+3*sd_yield,yield_lower_sd_filter = mean_yield-3*sd_yield)

#summary.df = left_join(summary.df,mean_yield)

#yield_upper_sd_filter = mean_yield+3*sd_yield
#yield_lower_sd_filter = mean_yield-3*sd_yield

summary.df = summary.df %>% mutate(field_starch_content_percent_sd_filter= ifelse(starch_content_percent >yield_upper_sd_filter,"TRUE",ifelse(starch_content_percent <yield_lower_sd_filter,"TRUE","FALSE")))

summary.df = summary.df %>% dplyr::select(-yield_upper_sd_filter,-yield_lower_sd_filter)

return(summary.df)
}

sd_yield = sd(ndf_percent,na.rm=T))

summary.df = summary.df %>% dplyr::select(-yield_upper_sd_filter,-yield_lower_sd_filter)

return(summary.df)

sd_yield = sd(biogas_yield,na.rm=T))

# Dry matter percent
add_dry_matter_yield_percent_flags = function(summary.df){
  summary.df = summary.df %>% mutate(max_dry_matter_yield_percent_flag=ifelse(dry_matter_yield_percent>=45,"TRUE","FALSE"),min_dry_matter_yield_percent_flag=ifelse(dry_matter_yield_percent<=20,"TRUE","FALSE"))
  summary.df = summary.df %>% group_by(unique_location_name) %>% dplyr::mutate(mean_yield=mean(dry_matter_yield_percent,na.rm=T),
sd_yield = sd(dry_matter_yield_percent,na.rm=T))

summary.df = mutate(summary.df, yield_upper_sd_filter = mean_yield+3*sd_yield,yield_lower_sd_filter = mean_yield-3*sd_yield)

#summary.df = left_join(summary.df,mean_yield)

#yield_upper_sd_filter = mean_yield+3*sd_yield
#yield_lower_sd_filter = mean_yield-3*sd_yield

summary.df = summary.df %>% mutate(field_dry_matter_yield_percent_sd_filter= ifelse(dry_matter_yield_percent >yield_upper_sd_filter,"TRUE",ifelse(dry_matter_yield_percent <yield_lower_sd_filter,"TRUE","FALSE")))

summary.df = summary.df %>% dplyr::select(-yield_upper_sd_filter,-yield_lower_sd_filter)
  return(summary.df)
}


#rating flag
add_ratings_qc_flags= function(summary.df){
  
 #summary.df = summary.df %>% mutate(field_rating_flag=ifelse(`QPLOT_Plot Quality Rating_Rating`>=7 | `STGR_Stay Green Rating_Rating`>=7 | `STLR_Stalk Lodging Rating_Rating`>=7, "TRUE","FALSE"))
 
   
 summary.df = summary.df %>% mutate(plot_qplot_rating_flag=ifelse(`QPLOT_Plot Quality Rating_Rating`>=7 , "TRUE","FALSE"))
 
 summary.df = summary.df %>% mutate(plot_stay_green_rating_flag=ifelse(`STGR_Stay Green Rating_Rating`>=7 , "TRUE","FALSE"))
 
 summary.df = summary.df %>% mutate(plot_stalk_lodging_rating_flag=ifelse(`STLR_Stalk Lodging Rating_Rating`>=7 , "TRUE","FALSE"))
 
  summary.df = summary.df %>% mutate(plot_uniformity_rating_flag=ifelse(`PLOTUNI_Plot Uniformity_Rating`>=7 , "TRUE","FALSE"))
  
  return(summary.df)
  
}

# CV flag

add_cv_qc_flags= function(summary.df){

summary.df_1 = summary.df %>% group_by(unique_location_name) %>% mutate(mean_yield_by_field = mean(silage_yield, na.rm=T), sd_yield_by_field = sd(silage_yield, na.rm=T), cv_field=(sd_yield_by_field/mean_yield_by_field)*100)
 
#top_5_variable_fields = field_level_qc %>% arrange(-cv_field) %>% slice(1:5)
 
#dit_2018_2020_data_3 = dit_2018_2020_data_2 %>% mutate(field_level_CV_flag=ifelse(Trial %in% top_5_variable_fields$Trial,"TRUE","FALSE"))

summary.df_1 = summary.df_1 %>% group_by(unique_location_name,REP_repetitionNumber) %>% mutate(rep_yield_mean= mean(silage_yield),rep_yield_sd = sd(silage_yield)) %>% mutate(rep_CV = (rep_yield_sd/rep_yield_mean)*100)

summary.df_1 = summary.df_1 %>% mutate(field_level_CV_flag=ifelse(cv_field >=16,"TRUE","FALSE"),rep_level_CV_flag=ifelse(rep_CV >=16,"TRUE","FALSE"))
 
return(summary.df_1)
  
}

#Calculate the convex hull for both up and down being the "inside" of the curve and take the ratio of the path lengths.
#users.cs.cf.ac.uk/Paul.Rosin/resources/papers/convexity-BMVC.pdf
path_length <- function(x, y) {
  sum(sqrt(diff(x)^2 + diff(y)^2))
}



conv_meas <- function(x, y) {
  yrng <- range(y)
  xhull <- c(x, range(x)[2:1])
  chDown <- chull(xhull, c(y, rep(yrng[1], 2)))
  chUp <- chull(xhull, c(y, rep(yrng[2], 2)))
  chDown <- sort(chDown[chDown <= length(x)])
  chUp <- sort(chUp[chUp <= length(x)])
  path_length(x[chDown], y[chDown])/path_length(x[chUp], y[chUp])
}

add_inverted_curve_flag = function(silage_fresh_yield_3){

#silage_fresh_yield_3$plant_density = silage_fresh_yield_3$Target_density/1000

#silage_fresh_yield_3_long = silage_fresh_yield_3 %>% gather(observation, value, 14:18) 

#model_data = filter(silage_yield_1_long, observation=="SYLDFR_TN_HA")
  trait_name = silage_fresh_yield_3$trait[1]
  flag_name=paste(trait_name,"inverted_curve",sep="__")

trial_rep_hybrids = unique(silage_fresh_yield_3$trial_rep_hybrid)
 
dit_data_after_curve_qc= data.frame()
 
for (i in 1:length(trial_rep_hybrids)){
  #print(length(trial_rep_hybrids))
  #print(i)
  #i=19
  #print(trial_rep_hybrids[i])
 
dit_data_after_qc_plot_subset_1 = filter(silage_fresh_yield_3,trial_rep_hybrid==trial_rep_hybrids[i])
 
dit_data_after_qc_plot_subset_1$row_number = rownames(dit_data_after_qc_plot_subset_1)
 
  #lm_model <- lm(value ~ plant_density+I(plant_density^2) , data = dit_data_after_qc_plot_subset_1) 
  
  #plot_ratio = ggplot(dit_data_after_qc_plot_subset_1, aes(plant_density,value))+geom_point()+geom_smooth(method="lm",formula = y ~ x + I(x^2))
#plot_ratio
  
  #parmt_reg = as.data.frame(t(summary(lm_model)$coefficients))
  #a = parmt_reg$`(Intercept)`[1]
  #b = parmt_reg$plant_density[1]
  #c = parmt_reg$`I(plant_density^2)`[1]
  
  #if (!is.na(parmt_reg$`I(plant_density^2)`[1])){
  
  coeff = data.frame(hybrid = trial_rep_hybrids[i])
  #
  coeff$convexity=conv_meas(dit_data_after_qc_plot_subset_1$plant_density, dit_data_after_qc_plot_subset_1$value)
  coeff=coeff %>% mutate(convexity_round=round(convexity,3))
  #coeff = mutate(coeff, inverted_curve=ifelse(convexity<1,"TRUE","FALSE"))
  coeff = mutate(coeff, !!flag_name :=ifelse(convexity_round<1,"TRUE","FALSE"))
  dit_data_after_curve_qc = rbind(dit_data_after_curve_qc,coeff)
  #}
# pred <- fitted(lm_model)
  #residual <- abs(resid(lm_model)) bind_rows(dit_data_after_model_qc,dit_data_after_qc_plot_subset_1)
 
#}  
 
#write_csv(dit_data_after_curve_qc,"trial_rep_hybrid_inverted_curve_testing.csv")

  
} 



 
table(dit_data_after_curve_qc$inverted_curve)
names(dit_data_after_curve_qc)[1] = "trial_rep_hybrid"

#silage_fresh_yield_3_final = left_join(silage_fresh_yield_3,dit_data_after_curve_qc)

return(dit_data_after_curve_qc)
}


path_length <- function(x, y) {
  sum(sqrt(diff(x)^2 + diff(y)^2))
}



conv_meas <- function(x, y) {
  yrng <- range(y)
  xhull <- c(x, range(x)[2:1])
  chDown <- chull(xhull, c(y, rep(yrng[1], 2)))
  chUp <- chull(xhull, c(y, rep(yrng[2], 2)))
  chDown <- sort(chDown[chDown <= length(x)])
  chUp <- sort(chUp[chUp <= length(x)])
  path_length(x[chDown], y[chDown])/path_length(x[chUp], y[chUp])
}

add_inverted_curve_flag = function(silage_fresh_yield_3){

#silage_fresh_yield_3$plant_density = silage_fresh_yield_3$Target_density/1000

#silage_fresh_yield_3_long = silage_fresh_yield_3 %>% gather(observation, value, 14:18) 

#model_data = filter(silage_yield_1_long, observation=="SYLDFR_TN_HA")
  trait_name = silage_fresh_yield_3$trait[1]
  flag_name=paste(trait_name,"inverted_curve",sep="__")

trial_rep_hybrids = unique(silage_fresh_yield_3$trial_rep_hybrid)
 
dit_data_after_curve_qc= data.frame()
 
for (i in 1:length(trial_rep_hybrids)){
  #print(length(trial_rep_hybrids))
  print(i)
  #i=19
  print(trial_rep_hybrids[i])
 
dit_data_after_qc_plot_subset_1 = filter(silage_fresh_yield_3,trial_rep_hybrid==trial_rep_hybrids[i])

print(dim(dit_data_after_qc_plot_subset_1))
 
dit_data_after_qc_plot_subset_1$row_number = rownames(dit_data_after_qc_plot_subset_1)
 
  #lm_model <- lm(value ~ plant_density+I(plant_density^2) , data = dit_data_after_qc_plot_subset_1) 
  
  #plot_ratio = ggplot(dit_data_after_qc_plot_subset_1, aes(plant_density,value))+geom_point()+geom_smooth(method="lm",formula = y ~ x + I(x^2))
#plot_ratio
  
  #parmt_reg = as.data.frame(t(summary(lm_model)$coefficients))
  #a = parmt_reg$`(Intercept)`[1]
  #b = parmt_reg$plant_density[1]
  #c = parmt_reg$`I(plant_density^2)`[1]
  
  #if (!is.na(parmt_reg$`I(plant_density^2)`[1])){
  
  coeff = data.frame(hybrid = trial_rep_hybrids[i])
  #
  coeff$convexity=conv_meas(dit_data_after_qc_plot_subset_1$`HVPOP_Harvest Population_1000 Plants/Hectare`, dit_data_after_qc_plot_subset_1$silage_yield)
  coeff=coeff %>% mutate(convexity_round=round(convexity,3))
  #coeff = mutate(coeff, inverted_curve=ifelse(convexity<1,"TRUE","FALSE"))
  coeff = mutate(coeff, !!flag_name :=ifelse(convexity_round<1,"TRUE","FALSE"))
  dit_data_after_curve_qc = rbind(dit_data_after_curve_qc,coeff)
  #}
# pred <- fitted(lm_model)
  #residual <- abs(resid(lm_model)) bind_rows(dit_data_after_model_qc,dit_data_after_qc_plot_subset_1)
 
#}  
 
#write_csv(dit_data_after_curve_qc,"trial_rep_hybrid_inverted_curve_testing.csv")

  
} 



 
table(dit_data_after_curve_qc$inverted_curve)
names(dit_data_after_curve_qc)[1] = "trial_rep_hybrid"

#silage_fresh_yield_3_final = left_join(silage_fresh_yield_3,dit_data_after_curve_qc)

return(dit_data_after_curve_qc)
}

# Slavko's ANOVA flag

add_rep_level_anova_flag = function(silage_fresh_yield_3){
  
  anova_results = lm(silage_yield~location_rep+`HVPOP_Harvest Population_1000 Plants/Hectare`, data=silage_fresh_yield_3)

 Stud.Residual = abs(stats::rstudent(anova_results))
    #print(length(Stud.Residual))
  ## Appending DSR values to the existing table
    sr.df=as.data.frame(Stud.Residual)
    sr.df$row_number=rownames(sr.df)
    silage_fresh_yield_3$row_number=rownames(silage_fresh_yield_3)
    silage_fresh_yield_3 = silage_fresh_yield_3%>% left_join(sr.df)
    
    silage_fresh_yield_3 = silage_fresh_yield_3 %>% mutate(location_rep_anova_flag=ifelse(Stud.Residual>=2, TRUE, FALSE))
    return(silage_fresh_yield_3)
}


```



# Adding QC flags to the dataset

```{r message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, echo=F}

complete_dataset_flags = add_duplicated_plot_flag(combined_data)

duplicated_df= unique(complete_dataset_flags[,c(13,116)])

ggplot(duplicated_df,aes(plot_duplication_flag))+geom_bar()

duplicated_df_true = filter(duplicated_df,plot_duplication_flag=="TRUE")

length(unique(duplicated_df_true$unique_plot_id))

complete_dataset_flags = filter(complete_dataset_flags,plot_duplication_flag=="FALSE")

complete_dataset_flags = add_density_qc_flags_sit(complete_dataset_flags)

duplicated_df_density= unique(complete_dataset_flags[,c(13,117:119)])

#ggplot(duplicated_df_density,aes(plot_duplication_flag))+geom_bar()

duplicated_df_true = filter(duplicated_df,plot_duplication_flag=="TRUE")

complete_dataset_flags_density = filter(complete_dataset_flags,missing_density_flag=="FALSE")

complete_dataset_flags_density = filter(complete_dataset_flags,max_density_flag=="FALSE")


complete_dataset_flags_density = filter(complete_dataset_flags,min_density_flag=="FALSE")


complete_dataset_flags_density_yield= add_silage_yield_qc_flags_sit(complete_dataset_flags_density)


complete_dataset_flags_density_yield = add_Starch_yield_qc_flags_sit(complete_dataset_flags_density_yield)


complete_dataset_flags_density_yield = add_Starch_percent_qc_flags_sit(complete_dataset_flags_density_yield)

complete_dataset_flags_density_yield = add_ndf_percent_qc_flags_sit(complete_dataset_flags_density_yield)

complete_dataset_flags_density_yield = add_adf_percent_qc_flags_sit(complete_dataset_flags_density_yield)

complete_dataset_flags_density_yield = add_milk_yield_qc_flags_sit(complete_dataset_flags_density_yield)

complete_dataset_flags_density_yield = add_biogas_yield_qc_flags_sit(complete_dataset_flags_density_yield)

complete_dataset_flags_density_yield = add_dry_matter_yield_percent_flags(complete_dataset_flags_density_yield)

#complete_dataset_flags_density_yield = add_dry_matter_yield_percent_flags(complete_dataset_flags_density_yield)

complete_dataset_flags_density_yield = add_ratings_qc_flags(complete_dataset_flags_density_yield)

complete_dataset_flags_density_yield = add_cv_qc_flags(complete_dataset_flags_density_yield)

#add_rep_level_anova_flag
complete_dataset_flags_density_yield = complete_dataset_flags_density_yield %>% unite(location_rep, unique_location_name,REP_repetitionNumber, sep="__", remove=F)

complete_dataset_flags_density_yield = filter(complete_dataset_flags_density_yield, hybrid_name!="NA")
hybrids = unique(complete_dataset_flags_density_yield$hybrid_name)
anova.df = data.frame()

for(i in 1:length(hybrids)){
  print(hybrids[i])
  hybrid_subset = complete_dataset_flags_density_yield %>% dplyr::filter(hybrid_name==hybrids[i])
  anova_flag_df= add_rep_level_anova_flag(hybrid_subset)
  
  anova.df = bind_rows(anova.df, anova_flag_df)
}

anova.df  = anova.df %>% unite(trial_rep_hybrid,unique_location_name,hybrid_name,REP_repetitionNumber,sep="_",remove=F)
anova.df$trait="silage_yield"

anova.df=filter(anova.df, silage_yield!="NA")

inverted_curve_flag=add_inverted_curve_flag(anova.df)

anova.df = left_join(anova.df,inverted_curve_flag)

complete_dataset_flags_density_yield_with_all_flags=anova.df



dkc_3418_flags_new = filter(complete_dataset_flags_density_yield_with_all_flags, hybrid_name=="DKC3418")
```
