```{r message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, echo=F}
#model_data = complete_dataset_flags_density_yield_with_all_flags[,c(2:8,9,16,11,12,14,17,114,85,21,88,92,94,96,98,100,102,104,106,108,110,116:121,125:134,149,145,153,78,74,76,155)]

model_data = complete_dataset_flags_density_yield_with_all_flags[,c(2:8,9,16,11,12,14,17,114,85,21,88,92,94,96,98,100,102,104,106,108,110,116:121,125:134,149,145,153,78,74,76,89,91,121:155,22,15,86)]

#model_data = complete_dataset_flags_density_yield_with_all_flags[,c(1,2:8,9,16,11,12,14,17,22,114,85,21,88,92,94,96,98,100,102,104,106,108,110,111,115,84,89,95,65,78,62,115:121,124:137,144,145,148,149,152,153,83,74,76,86,93,72)]

#model_data = filter(model_data, unique_plot_id%in% plots_noduplicates$Var1)

model_data = unique(model_data)

##write for csw

model_data_csw = model_data
model_data_csw$convexity = NULL

model_data_csw_1 = complete_dataset_flags_density_yield_with_all_flags %>% dplyr::select(SETS_setName,FIELD_year,FIELD_Country,FIELD_State,FIELD_County,FIELD_Location,FIELD_locationName,unique_location_name,midas_field_id,FIELD_field_latitude,FIELD_field_longitude, unique_plot_id,midas_plot_id,REP_repetitionNumber,ENT_group1,ENT_group2,hybrid_name,`HVPOP_Harvest Population_1000 Plants/Hectare`,final_target_density,silage_yield,silage_yield_uom,dry_matter_yield_percent,dry_matter_yield_percent_consensus_uom,starch_yield,starch_yield_uom,starch_content_percent,starch_content_percent_uom,ndf_percent,ndf_percent_uom,adf_percent,adf_percent_uom,milk_yield,milk_yield_uom,biogas_yield,biogas_yield_uom,fat_percent,fat_percent_uom,ash_percent,ash_percent_uom,cellulose_percent,cellulose_percent_uom,enzyme_digestible_organic_matter,enzyme_digestible_organic_matter_uom,target_density_range,plot_duplication_flag,max_density_flag,min_density_flag,missing_density_flag,max_silage_yield_flag,min_silage_yield_flag,missing_silage_yield_flag,field_silage_yield_sd_filter,field_starch_yield_sd_filter,field_starch_content_percent_sd_filter,max_dry_matter_yield_percent_flag,min_dry_matter_yield_percent_flag,field_dry_matter_yield_percent_sd_filter,field_level_CV_flag,location_rep_anova_flag,silage_yield__inverted_curve)

write_csv(model_data_csw_1,"/mnt/files/emea_silage_data_flags_2019_2023.csv")
silage_dataset_No_flags = model_data %>% filter(max_silage_yield_flag=="FALSE" & min_silage_yield_flag=="FALSE" & field_silage_yield_sd_filter =="FALSE")

silage_dataset_No_flags_1 = silage_dataset_No_flags %>% filter(location_rep_anova_flag=="FALSE")

#silage_dataset_No_flags_1 = silage_dataset_No_flags %>% filter(location_rep_anova_flag=="FALSE")

#silage_dataset_No_flags_1 = silage_dataset_No_flags %>% filter(location_rep_anova_flag=="FALSE")

#dry_matter_yield_percent

silage_dataset_No_flags_1 = silage_dataset_No_flags_1 %>% filter(max_dry_matter_yield_percent_flag=="FALSE")

silage_dataset_No_flags_1 = silage_dataset_No_flags_1 %>% filter(min_dry_matter_yield_percent_flag=="FALSE")



#silage_dataset_No_flags_1 = silage_dataset_No_flags_1 %>% filter(field_dry_matter_yield_percent_sd_filter=="FALSE")

silage_dataset_No_flags_2 = silage_dataset_No_flags_1 %>% filter(silage_yield__inverted_curve=="FALSE")

silage_dataset_No_flags_2_dkc3418_new = filter(silage_dataset_No_flags_2, hybrid_name=="DKC3418")

ggplot(silage_dataset_No_flags_2,aes(`HVPOP_Harvest Population_1000 Plants/Hectare`,silage_yield, fill=hybrid_name))+geom_point(alpha=1)+ggtitle("Silage yield t/ha at varying HVPOP per YE")+geom_smooth(method="lm",formula = y ~ x + I(x^2))#+facet_grid(productName~actual_yield_level_1) 



hybrid_summary = silage_dataset_No_flags_2 %>% group_by(hybrid_name) %>% summarise(number_of_seasons_tested=n_distinct(FIELD_year),number_of_locations_tested=n_distinct(unique_location_name),number_of_plots_tested=n_distinct(unique_plot_id))

hybrid_summary_2_seasons= filter(hybrid_summary,number_of_seasons_tested>1)

hybrid_summary_1_season= filter(hybrid_summary,number_of_seasons_tested==1)

silage_dataset_No_flags_1_data = filter(silage_dataset_No_flags_1,hybrid_name%in% hybrid_summary_2_seasons$hybrid_name)#

silage_dataset_No_flags_1_data_1_season = filter(silage_dataset_No_flags_1,hybrid_name%in% hybrid_summary_1_season$hybrid_name)#

ggplot(silage_dataset_No_flags_1_data,aes(`HVPOP_Harvest Population_1000 Plants/Hectare`,silage_yield, fill=hybrid_name))+geom_point(alpha=1)+ggtitle("Silage yield t/ha at varying HVPOP per YE")+geom_smooth(method="lm",formula = y ~ x + I(x^2))#+facet_grid(productName~actual_yield_level_1) 
```


```{r message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, echo=F}

#Method 4:- Minimum (global mean yield, mean_all_hybrids(95,110), mean per hybrid(95,110))
early_silage_method_1 = silage_dataset_No_flags_2 %>% group_by(unique_location_name,FIELD_year,FIELD_Country) %>% summarise(mean_field_yield_method_1=mean(silage_yield,na.rm=T),median_field_yield=median(silage_yield,na.rm=T))

silage_dataset_No_flags_2$final_target_density = as.integer(silage_dataset_No_flags_2$final_target_density)

early_silage_2_method_2 = filter(silage_dataset_No_flags_2,  final_target_density %in% c(95,110))

early_silage_2_method_2_summary = early_silage_2_method_2 %>% group_by(unique_location_name) %>% summarise(mean_field_yield_method_2=mean(silage_yield,na.rm=T))

early_silage_method_4 = inner_join(early_silage_method_1,early_silage_2_method_2_summary)
#early_silage_2_method_3 = filter(silage_dataset_No_flags_1_data,  final_target_density %in% c(95,110))

early_silage_2_method_3_summary = early_silage_2_method_2 %>% group_by(unique_location_name,hybrid_name) %>% summarise(mean_field_yield_method_3=mean(silage_yield,na.rm=T))

early_silage_method_4 = inner_join(early_silage_method_4,early_silage_2_method_3_summary)

early_silage_method_4 = early_silage_method_4 %>% mutate(mean_field_yield_method_4= pmin(mean_field_yield_method_1,mean_field_yield_method_2,mean_field_yield_method_3))

early_silage_method_4 = early_silage_method_4[,c(1,7,4,5,6,8,9)]

early_silage_method_4 = unite(early_silage_method_4, location_hybrid, unique_location_name,hybrid_name,sep="__", remove=F)

silage_dataset_No_flags_2 = unite(silage_dataset_No_flags_2, location_hybrid, unique_location_name,hybrid_name,sep="__", remove=F)

silage_dataset_No_flags_2 = inner_join(silage_dataset_No_flags_2, early_silage_method_4)

#na_data = filter(silage_dataset_No_flags_1,is.na(mean_field_yield_method_4) )

silage_dataset_No_flags_2 = unique(silage_dataset_No_flags_2)


early_silage_2 = silage_dataset_No_flags_2


early_silage_2 = mutate(early_silage_2, actual_yield_level = ifelse(mean_field_yield_method_4<18, "<18 t/ha",ifelse(mean_field_yield_method_4 >=18& mean_field_yield_method_4 <21, "18-21 t/ha",ifelse(mean_field_yield_method_4>=21, ">21 t/ha","NA"))))

# For method 4
early_silage_2 = mutate(early_silage_2, actual_yield_level = ifelse(mean_field_yield_method_4<18, "<18 t/ha",ifelse(mean_field_yield_method_4 >=18& mean_field_yield_method_4 <21, "18-21 t/ha",ifelse(mean_field_yield_method_4>=21, ">21 t/ha","NA"))))

early_silage_2 = early_silage_2 %>% mutate(actual_yield_level_1 = ifelse(actual_yield_level == "<18 t/ha","1:<18 t/ha",ifelse(actual_yield_level == "18-21 t/ha","2:18-21 t/ha",ifelse(actual_yield_level == ">21 t/ha","3:>21 t/ha","NA"))))




early_silage_2 = mutate(early_silage_2, actual_yield_level = ifelse(mean_field_yield_method_4<18, "<18 t/ha",ifelse(mean_field_yield_method_4 >=18& mean_field_yield_method_4 <21, "18-21 t/ha",ifelse(mean_field_yield_method_4>=21, ">21 t/ha","NA"))))

# For method 4
early_silage_2 = mutate(early_silage_2, actual_yield_level = ifelse(mean_field_yield_method_4<18, "<18 t/ha",ifelse(mean_field_yield_method_4 >=18& mean_field_yield_method_4 <21, "18-21 t/ha",ifelse(mean_field_yield_method_4>=21, ">21 t/ha","NA"))))

early_silage_2 = early_silage_2 %>% mutate(actual_yield_level_1 = ifelse(actual_yield_level == "<18 t/ha","1:<18 t/ha",ifelse(actual_yield_level == "18-21 t/ha","2:18-21 t/ha",ifelse(actual_yield_level == ">21 t/ha","3:>21 t/ha","NA"))))

#Method 5:- Median

#Median

##RUN this



#early_silage_2_summary_1 = early_silage_2_summary %>% group_by(location_silage_type,actual_yield_level) %>% summarise(number_of_locations=n())

#early_silage_2_summary_2 = early_silage_2_summary %>% group_by(actual_yield_level) %>% summarise(number_of_locations=n())

#ggplot(early_silage_2_summary_2, aes(actual_yield_level,number_of_locations))+geom_bar(stat="identity")



hybrids=unique(early_silage_2$hybrid_name)

#EU3498,EU3497 ET3396

hybrids_subset=hybrids[13]

ggplot(filter(early_silage_2,hybrid_name==hybrids_subset),aes(`HVPOP_Harvest Population_1000 Plants/Hectare`,silage_yield, fill=actual_yield_level_1))+geom_point(alpha=1)+ggtitle("Silage yield t/ha at varying HVPOP per YE")+geom_smooth(method="lm",formula = y ~ x + I(x^2))#+facet_grid(~actual_yield_level_1) 

ggplot(filter(early_silage_2,hybrid_name==hybrids_subset),aes(`HVPOP_Harvest Population_1000 Plants/Hectare`,silage_yield, fill=actual_yield_level_1))+geom_point(alpha=1)+ggtitle("Silage yield t/ha at varying HVPOP per YE")+geom_smooth()#+facet_grid(~actual_yield_level_1) 


#early_silage_2 = filter(early_silage_2,`HVPOP_Harvest Population_1000 Plants/Hectare`< 700 )

#early_silage_2 = filter(early_silage_2,`HVPOP_Harvest Population_1000 Plants/Hectare`> 8)


ggplot(early_silage_2,aes(`HVPOP_Harvest Population_1000 Plants/Hectare`,silage_yield, fill=actual_yield_level_1))+geom_point(alpha=1)+ggtitle("Silage yield t/ha at varying HVPOP per YE")+geom_smooth(method="lm",formula = y ~ x + I(x^2))



gen5_hybrids = c("EX3201XKL1", "ES3591XKL1", "EX3330XKL1", "EX3419XKL1","EW3948XKL1", "EW3298XKL1" ,"DKC3414"   , "DKC3418" ,  
"DKC3438"  ,  "DKC3724"    ,"DKC3201" )

gen5_hybrids_old_data = filter(early_silage_2, hybrid_name %in% gen5_hybrids)

#write_csv(gen5_hybrids_old_data,"/mnt/files/gen5_new_hybrids_2019_2022_data.csv")

write_csv(early_silage_2, "/mnt/files/EMEA_silage_old_data_for_instinct_2019_to_2023.csv")

```

# Complex model - Silage yield

```{r message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, echo=F}
early_silage_2_hybrid_summary = early_silage_2 %>% group_by(hybrid_name)%>% summarise(no_of_seasons= length(unique(FIELD_year)), no_of_trials=length(unique(unique_location_name)),no_of_plots=length(unique(unique_plot_id)))

early_silage_2_year_summary = early_silage_2 %>% group_by(FIELD_year)%>% summarise( no_of_trials=length(unique(unique_location_name)),no_of_plots=length(unique(unique_plot_id)))

early_silage_2$mean_field_yield=early_silage_2$mean_field_yield_method_4
hybrids=unique(early_silage_2$hybrid_name)

#EU3498,EU3497 ET3396

silage_summary = early_silage_2 %>% group_by(hybrid_name) %>% summarise(number_of_seasons = length(unique(FIELD_year)),
seasons = paste(sort(unique(FIELD_year)),collapse="; "),
number_of_locations = length(unique(unique_location_name)),
locations = paste(unique(unique_location_name), collapse="; "),
number_of_plots = length(unique(unique_plot_id)),
number_of_points = length(unique(unique_plot_id)))

silage_summary_country = early_silage_2 %>% group_by(hybrid_name)%>% summarise(year = paste(sort(unique(FIELD_year)),collapse="; "),number_of_countries=length(unique(FIELD_Country)),countries = paste(sort(unique(FIELD_Country)), collapse="; "))

silage_summary_country$mega_envs = "S0; S1; S2"
silage_summary_country$number_of_me = 3

silage_summary_country$crop = "Corn-Silage"
silage_summary_country$hybrid_type = "Tall hybrid"

silage_summary_country$trial_type = "Small plot DIT trials"
silage_summary_country$region = "EME"

#hybrids = c("DKC3418")

hybrids_subset=hybrids
#EU3311
#hybrids_subset=hybrids[c(11)]
all_parameters_df=data.frame()
for (i in 1:length(hybrids_subset)){
  #i=1
print(hybrids_subset[i])
early_silage_2_1 = filter(early_silage_2, hybrid_name==hybrids_subset[i])

names(early_silage_2_1)[88]="plant_density"


model_lm = lm(silage_yield~plant_density+ I(plant_density^2)+ I(mean_field_yield)+ I(mean_field_yield*plant_density),data=early_silage_2_1)


#mean_field_yield_method_4

parameters_reg = as.data.frame(t(summary(model_lm)$coefficients))
#lm_parameters = as.data.frame(t(summary(model_lm)$coefficients))
  a = parameters_reg$`(Intercept)`[1]
  b = parameters_reg$plant_density[1]
  c = parameters_reg$`I(plant_density^2)`[1]
  d = parameters_reg$`I(mean_field_yield)`[1]
 e = parameters_reg$`I(mean_field_yield * plant_density)`[1]
   pval_b = parameters_reg$plant_density[4]
  pval_c = parameters_reg$`I(plant_density^2)`[4]
  pval_d = parameters_reg$`I(mean_field_yield)`[4]
  pval_e = parameters_reg$`I(mean_field_yield * plant_density)`[4]
#print(summary(model_lm))
print(summary(model_lm)$adj.r.squared)

parameters_df = data.frame(hybrid_name=hybrids_subset[i],intercept=a, coeff_density=b, coeff_density_sqr=c,coeff_ye=d,coeff_ye_density=e,pvalue_density_coeff=pval_b,pvalue_density_sqr_coeff=pval_c,r_2=summary(model_lm)$r.squared,adj_r_2=summary(model_lm)$adj.r.squared, pvalue_ye=pval_d,pvalue_ye_density=pval_e)

early_silage_2_1$predicted_df <- predict(model_lm, early_silage_2_1)

#early_silage_2_1_1 = filter(early_silage_2_1, mean_field_yield == min(early_silage_2_1$mean_field_yield) | mean_field_yield == max(early_silage_2_1$mean_field_yield) | mean_field_yield == median(early_silage_2_1$mean_field_yield) )

# this is the predicted line of multiple linear regression

# model_df = model_df %>% mutate(optimal_density = -coeff_density/(2*coeff_density_sqr),
#     yld_max = intercept + coeff_density*optimal_density + coeff_density_sqr*optimal_density^2,economic_density = (-1)*(coeff_density-0.023)/(2*coeff_density_sqr),yld_eco = intercept + coeff_density*economic_density + coeff_density_sqr*economic_density^2)
all_parameters_df = rbind(all_parameters_df,parameters_df)
}

#early_silage_2_1_summary = early_silage_2 %>% group_by(hybrid_name) %>% summarise(min_ye=min(mean_field_yield),max_ye=max(mean_field_yield), median_ye=median(mean_field_yield))

early_silage_2_1_summary = early_silage_2 %>% group_by(hybrid_name) %>% summarise(low_ye=12,low_mid_ye=15,mid_ye=18,mid_high_ye=21,high_ye=24)

lm_test_data= early_silage_2_1_summary%>% crossing(plant_density = seq(40,160,1))
lm_test_data_long = lm_test_data %>% gather(ye_level,mean_field_yield, 2:6)


all_parameters_df_wrong_curves = filter(all_parameters_df,coeff_density_sqr>0)

all_parameters_df_right_curves = filter(all_parameters_df,coeff_density_sqr<0)

lm_test_data_long = inner_join(lm_test_data_long,all_parameters_df_right_curves)


silage_summary = silage_summary %>% inner_join(all_parameters_df_right_curves)

silage_summary = silage_summary %>% mutate(two_seasons_tested = ifelse(number_of_seasons>1, "TRUE", "FALSE"), atleast_ten_locations_tested= ifelse(number_of_locations>=10, "TRUE", "FALSE"),atleast_five_locations_tested= ifelse(number_of_locations>=5, "TRUE", "FALSE"),atleast_three_locations_tested= ifelse(number_of_locations>=3, "TRUE", "FALSE"))

silage_summary = silage_summary %>% mutate(r2_atleast_0.8 = ifelse(adj_r_2>=0.8, "TRUE", "FALSE"), r2_atleast_0.6= ifelse(adj_r_2>=0.6, "TRUE", "FALSE"),r2_atleast_0.4= ifelse(adj_r_2>=0.4, "TRUE", "FALSE"),r2_atleast_0.2= ifelse(adj_r_2>=0.2, "TRUE", "FALSE"))

confidence_unique_levels = unique(silage_summary[,c(18:25)])

#write_csv(confidence_unique_levels,"/mnt/results/confidence_unique_levels_silage.csv")

confidence_level_def = read_csv("/mnt/results/confidence_unique_levels_silage_small_trials.csv")

confidence_level_def = confidence_level_def %>% unite(flags_combined, two_seasons_tested,atleast_ten_locations_tested,atleast_five_locations_tested,atleast_three_locations_tested,r2_atleast_0.8,r2_atleast_0.6,r2_atleast_0.4,r2_atleast_0.2, sep="__",remove=F)
confidence_level_def_1 = confidence_level_def[,c(1,10)]
 
#defining confidence levels for hybrids tested for 2 seasons

#two_seasons_tested	atleast_ten_locations_tested	atleast_five_locations_tested	atleast_three_locations_tested	r2_atleast_0.8	r2_atleast_0.6	r2_atleast_0.4	r2_atleast_0.2
#TRUE	TRUE	TRUE	TRUE	TRUE	TRUE	TRUE	TRUE	Very high

silage_summary = silage_summary %>% unite(flags_combined, two_seasons_tested,atleast_ten_locations_tested,atleast_five_locations_tested,atleast_three_locations_tested,r2_atleast_0.8,r2_atleast_0.6,r2_atleast_0.4,r2_atleast_0.2, sep="__",remove=F)

silage_summary = inner_join(silage_summary,confidence_level_def_1)

#"crop"                          
#[20] "hybrid_type"                   
#[21] "trait"                         
#[22] "trial_type" 

#unique(all_parameters_df_1$crop)
#[1] "Corn-Grain"
#> unique(all_parameters_df_1$hybrid_type)
#[1] "Conventional-tall" "Smart corn"       
#> unique(all_parameters_df_1$trait)
#[1] "grain_yield"
#unique(all_parameters_df_1$trial_type)
#[1] "Geo-spatial large plot DIT trials"

silage_summary$crop = "Corn-Silage"
silage_summary$hybrid_type = "Tall hybrid"
silage_summary$trait = "silage_yield"
silage_summary$trial_type = "Small plot DIT trials"
silage_summary$region = "EME"
#silage_summary$confidence_level_overall=NULL

#defining confidence levels for hybrids tested for 2 seasons
#silage_summary = silage_summary %>% mutate(confidence_level_overall = (ifelse(two_seasons_tested=="TRUE" & atleast_ten_locations_tested == "TRUE" & r2_atleast_0.8 == "TRUE", "Very high",ifelse(two_seasons_tested=="TRUE" & atleast_ten_locations_tested == "TRUE" & r2_atleast_0.8 == "FALSE" & r2_atleast_0.6 == "TRUE", "High",ifelse(two_seasons_tested=="TRUE" & atleast_ten_locations_tested == "TRUE" & r2_atleast_0.8 == "FALSE" & r2_atleast_0.6 == "FALSE" & r2_atleast_0.4 == "TRUE" , "Medium",ifelse(two_seasons_tested=="TRUE" & atleast_ten_locations_tested == "TRUE" & r2_atleast_0.8 == "FALSE" & r2_atleast_0.6 == "FALSE" & r2_atleast_0.4 == "FALSE" & r2_atleast_0.2 == "TRUE" , "Low",ifelse(two_seasons_tested=="TRUE" & atleast_ten_locations_tested == "TRUE" & r2_atleast_0.8 == "FALSE" & r2_atleast_0.6 == "FALSE" & r2_atleast_0.4 == "FALSE" & r2_atleast_0.2 == "FALSE" , "Very low","NA")))))))

#defining confidence levels for hybrids tested for 1 season
#silage_summary = silage_summary %>% mutate(confidence_level_overall = (ifelse(two_seasons_tested=="FALSE" & atleast_five_locations_tested == "TRUE" & r2_atleast_0.6 == "TRUE", "Medium",ifelse(two_seasons_tested=="FALSE" & atleast_five_locations_tested == "FALSE" & atleast_three_locations_tested == "TRUE" & r2_atleast_0.6 == "FALSE" & r2_atleast_0.4 == "TRUE", "Low",ifelse(two_seasons_tested=="FALSE" & atleast_three_locations_tested == "FALSE" & r2_atleast_0.8 == "FALSE" & r2_atleast_0.6 == "FALSE" & r2_atleast_0.4 == "FALSE" , "Very Low",confidence_level_overall)))))


#lm_test_data_long$predicted_yield=predict(model_lm,lm_test_data_long)

lm_test_data_long = lm_test_data_long %>% mutate(predicted_yield=intercept+coeff_density*plant_density+coeff_density_sqr*plant_density*plant_density+coeff_ye*mean_field_yield+coeff_ye_density*mean_field_yield*plant_density)

#domino.science-at-scale.io/u/adatt/EMEA_Corn_Grain_Density_Modelling/view/EMEA_2018-2019_corn_grain_MDmodel.R


lm_test_data_long = lm_test_data_long %>% mutate(optimal_density = -(coeff_density+mean_field_yield*coeff_ye_density)/(2*coeff_density_sqr),
    yld_max = intercept + coeff_density*optimal_density + coeff_density_sqr*optimal_density^2+coeff_ye*mean_field_yield+coeff_ye_density*mean_field_yield*optimal_density,economic_density = (-1)*(coeff_density-0.023+mean_field_yield*coeff_ye_density)/(2*coeff_density_sqr),yld_eco = intercept + coeff_density*economic_density + coeff_density_sqr*economic_density^2+coeff_ye*mean_field_yield+coeff_ye_density*mean_field_yield*economic_density)

#lm_test_data_long = lm_test_data_long %>% mutate(eco_den = (-1)*(coeff_density_sqr+mean_field_yield*coeff_ye_density-0.023)/(2*coeff_density_sqr),eco_yld = intercept + coeff_density*eco_den + coeff_density_sqr*eco_den^2+  coeff_ye*mean_field_yield + coeff_ye_density*mean_field_yield*eco_den)

#domino.science-at-scale.io/u/jdmuno/MD_DensityWF_Fork/view/scripts_2019/4_GenV_2019_nation_targetPOP.R
Fun_eco_opt = function(t_ye, price = 3.75, cost = 4.5){
  #price: sale price, dollar per bushel
  #cost: seed price, dollar per thousand
  b_star = b+e*t_ye
  c_star = c
  a_star = a+d*t_ye
  
  
  #profit = pred_yield*price - pop*cost
  #       = (a+b_star*POP+c_star*POP_SQ)*price - POP*cost
  #       = a*price + (b_star*price - cost)*POP +c_star*price*POP_SQ
  
  x_peak = -(b_star*price - cost)/(2*(c_star*price))
  
  if(c_star < 0){
    if (x_peak > max_den) {
      x_eco = NA
    } else if (x_peak < min_den) {
      x_eco = NA
    } else{
      x_eco = x_peak
    }
    # pr_eco = a*price + (b_star*price - cost)*x_eco +c_star*price*x_eco^2
  } else{
    x_eco = NA
  }
  y_eco = a_star + b_star*x_eco + c_star*x_eco^2
  return(result = list(x = x_eco, y = y_eco
                       #, profit = pr_eco
  ))
}

#domino.science-at-scale.io/u/jdmuno/PopCornDKC/view/app.R
getOpt <- function(df, CP, SC){
  # CP - commodity price
  # SC - seed cost
  df$AgOpt = - (df$b_pop + (df$e_ye_pop * df$YE)) / (2*df$c_pop_sq)
  df$Yld_AgOpt = df$a_intcpt + df$AgOpt * df$b_pop + df$AgOpt**2 *df$c_pop_sq + df$YE * df$d_ye + df$YE * df$AgOpt * df$e_ye_pop
  df$EcOpt = (SC * 1/80000 * 1000 - df$e_ye_pop*df$YE*CP - df$b_pop*CP) / (2* df$c_pop_sq*CP)
  df$Yld_EcOpt = df$a_intcpt + df$EcOpt * df$b_pop + df$EcOpt**2 *df$c_pop_sq + df$YE * df$d_ye + df$YE * df$EcOpt * df$e_ye_pop
  df$EcOpt[(df$EcOpt < df$min_pop * 0.9) | (df$EcOpt > df$max_pop * 1.1)] <- NA
  df$Yld_EcOpt[is.na(df$EcOpt)] <- NA
  return(df)
}
 
SC=4.5
CP=3.75

SC=90
CP=100


 lm_test_data_long = lm_test_data_long %>% mutate(b_star = coeff_density+coeff_ye_density*mean_field_yield,c_star=coeff_density_sqr,a_star = intercept+coeff_ye*mean_field_yield,EcOpt = (SC * 1/50000 * 1000 - coeff_ye_density*mean_field_yield*CP - coeff_density*CP) / (2* coeff_density_sqr*CP),
  Yld_EcOpt = intercept + EcOpt * coeff_density + EcOpt**2 *coeff_density_sqr + mean_field_yield * coeff_ye + mean_field_yield * EcOpt * coeff_ye_density) 

lm_test_data_long = lm_test_data_long %>% mutate(ye_level=ifelse(ye_level=="low_ye","1:Low YE (12 t/ha)",ifelse(ye_level=="low_mid_ye","2:Low mid YE (15 t/ha)",ifelse(ye_level=="mid_ye","3:Mid YE (18 t/ha)",ifelse(ye_level=="mid_high_ye","4:Mid high YE (21 t/ha)",ifelse(ye_level=="high_ye","5:High YE (24 t/ha)","NA"))))))



optimal_density = unique(lm_test_data_long[,c(1,3,17,18)])
names(optimal_density)[3] = "plant_density"
names(optimal_density)[4] = "predicted_yield"
optimal_density$density_type="Optimal density"

economic_density = unique(lm_test_data_long[,c(1,3,19,20)])
names(economic_density)[3] = "plant_density"
names(economic_density)[4] = "predicted_yield"
economic_density$density_type="Slope constrained economic density"

cost_economic_density = unique(lm_test_data_long[,c(1,3,24,25)])
names(cost_economic_density)[3] = "plant_density"
names(cost_economic_density)[4] = "predicted_yield"
cost_economic_density$density_type="Seed cost constrained economic density"

optimal_density_1 = rbind(optimal_density,economic_density,cost_economic_density)

optimal_density_1$crop = "Corn-Silage"
optimal_density_1$hybrid_type = "Tall hybrid"
optimal_density_1$trait = "silage_yield"
optimal_density_1$trial_type = "Small plot DIT trials"
optimal_density_1$region = "EME"

optimal_density_1_silage=optimal_density_1

#data = filter(lm_test_data_long, hybrid_name=="DKC3418")
#opt_data = filter(optimal_density_1, hybrid_name=="DKC3418")

hybrids = unique(lm_test_data_long$hybrid_name)

#EW3323 EV3322 EW3521 EW3414 EW4048

#hybrids = c("EW3323","EV3322","EW3521","EW3414","EW4048","DKC3414","DKC3418")

for (i in 1:length(hybrids))
{

hybrid=hybrids[i]

#hybrid= "DKC3418"
data = filter(lm_test_data_long, hybrid_name==hybrid)
opt_data = filter(optimal_density_1, hybrid_name==hybrid)

summary_data= filter(silage_summary, hybrid_name==hybrid)

plot_model_1=ggplot(data, aes(x = plant_density, y = predicted_yield, color=ye_level)) +
  geom_line( aes(x=plant_density, y=predicted_yield,color=ye_level))+ggtitle(paste(data$hybrid_name[1],"- Density curve",sep=""))+facet_wrap(~hybrid_name)+geom_point(data=opt_data,aes(x=plant_density,y=predicted_yield,shape=density_type),size=3)+xlab("Harvest population Density (1K seeds/ha)")+ylab("Silage Yield (t/ha)")+labs(title = paste("Hybrid = ",hybrid,";","Seasons=",summary_data$number_of_seasons,";","locations=",summary_data$number_of_locations,";","plots =", summary_data$number_of_plots,";","Adj R2 = ",round(data$adj_r_2[1],3),";","Confidence level = ",summary_data$confidence_level,sep=" "))+ggsave(paste("/mnt/results/silage_2023_final/",hybrid, "_","Silage_density_curve.pdf",sep=""), width = 25, height = 20, units = "cm")#+facet_wrap(~actual_yield_level_1)#+
  #geom_point(data=highlight_df,
             #aes(x=lifeExp,y=gdpPercap, color=country),size=3)
print(plot_model_1)
}

#function for instinct

plot_yield_density_curve_for_silage_instinct = function(plot_data,opt_data,summary_data){
  
plot_model_1=ggplot(plot_data, aes(x = plant_density, y = predicted_yield, color=ye_level)) +
  geom_line( aes(x=plant_density, y=predicted_yield,color=ye_level))+ggtitle(paste(plot_data$hybrid_name[1],"- Density curve",sep=""))+facet_wrap(~plot_data$hybrid_name[1])+geom_point(data=opt_data,aes(x=plant_density,y=predicted_yield,shape=density_type),size=3)+xlab("Harvest population Density (1K seeds/ha)")+ylab("Silage Yield (t/ha)")+labs(title = paste("Hybrid = ",hybrid,";","Seasons=",summary_data$number_of_seasons,";","locations=",summary_data$number_of_locations,";","plots =", summary_data$number_of_plots,";","Adj R2 = ",round(summary_data$adj_r_2[1],3),";","Confidence level = ",summary_data$confidence_level,sep=" "))#+facet_wrap(~actual_yield_level_1)#+
  return(plot_model_1)
}

#function for gettting the optimal densitties

get_optimal_economic_densities_silage_instinct = function(plot_data){

optimal_density = unique(lm_test_data_long[,c(1,3,17,18)])
names(optimal_density)[3] = "plant_density"
names(optimal_density)[4] = "predicted_yield"
optimal_density$density_type="Optimal density"

economic_density = unique(lm_test_data_long[,c(1,3,19,20)])
names(economic_density)[3] = "plant_density"
names(economic_density)[4] = "predicted_yield"
economic_density$density_type="Slope constrained economic density"

cost_economic_density = unique(lm_test_data_long[,c(1,3,24,25)])
names(cost_economic_density)[3] = "plant_density"
names(cost_economic_density)[4] = "predicted_yield"
cost_economic_density$density_type="Seed cost constrained economic density"

opt_data = rbind(optimal_density,cost_economic_density)

return(opt_data)
}

optimal_density_1_3414_3418_new = filter(optimal_density_1, hybrid_name %in% c("DKC3414","DKC3418"))

optimal_density_1_silage = optimal_density_1
optimal_density_1_silage$crop = "Corn-Silage"
optimal_density_1_silage$hybrid_type = "Tall hybrid"
optimal_density_1_silage$trait = "silage_yield"

all_parameters_df_silage_yield = all_parameters_df

all_parameters_df_silage_yield$crop = "Corn-Silage"
all_parameters_df_silage_yield$hybrid_type = "PS4 Conventional-tall"

```

# Optimal number of locations


```{r,eval=F}
#EU3177- 10- 0.88
#EV3516 - 7 0.75
#1 season of data --> atleast 7 locations (3 or 4 reps) --> 0.75 adj.r2
#1 season of data --> atleast 5 locations (3 or 4 reps) --> 0.7 adj.r2

#2 seasons of data --> atleast 10-14 locations (3 or 4 reps) --> 0.7 adj.r2
early_silage_2_1_eu3177 = filter(early_silage_2, hybrid_name == "EU3177")
num_locations= length(unique(early_silage_2_1_eu3177$unique_location_name))


early_silage_2_1_eu3177_loc =as.data.frame(unique( early_silage_2_1_eu3177[,c(11)]))
names(early_silage_2_1_eu3177_loc)[1]="unique_location_name"

#early_silage_2_1_eu3177_loc= early_silage_2_1_eu3177_loc %>% 
 #   dplyr::mutate(num_rank = row_number())

early_silage_2_1_eu3177_loc$num = as.integer(rownames(early_silage_2_1_eu3177_loc))

early_silage_2_1_eu3177 = inner_join(early_silage_2_1_eu3177,early_silage_2_1_eu3177_loc)
  #mutate(id = n_distinct(unique_location_name))

#early_silage_2_1_eu3177_summary=early_silage_2_1_eu3177 %>% group_by(unique_location_name) %>% summarize(location_rank = row_number())


#unique(early_silage_2_1_eu3177_summary$unique_location_name,)

#unique()

#early_silage_2_1_eu3177_summary = early_silage_2_1_eu3177 %>%group_by(unique_location_name)  %>%summarise(location_rank=n())

num_locations = length(unique(early_silage_2_1_eu3177$num))

names(early_silage_2_1_eu3177)[17]="plant_density"

all_parameters_df_sim=data.frame()
for (i in 1:1000){
x5 <- sample(1:num_locations, 12, replace=F)

model_data = filter(early_silage_2_1_eu3177, num %in% x5)

model_lm = lm(silage_yield~plant_density+ I(plant_density^2)+ I(mean_field_yield)+ I(mean_field_yield*plant_density),data=model_data)
#print(summary(model_lm)$adj.r.squared)

#mean_field_yield_method_4

parameters_reg = as.data.frame(t(summary(model_lm)$coefficients))
#lm_parameters = as.data.frame(t(summary(model_lm)$coefficients))
  a = parameters_reg$`(Intercept)`[1]
  b = parameters_reg$plant_density[1]
  c = parameters_reg$`I(plant_density^2)`[1]
  d = parameters_reg$`I(mean_field_yield)`[1]
 e = parameters_reg$`I(mean_field_yield * plant_density)`[1]
   pval_b = parameters_reg$plant_density[4]
  pval_c = parameters_reg$`I(plant_density^2)`[4]
  pval_d = parameters_reg$`I(mean_field_yield)`[4]
  pval_e = parameters_reg$`I(mean_field_yield * plant_density)`[4]
#print(summary(model_lm))
print(summary(model_lm)$adj.r.squared)

parameters_df = data.frame(num_sim=i,hybrid_name=early_silage_2_1_eu3177$hybrid_name[1],number_of_seasons=number_of_seasons,number_of_locations=length(unique(early_silage_2_1_eu3177$unique_location_name)),intercept=a, coeff_density=b, coeff_density_sqr=c,coeff_ye=d,coeff_ye_density=e,pvalue_density_coeff=pval_b,pvalue_density_sqr_coeff=pval_c,r_2=summary(model_lm)$r.squared,adj_r_2=summary(model_lm)$adj.r.squared, pvalue_ye=pval_d,pvalue_ye_density=pval_e)
all_parameters_df_sim = rbind(all_parameters_df_sim,parameters_df)
}

mean(all_parameters_df_sim$adj_r_2)
```


```{r, echo=F, eval=F}
#second pass for the complex model

early_silage_2_wrong_curve = filter(early_silage_2, hybrid_name %in% all_parameters_df_wrong_curves$hybrid_name)

early_silage_2_wrong_curve = filter(early_silage_2_wrong_curve,silage_yield__inverted_curve=="FALSE")


hybrids=unique(early_silage_2_wrong_curve$hybrid_name)

#EU3498,EU3497 ET3396

hybrids_subset=hybrids
#EU3311
#hybrids_subset=hybrids[c(11)]
all_parameters_df_1=data.frame()
for (i in 1:length(hybrids_subset)){
print(hybrids_subset[i])
early_silage_2_1 = filter(early_silage_2_wrong_curve, hybrid_name==hybrids_subset[i])

names(early_silage_2_1)[18]="plant_density"

model_lm = lm(silage_yield~plant_density+ I(plant_density^2)+ I(mean_field_yield)+ I(mean_field_yield*plant_density),data=early_silage_2_1)

parameters_reg = as.data.frame(t(summary(model_lm)$coefficients))
#lm_parameters = as.data.frame(t(summary(model_lm)$coefficients))
  a = parameters_reg$`(Intercept)`[1]
  b = parameters_reg$plant_density[1]
  c = parameters_reg$`I(plant_density^2)`[1]
  d = parameters_reg$`I(mean_field_yield)`[1]
 e = parameters_reg$`I(mean_field_yield * plant_density)`[1]
   pval_b = parameters_reg$plant_density[4]
  pval_c = parameters_reg$`I(plant_density^2)`[4]
  pval_d = parameters_reg$`I(mean_field_yield)`[4]
  pval_e = parameters_reg$`I(mean_field_yield * plant_density)`[4]
#print(summary(model_lm))
print(summary(model_lm)$adj.r.squared)

parameters_df = data.frame(hybrid_name=hybrids_subset[i],intercept=a, coeff_density=b, coeff_density_sqr=c,coeff_ye=d,coeff_ye_density=e,pvalue_density_coeff=pval_b,pvalue_density_sqr_coeff=pval_c,r_2=summary(model_lm)$r.squared,adj_r_2=summary(model_lm)$adj.r.squared)

early_silage_2_1$predicted_df <- predict(model_lm, early_silage_2_1)

# model_df = model_df %>% mutate(optimal_density = -coeff_density/(2*coeff_density_sqr),
#     yld_max = intercept + coeff_density*optimal_density + coeff_density_sqr*optimal_density^2,economic_density = (-1)*(coeff_density-0.023)/(2*coeff_density_sqr),yld_eco = intercept + coeff_density*economic_density + coeff_density_sqr*economic_density^2)



all_parameters_df_1 = rbind(all_parameters_df_1,parameters_df)
}


early_silage_2_1_summary = early_silage_2_wrong_curve %>% group_by(hybrid_name) %>% summarise(low_ye=12,low_mid_ye=15,mid_ye=18,mid_high_ye=21,high_ye=24)

lm_test_data_1= early_silage_2_1_summary%>% crossing(plant_density = seq(40,200,10))
lm_test_data_long_1 = lm_test_data_1 %>% gather(ye_level,mean_field_yield, 2:6)




#lm_test_data_long_1$predicted_yield=predict(model_lm,lm_test_data_long_1)

#all_parameters_df_wrong_curves = filter(all_parameters_df,coeff_density_sqr>0)

#all_parameters_df_right_curves = filter(all_parameters_df,coeff_density_sqr<0)

lm_test_data_long_1 = inner_join(lm_test_data_long_1,all_parameters_df_1)

lm_test_data_long_1 = lm_test_data_long_1 %>% mutate(predicted_yield=intercept+coeff_density*plant_density+coeff_density_sqr*plant_density*plant_density+coeff_ye*mean_field_yield+coeff_ye_density*mean_field_yield*plant_density)

lm_test_data_long_1 = lm_test_data_long_1 %>% mutate(optimal_density = -(coeff_density+mean_field_yield*coeff_ye_density)/(2*coeff_density_sqr),
    yld_max = intercept + coeff_density*optimal_density + coeff_density_sqr*optimal_density^2+coeff_ye*mean_field_yield+coeff_ye_density*mean_field_yield*optimal_density,economic_density = (-1)*(coeff_density-0.023+mean_field_yield*coeff_ye_density)/(2*coeff_density_sqr),yld_eco = intercept + coeff_density*economic_density + coeff_density_sqr*economic_density^2+coeff_ye*mean_field_yield+coeff_ye_density*mean_field_yield*economic_density)
data = filter(lm_test_data_long_1,hybrid_name=="DKC3097")
plot_model_1=ggplot(data, aes(x = plant_density, y = predicted_yield, fill=ye_level)) + 
  geom_point(color='blue') +
  geom_line(color='red', aes(x=plant_density, y=predicted_yield))+ggtitle(lm_test_data_long$hybrid_name[1])+facet_wrap(~hybrid_name)#+geom_point(x=optimal_density,y=yld_max,color="green", data=lm_test_data_long)#+facet_wrap(~actual_yield_level_1)
print(plot_model_1)
# "DKC3218"
#"EV3512"
```


## Flexibility - silage yield

```{r message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, echo=F}
fit_non_linear_reciprocal_equation = function(density_data){
  mi <- nls(predicted_yield ~ plant_density / (a + b * plant_density), data=density_data, start=list(a=10,b=1))
  return(mi)
}
#Function for calculating the flexibility value per hybrid per yield env
calculate_flexibility_values_using_non_linear_reciprocal_equation = function(model){
  
  #dati <- dplyr::filter(density_data, yield_env == g)
 # mi <- nls(dry_yield_t_ha ~ plant_density / (a + b * plant_density), data=model_data, start=list(a=10,b=1))
  #print(summary(mi))
  
  out <- model$m$getPars()
  #out$actual_yield_environment_class = g
  
  pred <- predict(model)
  n <- length(pred)
  res <- resid(model)
  w <- weights(model)
  if (is.null(w)) w <- rep(1, n)
  rss <- sum(w * res ^ 2)
  resp <- pred + res
  center <- weighted.mean(resp, w)
  r.df <- summary(model)$df[2]
  int.df <- 1
  tss <- sum(w * (resp - center)^2)
  r.sq <- 1 - rss/tss
  adj.r.sq <- 1 - (1 - r.sq) * (n - int.df) / r.df
  
  out$pseudo.R.squared=r.sq
  out$adj.r.sq=adj.r.sq
  out=as.data.frame(out)
  out  = mutate(out , flexibility = a/b)
  return(out)
}

model = fit_non_linear_reciprocal_equation(lm_test_data_long)
model_results = calculate_flexibility_values_using_non_linear_reciprocal_equation(model)

hybrids =  unique(lm_test_data_long$hybrid_name)#[1:10]
 
#subset_data = filter(dit_data_after_qc_2,subset_data %in% hybrids)
 
flexibility_df = data.frame()
 
 
for(i in 1:length(hybrids)){
  g=hybrids[i]
  #print(g)
  dati <- dplyr::filter(lm_test_data_long, hybrid_name == g)
  ye_levels = unique(dati$ye_level)
  yield_levels_df = data.frame()
  for(j in 1:length(ye_levels)){
  h=ye_levels[j]
  dati_1 <- dplyr::filter(dati, ye_level == h)
  mi <- nls(predicted_yield ~ plant_density / (a + b * plant_density), data=dati_1, start=list(a=10,b=1))
  #print(summary(mi))
  out <- mi$m$getPars()
  out$hybrid_name = g
  out$ye_level = h
  out=as.data.frame(out)
  pred <- predict(mi)
  n <- length(pred)
  res <- resid(mi)
  w <- weights(mi)
  if (is.null(w)) w <- rep(1, n)
  rss <- sum(w * res ^ 2)
  resp <- pred + res
  center <- weighted.mean(resp, w)
  r.df <- summary(mi)$df[2]
  int.df <- 1
  tss <- sum(w * (resp - center)^2)
  r.sq <- 1 - rss/tss
  adj.r.sq <- 1 - (1 - r.sq) * (n - int.df) / r.df
  out$pseudo.R.squared=r.sq
  out$adj.r.sq=adj.r.sq
  yield_levels_df  = rbind(yield_levels_df ,out)
  }
  flexibility_df  = rbind(flexibility_df ,yield_levels_df)
}

flexibility_df$overall_flexibility=model_results$flexibility

flexibility_df  = mutate(flexibility_df , flexibility = a/b, normalized_flexibility= flexibility/overall_flexibility, rounded_norm_flex= round(normalized_flexibility,0))

 flexibility_df = flexibility_df %>% mutate(adj.r.sq = ifelse(adj.r.sq>0,adj.r.sq,pseudo.R.squared))

flexibility_df = flexibility_df %>% mutate(flexibility_class = ifelse(flexibility<=(-10),"1:Strong flex",ifelse(flexibility>-10 & flexibility<=(0),"2:More flex",ifelse(flexibility>0 & flexibility<=10 ,"3:Average",ifelse(flexibility>10 & flexibility<=20 ,"4:More fix",ifelse(flexibility>20,"5:Strong fix","NA"))))))

flexibility_df = flexibility_df %>% mutate(rsquared_greater_0.6=ifelse(adj.r.sq>0.6,"TRUE","FALSE"))
flexibility_df = flexibility_df %>% mutate(rsquared_greater_0.3=ifelse(adj.r.sq>0.3,"TRUE","FALSE"))


flexibility_df = flexibility_df %>% mutate(confidence_level_flexibility = ifelse(rsquared_greater_0.6 == "TRUE" , "High",ifelse(rsquared_greater_0.6 == "FALSE" & rsquared_greater_0.3 == "TRUE", "Medium", "Low")))



flexibility_df$crop = "Corn-Silage"

ssc_hybrids = c("EW6015XKL1","EW6436XKL1","EW6846XKL1","EW6846XKLZ","EW6015XKLZ","EW6436XKLZ")

flexibility_df = flexibility_df %>% mutate(hybrid_type = ifelse(hybrid_name %in% ssc_hybrids, "Smart corn", "Tall hybrid"))


#points_data_pmt2_with_ye_for_instinct_summary$hybrid_type = "PS4 Conventional-tall"
flexibility_df$trait = "silage_yield"
flexibility_df$trial_type = "Small plot DIT trials"
flexibility_df$region = "EME"

flexibility_df_silage_yield = flexibility_df
#write_csv(flexibility_df, "/mnt/files//Method_6_no_inverted_curve_Min_Farmer_hybrid_Silage_yield_flexibility_predictions_per_hybrid_per_YE.csv")


#fact_summary = fact %>% group_by()

#silage = read_csv("/mnt/files/corn_silage_2019_to_2021_updated_may19th_2022.csv")

```


# Complex model - Starch yield

```{r message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, echo=F}
starch_data=early_silage_2
starch_data = filter(starch_data, starch_yield!="NA")
starch_data = filter(starch_data, field_starch_yield_sd_filter=="FALSE")

starch_data_1 = filter(starch_data, max_dry_matter_yield_percent_flag=="FALSE")

starch_data_1 = filter(starch_data_1, field_dry_matter_yield_percent_sd_filter=="FALSE")

hybrids=unique(starch_data_1$hybrid_name)

#starch_summary = starch_data_1 %>% group_by(hybrid_name) %>% summarise(num_seasons=length(unique(FIELD_year)), num_locations=length(unique(unique_location_name)), num_plots=length(unique(unique_plot_id)))


starch_summary = early_silage_2 %>% group_by(hybrid_name) %>% summarise(number_of_seasons = length(unique(FIELD_year)),
seasons = paste(sort(unique(FIELD_year)),collapse="; "),
number_of_locations = length(unique(unique_location_name)),
locations = paste(unique(unique_location_name), collapse="; "),
number_of_plots = length(unique(unique_plot_id)),
number_of_points = length(unique(unique_plot_id)))

#EU3498,EU3497 ET3396

hybrids_subset=hybrids
#EU3311
#hybrids_subset=hybrids[c(11)]
all_parameters_df=data.frame()
for (i in 1:length(hybrids_subset)){
print(hybrids_subset[i])
early_silage_2_1 = filter(starch_data_1, hybrid_name==hybrids_subset[i])

names(early_silage_2_1)[17]="plant_density"
number_of_seasons = length(unique(early_silage_2_1$FIELD_year))
seasons = paste(sort(unique(early_silage_2_1$FIELD_year)),collapse="; ")
number_of_locations = length(unique(early_silage_2_1$unique_location_name))
number_of_plots = length(unique(early_silage_2_1$unique_plot_id))
number_of_points = length(unique(early_silage_2_1$unique_plot_id))

model_lm = lm(starch_yield~plant_density+ I(plant_density^2)+ I(mean_field_yield)+ I(mean_field_yield*plant_density),data=early_silage_2_1)

parameters_reg = as.data.frame(t(summary(model_lm)$coefficients))
#lm_parameters = as.data.frame(t(summary(model_lm)$coefficients))
  a = parameters_reg$`(Intercept)`[1]
  b = parameters_reg$plant_density[1]
  c = parameters_reg$`I(plant_density^2)`[1]
  d = parameters_reg$`I(mean_field_yield)`[1]
 e = parameters_reg$`I(mean_field_yield * plant_density)`[1]
   pval_b = parameters_reg$plant_density[4]
  pval_c = parameters_reg$`I(plant_density^2)`[4]
  pval_d = parameters_reg$`I(mean_field_yield)`[4]
  pval_e = parameters_reg$`I(mean_field_yield * plant_density)`[4]
#print(summary(model_lm))
print(summary(model_lm)$adj.r.squared)

parameters_df = data.frame(hybrid_name=hybrids_subset[i],intercept=a, coeff_density=b, coeff_density_sqr=c,coeff_ye=d,coeff_ye_density=e,pvalue_density_coeff=pval_b,pvalue_density_sqr_coeff=pval_c,r_2=summary(model_lm)$r.squared,adj_r_2=summary(model_lm)$adj.r.squared, pvalue_ye=pval_d,pvalue_ye_density=pval_e)

early_silage_2_1$predicted_df <- predict(model_lm, early_silage_2_1)

early_silage_2_1_1 = filter(early_silage_2_1, mean_field_yield == min(early_silage_2_1$mean_field_yield) | mean_field_yield == max(early_silage_2_1$mean_field_yield) | mean_field_yield == median(early_silage_2_1$mean_field_yield) )

# this is the predicted line of multiple linear regression
plot_model=ggplot(data = early_silage_2_1_1, aes(x = `HVPOP_Harvest Population_1000 Plants/Hectare`, y = silage_yield, fill=actual_yield_level_1)) + 
  geom_point(color='blue') +
  geom_line(color='red', aes(x=`HVPOP_Harvest Population_1000 Plants/Hectare`, y=predicted_df))#+facet_wrap(~actual_yield_level_1)
plot_model

# model_df = model_df %>% mutate(optimal_density = -coeff_density/(2*coeff_density_sqr),
#     yld_max = intercept + coeff_density*optimal_density + coeff_density_sqr*optimal_density^2,economic_density = (-1)*(coeff_density-0.023)/(2*coeff_density_sqr),yld_eco = intercept + coeff_density*economic_density + coeff_density_sqr*economic_density^2)
all_parameters_df = rbind(all_parameters_df,parameters_df)
}

#early_silage_2_1_summary = early_silage_2 %>% group_by(hybrid_name) %>% summarise(min_ye=min(mean_field_yield),max_ye=max(mean_field_yield), median_ye=median(mean_field_yield))

early_silage_2_1_summary = early_silage_2 %>% group_by(hybrid_name) %>% summarise(low_ye=12,low_mid_ye=15,mid_ye=18,mid_high_ye=21,high_ye=24)

lm_test_data= early_silage_2_1_summary%>% crossing(plant_density = seq(40,160,1))
lm_test_data_long = lm_test_data %>% gather(ye_level,mean_field_yield, 2:6)


all_parameters_df_wrong_curves = filter(all_parameters_df,coeff_density_sqr>0)

all_parameters_df_right_curves = filter(all_parameters_df,coeff_density_sqr<0)

lm_test_data_long = inner_join(lm_test_data_long,all_parameters_df_right_curves)

starch_summary = starch_summary %>% inner_join(all_parameters_df_right_curves)

starch_summary = starch_summary %>% mutate(two_seasons_tested = ifelse(number_of_seasons>1, "TRUE", "FALSE"), atleast_ten_locations_tested= ifelse(number_of_locations>=10, "TRUE", "FALSE"),atleast_five_locations_tested= ifelse(number_of_locations>=5, "TRUE", "FALSE"),atleast_three_locations_tested= ifelse(number_of_locations>=3, "TRUE", "FALSE"))

starch_summary = starch_summary %>% mutate(r2_atleast_0.8 = ifelse(adj_r_2>=0.8, "TRUE", "FALSE"), r2_atleast_0.6= ifelse(adj_r_2>=0.6, "TRUE", "FALSE"),r2_atleast_0.4= ifelse(adj_r_2>=0.4, "TRUE", "FALSE"),r2_atleast_0.2= ifelse(adj_r_2>=0.2, "TRUE", "FALSE"))

confidence_unique_levels_starch = unique(starch_summary[,c(18:25)])

#write_csv(confidence_unique_levels_starch,"/mnt/results/confidence_unique_levels_starch.csv")

confidence_unique_levels_starch = read_csv("/mnt/results/confidence_unique_levels_starch_small_trials.csv")

confidence_unique_levels_starch = confidence_unique_levels_starch %>% unite(flags_combined, two_seasons_tested,atleast_ten_locations_tested,atleast_five_locations_tested,atleast_three_locations_tested,r2_atleast_0.8,r2_atleast_0.6,r2_atleast_0.4,r2_atleast_0.2, sep="__",remove=F)
confidence_unique_levels_starch_1 = confidence_unique_levels_starch[,c(1,10)]
 
#defining confidence levels for hybrids tested for 2 seasons

#two_seasons_tested	atleast_ten_locations_tested	atleast_five_locations_tested	atleast_three_locations_tested	r2_atleast_0.8	r2_atleast_0.6	r2_atleast_0.4	r2_atleast_0.2
#TRUE	TRUE	TRUE	TRUE	TRUE	TRUE	TRUE	TRUE	Very high

starch_summary = starch_summary %>% unite(flags_combined, two_seasons_tested,atleast_ten_locations_tested,atleast_five_locations_tested,atleast_three_locations_tested,r2_atleast_0.8,r2_atleast_0.6,r2_atleast_0.4,r2_atleast_0.2, sep="__",remove=F)

starch_summary = inner_join(starch_summary,confidence_unique_levels_starch_1)

#"crop"                          
#[20] "hybrid_type"                   
#[21] "trait"                         
#[22] "trial_type" 

#unique(all_parameters_df_1$crop)
#[1] "Corn-Grain"
#> unique(all_parameters_df_1$hybrid_type)
#[1] "Conventional-tall" "Smart corn"       
#> unique(all_parameters_df_1$trait)
#[1] "grain_yield"
#unique(all_parameters_df_1$trial_type)
#[1] "Geo-spatial large plot DIT trials"

starch_summary$crop = "Corn-Silage"
starch_summary$hybrid_type = "Tall hybrid"
starch_summary$trait = "starch_yield"
starch_summary$trial_type = "Small plot DIT trials"
starch_summary$region = "EME"
#starch_summary$confidence_level_overall=NULL

#defining confidence levels for hybrids tested for 2 seasons
 #starch_summary= starch_summary %>% mutate(confidence_level_overall = (ifelse(two_seasons_tested=="TRUE" & atleast_ten_locations_tested == "TRUE" & r2_atleast_0.8 == "TRUE", "Very high",ifelse(two_seasons_tested=="TRUE" & atleast_ten_locations_tested == "TRUE" & r2_atleast_0.8 == "FALSE" & r2_atleast_0.6 == "TRUE", "High",ifelse(two_seasons_tested=="TRUE" & atleast_ten_locations_tested == "TRUE" & r2_atleast_0.8 == "FALSE" & r2_atleast_0.6 == "FALSE" & r2_atleast_0.4 == "TRUE" , "Medium",ifelse(two_seasons_tested=="TRUE" & atleast_ten_locations_tested == "TRUE" & r2_atleast_0.8 == "FALSE" & r2_atleast_0.6 == "FALSE" & r2_atleast_0.4 == "FALSE" & r2_atleast_0.2 == "TRUE" , "Low",ifelse(two_seasons_tested=="TRUE" & atleast_ten_locations_tested == "TRUE" & r2_atleast_0.8 == "FALSE" & r2_atleast_0.6 == "FALSE" & r2_atleast_0.4 == "FALSE" & r2_atleast_0.2 == "FALSE" , "Very low","NA")))))))

#defining confidence levels for hybrids tested for 1 season
#starch_summary = starch_summary %>% mutate(confidence_level_overall = (ifelse(two_seasons_tested=="FALSE" & atleast_five_locations_tested == "TRUE" & r2_atleast_0.6 == "TRUE", "Medium",ifelse(two_seasons_tested=="FALSE" & atleast_five_locations_tested == "TRUE" & atleast_three_locations_tested == "TRUE" & r2_atleast_0.6 == "FALSE" & r2_atleast_0.4 == "TRUE" & r2_atleast_0.2 == "TRUE", "Low",ifelse(two_seasons_tested=="FALSE" & atleast_three_locations_tested == "TRUE" & r2_atleast_0.8 == "FALSE" & r2_atleast_0.6 == "FALSE" & r2_atleast_0.4 == "FALSE" , "Very Low",ifelse(two_seasons_tested=="FALSE" & atleast_three_locations_tested == "FALSE" & r2_atleast_0.8 == "FALSE" & r2_atleast_0.6 == "FALSE" & r2_atleast_0.4 == "FALSE" & r2_atleast_0.2 == "TRUE" , "Very Low",confidence_level_overall))))))


#lm_test_data_long$predicted_yield=predict(model_lm,lm_test_data_long)

lm_test_data_long = lm_test_data_long %>% mutate(predicted_yield=intercept+coeff_density*plant_density+coeff_density_sqr*plant_density*plant_density+coeff_ye*mean_field_yield+coeff_ye_density*mean_field_yield*plant_density)


lm_test_data_long = lm_test_data_long %>% mutate(optimal_density = -(coeff_density+mean_field_yield*coeff_ye_density)/(2*coeff_density_sqr),
    yld_max = intercept + coeff_density*optimal_density + coeff_density_sqr*optimal_density^2+coeff_ye*mean_field_yield+coeff_ye_density*mean_field_yield*optimal_density,economic_density = (-1)*(coeff_density-0.023+mean_field_yield*coeff_ye_density)/(2*coeff_density_sqr),yld_eco = intercept + coeff_density*economic_density + coeff_density_sqr*economic_density^2+coeff_ye*mean_field_yield+coeff_ye_density*mean_field_yield*economic_density)

lm_test_data_long = lm_test_data_long %>% mutate(ye_level=ifelse(ye_level=="low_ye","1:Low YE (12 t/ha)",ifelse(ye_level=="low_mid_ye","2:Low mid YE (15 t/ha)",ifelse(ye_level=="mid_ye","3:Mid YE (18 t/ha)",ifelse(ye_level=="mid_high_ye","4:Mid high YE (21 t/ha)",ifelse(ye_level=="high_ye","5:High YE (24 t/ha)","NA"))))))



optimal_density = unique(lm_test_data_long[,c(1,3,17,18)])
names(optimal_density)[3] = "plant_density"
names(optimal_density)[4] = "predicted_yield"
optimal_density$density_type="Optimal density"

economic_density = unique(lm_test_data_long[,c(1,3,19,20)])
names(economic_density)[3] = "plant_density"
names(economic_density)[4] = "predicted_yield"
economic_density$density_type="Slope constrained economic density"

#cost_economic_density = unique(lm_test_data_long[,c(1,3,4,24,25)])
#names(cost_economic_density)[4] = "plant_density"
#names(cost_economic_density)[5] = "predicted_yield"
#cost_economic_density$density_type="Seed cost constrained economic density"

optimal_density_1 = rbind(optimal_density,economic_density)

optimal_density_1$crop = "Corn-Silage"
optimal_density_1$hybrid_type = "Tall hybrid"
optimal_density_1$trait = "starch_yield"
optimal_density_1$trial_type = "Small plot DIT trials"
optimal_density_1$region = "EME"

optimal_density_1_starch=optimal_density_1

hybrids = unique(lm_test_data_long$hybrid_name)
#hybrids = c("EW3323","EV3322","EW3521","EW3414","EW4048","DKC3414","DKC3418")

for (i in 1:length(hybrids))
{

hybrid=hybrids[i]

data = filter(lm_test_data_long, hybrid_name==hybrid)
opt_data = filter(optimal_density_1, hybrid_name==hybrid)

summary_data= filter(starch_summary, hybrid_name==hybrid)

plot_model_1=ggplot(data, aes(x = plant_density, y = predicted_yield, color=ye_level)) +
  geom_line( aes(x=plant_density, y=predicted_yield,color=ye_level))+ggtitle(paste(data$hybrid_name[1],"- Density curve",sep=""))+facet_wrap(~hybrid_name)+geom_point(data=opt_data,aes(x=plant_density,y=predicted_yield,shape=density_type),size=3)+xlab("Harvest population Density (1K seeds/ha)")+ylab("Starch Yield (t/ha)")+labs(title = paste("Hybrid = ",hybrid,";","Seasons =",summary_data$number_of_seasons,";","locations =",summary_data$number_of_locations,";","plots =", summary_data$number_of_plots,";","Adj R2 = ",round(data$adj_r_2[1],3),";","Confidence level = ",summary_data$confidence_level,sep=" "))+ggsave(paste("/mnt/results/silage_2023/starch_yield/",hybrid, "_","Starch_yield_density_curve.pdf",sep=""), width = 25, height = 20, units = "cm")#+facet_wrap(~actual_yield_level_1)#+
  #geom_point(data=highlight_df,
             #aes(x=lifeExp,y=gdpPercap, color=country),size=3)
print(plot_model_1)
}

hybrid="DKC3414"

opt_data = filter(optimal_density_1, hybrid_name==hybrid)

summary_data= filter(silage_summary, hybrid_name==hybrid)

plot_model_1=ggplot(data, aes(x = plant_density, y = predicted_yield, color=ye_level)) +
  geom_line( aes(x=plant_density, y=predicted_yield,color=ye_level))+ggtitle(paste(data$hybrid_name[1],"- Density curve",sep=""))+facet_wrap(~hybrid_name)+geom_point(data=opt_data,aes(x=plant_density,y=predicted_yield,shape=density_type),size=3)+xlab("Harvest population Density (1K seeds/ha)")+ylab("Starch Yield (t/ha)")+labs(title = paste( hybrid,";","Seasons=",summary_data$number_of_seasons,";","locations=",summary_data$number_of_locations,";","plots =", summary_data$number_of_plots,";","Adj R2 = ",round(data$adj_r_2[1],3),";","Confidence level = ",summary_data$confidence_level_overall,sep=" "))#+ggsave(paste("/mnt/results/density_curves/",hybrid, "_","Starch_density_curve.pdf",sep=""))

#+facet_wrap(~actual_yield_level_1)#+
  #geom_point(data=highlight_df,
             #aes(x=lifeExp,y=gdpPercap, color=country),size=3)
print(plot_model_1)

optimal_density_1_3414_3418 = filter(optimal_density_1, hybrid_name %in% c("DKC3414","DKC3418"))





all_parameters_df_starch_yield = all_parameters_df

all_parameters_df_starch_yield$crop = "Corn-Silage"
all_parameters_df_starch_yield$hybrid_type = "PS4 Conventional-tall"

all_parameters_df_starch_yield_silage = rbind(all_parameters_df_starch_yield,all_parameters_df_silage_yield)



lm_test_data_long_starch = lm_test_data_long

```

## Flexibility - Starch yield

```{r message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, echo=F}
fit_non_linear_reciprocal_equation = function(density_data){
  mi <- nls(predicted_yield ~ plant_density / (a + b * plant_density), data=density_data, start=list(a=10,b=1))
  return(mi)
}
#Function for calculating the flexibility value per hybrid per yield env
calculate_flexibility_values_using_non_linear_reciprocal_equation = function(model){
  
  #dati <- dplyr::filter(density_data, yield_env == g)
 # mi <- nls(dry_yield_t_ha ~ plant_density / (a + b * plant_density), data=model_data, start=list(a=10,b=1))
  #print(summary(mi))
  
  out <- model$m$getPars()
  #out$actual_yield_environment_class = g
  
  pred <- predict(model)
  n <- length(pred)
  res <- resid(model)
  w <- weights(model)
  if (is.null(w)) w <- rep(1, n)
  rss <- sum(w * res ^ 2)
  resp <- pred + res
  center <- weighted.mean(resp, w)
  r.df <- summary(model)$df[2]
  int.df <- 1
  tss <- sum(w * (resp - center)^2)
  r.sq <- 1 - rss/tss
  adj.r.sq <- 1 - (1 - r.sq) * (n - int.df) / r.df
  
  out$pseudo.R.squared=r.sq
  out$adj.r.sq=adj.r.sq
  out=as.data.frame(out)
  out  = mutate(out , flexibility = a/b)
  return(out)
}

model = fit_non_linear_reciprocal_equation(lm_test_data_long_starch)
model_results = calculate_flexibility_values_using_non_linear_reciprocal_equation(model)

hybrids =  unique(lm_test_data_long_starch$hybrid_name)#[1:10]
 
#subset_data = filter(dit_data_after_qc_2,subset_data %in% hybrids)
 
flexibility_df = data.frame()
 
 
for(i in 1:length(hybrids)){
  g=hybrids[i]
  #print(g)
  dati <- dplyr::filter(lm_test_data_long_starch, hybrid_name == g)
  ye_levels = unique(dati$ye_level)
  yield_levels_df = data.frame()
  for(j in 1:length(ye_levels)){
  h=ye_levels[j]
  dati_1 <- dplyr::filter(dati, ye_level == h)
  mi <- nls(predicted_yield ~ plant_density / (a + b * plant_density), data=dati_1, start=list(a=10,b=1),trace=TRUE,nls.control(maxiter = 100))
  #print(summary(mi))
  out <- mi$m$getPars()
  out$hybrid_name = g
  out$ye_level = h
  out=as.data.frame(out)
  pred <- predict(mi)
  n <- length(pred)
  res <- resid(mi)
  w <- weights(mi)
  if (is.null(w)) w <- rep(1, n)
  rss <- sum(w * res ^ 2)
  resp <- pred + res
  center <- weighted.mean(resp, w)
  r.df <- summary(mi)$df[2]
  int.df <- 1
  tss <- sum(w * (resp - center)^2)
  r.sq <- 1 - rss/tss
  adj.r.sq <- 1 - (1 - r.sq) * (n - int.df) / r.df
  out$pseudo.R.squared=r.sq
  out$adj.r.sq=adj.r.sq
  yield_levels_df  = rbind(yield_levels_df ,out)
  }
  flexibility_df  = rbind(flexibility_df ,yield_levels_df)
}

flexibility_df$overall_flexibility=model_results$flexibility

flexibility_df  = mutate(flexibility_df , flexibility = a/b, normalized_flexibility= flexibility/overall_flexibility, rounded_norm_flex= round(normalized_flexibility,0))

 flexibility_df = flexibility_df %>% mutate(adj.r.sq = ifelse(adj.r.sq>0,adj.r.sq,pseudo.R.squared))

flexibility_df = flexibility_df %>% mutate(flexibility_class = ifelse(flexibility<=(-10),"1:Strong flex",ifelse(flexibility>-10 & flexibility<=(0),"2:More flex",ifelse(flexibility>0 & flexibility<=10 ,"3:Average",ifelse(flexibility>10 & flexibility<=20 ,"4:More fix",ifelse(flexibility>20,"5:Strong fix","NA"))))))

flexibility_df = flexibility_df %>% mutate(rsquared_greater_0.6=ifelse(adj.r.sq>0.6,"TRUE","FALSE"))
flexibility_df = flexibility_df %>% mutate(rsquared_greater_0.3=ifelse(adj.r.sq>0.3,"TRUE","FALSE"))


flexibility_df = flexibility_df %>% mutate(confidence_level_flexibility = ifelse(rsquared_greater_0.6 == "TRUE" , "High",ifelse(rsquared_greater_0.6 == "FALSE" & rsquared_greater_0.3 == "TRUE", "Medium", "Low")))

#flexibility_df_silage_yield = flexibility_df

flexibility_df$crop = "Corn-Silage"

ssc_hybrids = c("EW6015XKL1","EW6436XKL1","EW6846XKL1","EW6846XKLZ","EW6015XKLZ","EW6436XKLZ")

flexibility_df = flexibility_df %>% mutate(hybrid_type = ifelse(hybrid_name %in% ssc_hybrids, "Smart corn", "Tall hybrid"))


#points_data_pmt2_with_ye_for_instinct_summary$hybrid_type = "PS4 Conventional-tall"
flexibility_df$trait = "starch_yield"
flexibility_df$trial_type = "Small plot DIT trials"
flexibility_df$region = "EME"

flexibility_df_starch =flexibility_df

#write_csv(flexibility_df, "/mnt/files//Method_6_no_inverted_curve_Min_Farmer_hybrid_Silage_yield_flexibility_predictions_per_hybrid_per_YE.csv")


#fact_summary = fact %>% group_by()

#silage = read_csv("/mnt/files/corn_silage_2019_to_2021_updated_may19th_2022.csv")

```

# Preparing data for INSTINCT version 2

```{r message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, echo=F}
#model parameters
model_parameters_final_silage = rbind(silage_summary, starch_summary)

#optimal densities final
optimal_densities_final_silage = rbind(optimal_density_1_silage, optimal_density_1_starch)

#flexibility
flexibility_final_silage = rbind(flexibility_df_silage_yield, flexibility_df_starch)

#country and ME
silage_summary_country_final = silage_summary_country

write_csv(model_parameters_final_silage,"/mnt/results/instinct_2_development_results/silage_results_model_paramters_silage_2ndMar2023.csv")

write_csv(optimal_densities_final_silage,"/mnt/results/instinct_2_development_results/silage_results_optimal_densities_silage_2ndMar2023.csv")

write_csv(flexibility_final_silage,"/mnt/results/instinct_2_development_results/silage_results_flexibility_predictions_silage_2ndMar2023.csv")

write_csv(silage_summary_country_final,"/mnt/results/instinct_2_development_results/silage_results_country_megaenv_silage_2ndMar2023.csv")
```


# Modelling Starch content percent for France

## Using the complete model

```{r message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, echo=F,eval=F}
starch_data=early_silage_2
starch_data = filter(starch_data, starch_content_percent!="NA")
starch_data = filter(starch_data, field_starch_content_percent_sd_filter=="FALSE")

starch_data_1 = filter(starch_data, max_dry_matter_yield_percent_flag=="FALSE")

starch_data_1 = filter(starch_data_1, field_dry_matter_yield_percent_sd_filter=="FALSE")

add_Starch_percent_qc_flags_overall = function(summary.df){

  
summary.df = summary.df  %>% dplyr::mutate(mean_yield=mean(starch_content_percent,na.rm=T),
sd_yield = sd(starch_content_percent,na.rm=T))

summary.df = mutate(summary.df, yield_upper_sd_filter = mean_yield+3*sd_yield,yield_lower_sd_filter = mean_yield-3*sd_yield)

#summary.df = left_join(summary.df,mean_yield)

#yield_upper_sd_filter = mean_yield+3*sd_yield
#yield_lower_sd_filter = mean_yield-3*sd_yield

summary.df = summary.df %>% mutate(overall_starch_content_percent_sd_filter= ifelse(starch_content_percent >yield_upper_sd_filter,"TRUE",ifelse(starch_content_percent <yield_lower_sd_filter,"TRUE","FALSE")))

summary.df = summary.df %>% dplyr::select(-yield_upper_sd_filter,-yield_lower_sd_filter)

return(summary.df)
}



hybrids=unique(starch_data_1$hybrid_name)



#EU3498,EU3497 ET3396

hybrids_subset=hybrids
#EU3311
#hybrids_subset=hybrids[c(11)]
all_parameters_df=data.frame()
for (i in 1:length(hybrids_subset)){
print(hybrids_subset[i])
early_silage_2_1 = filter(starch_data_1, hybrid_name==hybrids_subset[i])

names(early_silage_2_1)[17]="plant_density"


number_of_seasons = length(unique(early_silage_2_1$FIELD_year))
seasons = paste(sort(unique(early_silage_2_1$FIELD_year)),collapse="; ")
number_of_locations = length(unique(early_silage_2_1$unique_location_name))
number_of_plots = length(unique(early_silage_2_1$unique_plot_id))
number_of_points = length(unique(early_silage_2_1$unique_plot_id))

model_lm = lm(starch_content_percent~plant_density+ I(mean_field_yield)+ I(mean_field_yield*plant_density),data=early_silage_2_1)

parameters_reg = as.data.frame(t(summary(model_lm)$coefficients))
#lm_parameters = as.data.frame(t(summary(model_lm)$coefficients))
  a = parameters_reg$`(Intercept)`[1]
  b = parameters_reg$plant_density[1]
  #c = parameters_reg$`I(plant_density^2)`[1]
  c = parameters_reg$`I(mean_field_yield)`[1]
 d = parameters_reg$`I(mean_field_yield * plant_density)`[1]
   pval_b = parameters_reg$plant_density[4]
  #pval_c = parameters_reg$`I(plant_density^2)`[4]
  pval_c = parameters_reg$`I(mean_field_yield)`[4]
  pval_d = parameters_reg$`I(mean_field_yield * plant_density)`[4]
#print(summary(model_lm))
print(summary(model_lm)$adj.r.squared)

#parameters_df = data.frame(hybrid_name=hybrids_subset[i],intercept=a, coeff_density=b, coeff_density_sqr=c,coeff_ye=d,coeff_ye_density=e,pvalue_density_coeff=pval_b,pvalue_density_sqr_coeff=pval_c,r_2=summary(model_lm)$r.squared,adj_r_2=summary(model_lm)$adj.r.squared, pvalue_ye=pval_d,pvalue_ye_density=pval_e)

parameters_df = data.frame(hybrid_name=hybrids_subset[i],intercept=a, coeff_density=b, coeff_density_sqr=NA,coeff_ye=c,coeff_ye_density=d,pvalue_density_coeff=pval_b,pvalue_density_sqr_coeff=NA,r_2=summary(model_lm)$r.squared,adj_r_2=summary(model_lm)$adj.r.squared, pvalue_ye=pval_c,pvalue_ye_density=pval_d)

#parameters_df = data.frame(hybrid_name=hybrids_subset[i],intercept=a, coeff_density=b, coeff_ye=c,coeff_ye_density=d,pvalue_density_coeff=pval_b,r_2=summary(model_lm)$r.squared,adj_r_2=summary(model_lm)$adj.r.squared, pvalue_ye=pval_c,pvalue_ye_density=pval_d)

early_silage_2_1$predicted_df <- predict(model_lm, early_silage_2_1)

early_silage_2_1_1 = filter(early_silage_2_1, mean_field_yield == min(early_silage_2_1$mean_field_yield) | mean_field_yield == max(early_silage_2_1$mean_field_yield) | mean_field_yield == median(early_silage_2_1$mean_field_yield) )

# this is the predicted line of multiple linear regression
plot_model=ggplot(data = early_silage_2_1_1, aes(x = `HVPOP_Harvest Population_1000 Plants/Hectare`, y = silage_yield, fill=actual_yield_level_1)) + 
  geom_point(color='blue') +
  geom_line(color='red', aes(x=`HVPOP_Harvest Population_1000 Plants/Hectare`, y=predicted_df))#+facet_wrap(~actual_yield_level_1)
plot_model

# model_df = model_df %>% mutate(optimal_density = -coeff_density/(2*coeff_density_sqr),
#     yld_max = intercept + coeff_density*optimal_density + coeff_density_sqr*optimal_density^2,economic_density = (-1)*(coeff_density-0.023)/(2*coeff_density_sqr),yld_eco = intercept + coeff_density*economic_density + coeff_density_sqr*economic_density^2)
all_parameters_df = rbind(all_parameters_df,parameters_df)
}

early_silage_2_1_summary = early_silage_2 %>% group_by(hybrid_name) %>% summarise(low_ye=12,low_mid_ye=15,mid_ye=18,mid_high_ye=21,high_ye=24)

lm_test_data= early_silage_2_1_summary%>% crossing(plant_density = seq(40,160,1))
lm_test_data_long = lm_test_data %>% gather(ye_level,mean_field_yield, 2:6)


#all_parameters_df_wrong_curves = filter(all_parameters_df,coeff_density_sqr>0)

#all_parameters_df_right_curves = filter(all_parameters_df,coeff_density_sqr<0)

lm_test_data_long = inner_join(lm_test_data_long,all_parameters_df)

#lm_test_data_long$predicted_yield=predict(model_lm,lm_test_data_long)

lm_test_data_long = lm_test_data_long %>% mutate(predicted_yield=intercept+coeff_density*plant_density+coeff_ye*mean_field_yield+coeff_ye_density*mean_field_yield*plant_density)


# lm_test_data_long = lm_test_data_long %>% mutate(optimal_density = -(coeff_density+mean_field_yield*coeff_ye_density)/(2*coeff_density_sqr),
#     yld_max = intercept + coeff_density*optimal_density + coeff_density_sqr*optimal_density^2+coeff_ye*mean_field_yield+coeff_ye_density*mean_field_yield*optimal_density,economic_density = (-1)*(coeff_density-0.023+mean_field_yield*coeff_ye_density)/(2*coeff_density_sqr),yld_eco = intercept + coeff_density*economic_density + coeff_density_sqr*economic_density^2+coeff_ye*mean_field_yield+coeff_ye_density*mean_field_yield*economic_density)

lm_test_data_long = lm_test_data_long %>% mutate(ye_level=ifelse(ye_level=="low_ye","1:Low YE (12 t/ha)",ifelse(ye_level=="low_mid_ye","2:Low mid YE (15 t/ha)",ifelse(ye_level=="mid_ye","3:Mid YE (18 t/ha)",ifelse(ye_level=="mid_high_ye","4:Mid high YE (21 t/ha)",ifelse(ye_level=="high_ye","5:High YE (24 t/ha)","NA"))))))



# optimal_density = unique(lm_test_data_long[,c(1,3,4,17,18)])
# names(optimal_density)[4] = "plant_density"
# names(optimal_density)[5] = "predicted_yield"
# optimal_density$density_type="Optimal density"
# 
# economic_density = unique(lm_test_data_long[,c(1,3,4,19,20)])
# names(economic_density)[4] = "plant_density"
# names(economic_density)[5] = "predicted_yield"
# economic_density$density_type="Slope constrained economic density"

#cost_economic_density = unique(lm_test_data_long[,c(1,3,4,24,25)])
#names(cost_economic_density)[4] = "plant_density"
#names(cost_economic_density)[5] = "predicted_yield"
#cost_economic_density$density_type="Seed cost constrained economic density"

hybrids = unique(lm_test_data_long$hybrid_name)
for (i in 1:length(hybrids)){

hybrid=hybrids[i]

#optimal_density_1 = rbind(optimal_density,economic_density)
#hybrid_name = "EW3415"
data = filter(lm_test_data_long, hybrid_name==hybrid)
#opt_data = filter(optimal_density_1, hybrid_name=="EU3177")
summary_data= filter(silage_summary, hybrid_name==hybrid)


plot_model_1=ggplot(data, aes(x = plant_density, y = predicted_yield, color=ye_level)) +
  geom_line( aes(x=plant_density, y=predicted_yield,color=ye_level))+ggtitle(paste(data$hybrid_name[1],"- Density curve",sep=""))+facet_wrap(~hybrid_name)+xlab("Harvest population Density (1K seeds/ha)")+ylab("Starch content (%)")+labs(title = paste(hybrid,";","Seasons=",summary_data$number_of_seasons,";","locations=",summary_data$number_of_locations,";","plots =", summary_data$number_of_plots,sep=" "))#+ggsave(paste("/mnt/results/density_curves_combined_data/starch_percent_density_curves//",hybrid, "_","Starch_content_percent_density_curve.pdf",sep=""))
print(plot_model_1)
}


all_parameters_df_starch_content = all_parameters_df

all_parameters_df_starch_content$crop = "Corn-Silage"
all_parameters_df_starch_content$hybrid_type = "PS4 Conventional-tall"
all_parameters_df_starch_content$trait = "starch_content_percent"


all_parameters_df_starch_yield_silage_final = rbind(all_parameters_df_starch_yield_silage,all_parameters_df_starch_content)


optimal_density_all = rbind(optimal_density_1_starch,optimal_density_1_silage)
#write_csv(optimal_density_all,"/mnt/results/curve_results_csv/Silage_and_Starch_yield_optimal_densities_by_Hybrid_per_YE.csv")

#write_csv(all_parameters_df_starch_yield_silage_final,"/mnt/results/curve_results_csv/yield_density_model_parameters_df_starch_yield_silage.csv")

#write_csv(silage_summary,"/mnt/results/curve_results_csv/MD_Trial_Data_Summaries_by_hybrid.csv")

flexibility_all = rbind(flexibility_df_starch_yield,flexibility_df_silage_yield)

#write_csv(flexibility_all,"/mnt/results/curve_results_csv/Silage_and_Starch_flexibility_predictions_by_Hybrid_per_YE.csv")
```

## quadratic model for starch content

```{r message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, echo=F}



starch_data=early_silage_2
starch_data = filter(starch_data, starch_content_percent!="NA")
starch_data = filter(starch_data, field_starch_content_percent_sd_filter=="FALSE")

starch_data_1 = filter(starch_data, max_dry_matter_yield_percent_flag=="FALSE")

starch_data_1 = filter(starch_data_1, field_dry_matter_yield_percent_sd_filter=="FALSE")

hybrids=unique(starch_data_1$hybrid_name)

names(starch_data_1)[17]="plant_density"

ggplot(starch_data_1,aes(starch_content_percent))+geom_histogram()

ggplot(starch_data_1,aes(x=NULL,starch_content_percent,color=actual_yield_level_1))+geom_boxplot()

ggplot(starch_data_1,aes(plant_density,starch_content_percent,color=actual_yield_level_1))+geom_point()+stat_smooth(method=lm)+xlab("HVPOP")

ggplot(starch_data_1,aes(plant_density,starch_content_percent,color=actual_yield_level_1))+geom_point()+geom_smooth(method="lm",formula = y ~ x + I(x^2))+xlab("HVPOP")
#starch_summary = starch_data_1 %>% group_by(hybrid_name) %>% summarise(num_seasons=length(unique(FIELD_year)), num_locations=length(unique(unique_location_name)), num_plots=length(unique(unique_plot_id)))

#EU3498,EU3497 ET3396

#Starch percent

add_Starch_percent_qc_flags_overall = function(summary.df){

  
summary.df = summary.df  %>% dplyr::mutate(mean_yield=mean(starch_content_percent,na.rm=T),
sd_yield = sd(starch_content_percent,na.rm=T))

summary.df = mutate(summary.df, yield_upper_sd_filter = mean_yield+3*sd_yield,yield_lower_sd_filter = mean_yield-3*sd_yield)

#summary.df = left_join(summary.df,mean_yield)

#yield_upper_sd_filter = mean_yield+3*sd_yield
#yield_lower_sd_filter = mean_yield-3*sd_yield

summary.df = summary.df %>% mutate(overall_starch_content_percent_sd_filter= ifelse(starch_content_percent >yield_upper_sd_filter,"TRUE",ifelse(starch_content_percent <yield_lower_sd_filter,"TRUE","FALSE")))

summary.df = summary.df %>% dplyr::select(-yield_upper_sd_filter,-yield_lower_sd_filter)

return(summary.df)
}

starch_data_1 = add_Starch_percent_qc_flags_overall(starch_data_1)

ggplot(starch_data_1,aes(plant_density,starch_content_percent,color=overall_starch_content_percent_sd_filter))+geom_point()+xlab("HVPOP")

starch_data_2 = filter(starch_data_1,overall_starch_content_percent_sd_filter=="FALSE")

#starch_content = filter(starch_data_2, hybrid_name%in% c("EW4048","EW3323"))

starch_content = filter(starch_data_2, hybrid_name%in% c("EW3323"))

#starch_content = filter(starch_data_4, hybrid_name%in% hybrids)

#model_lm = lm(starch_content_percent~dry_matter_yield_percent+plant_density+ I(mean_field_yield)+ I(mean_field_yield*plant_density),data=starch_content)
#summary(model_lm)
# 0.1979

#model_lm = lm(starch_content_percent~dry_matter_yield_percent+plant_density+mean_field_yield+ I(mean_field_yield*plant_density),data=starch_content)
#summary(model_lm)

#model_lm = lm(starch_content_percent~dry_matter_yield_percent+plant_density+ I(mean_field_yield),data=starch_content)
#summary(model_lm)

ggplot(starch_data_2,aes(starch_content_percent))+geom_histogram()+ggtitle("After removing overall SD filters")

ggplot(starch_data_2,aes(x=NULL,starch_content_percent,fill=as.factor(FIELD_year)))+geom_boxplot()

ggplot(starch_data_2,aes(plant_density,starch_content_percent,color=actual_yield_level_1))+geom_point()+geom_smooth(method="lm",formula = y ~ x + I(x^2))+xlab("HVPOP")

add_Starch_percent_qc_flags_by_year = function(summary.df){

  
summary.df = summary.df  %>% group_by(FIELD_year) %>% dplyr::mutate(mean_yield=mean(starch_content_percent,na.rm=T),
sd_yield = sd(starch_content_percent,na.rm=T))

summary.df = mutate(summary.df, yield_upper_sd_filter = mean_yield+3*sd_yield,yield_lower_sd_filter = mean_yield-3*sd_yield)

#summary.df = left_join(summary.df,mean_yield)

#yield_upper_sd_filter = mean_yield+3*sd_yield
#yield_lower_sd_filter = mean_yield-3*sd_yield

summary.df = summary.df %>% mutate(overall_starch_content_percent_sd_filter_by_year= ifelse(starch_content_percent >yield_upper_sd_filter,"TRUE",ifelse(starch_content_percent <yield_lower_sd_filter,"TRUE","FALSE")))

summary.df = summary.df %>% dplyr::select(-yield_upper_sd_filter,-yield_lower_sd_filter)

return(summary.df)
}

starch_data_3 = add_Starch_percent_qc_flags_by_year(starch_data_2)

ggplot(starch_data_3,aes(plant_density,starch_content_percent,color=overall_starch_content_percent_sd_filter_by_year))+geom_point()+xlab("HVPOP")

starch_data_4 = filter(starch_data_3,overall_starch_content_percent_sd_filter_by_year=="FALSE")

#ggplot(starch_data_2,aes(starch_content_percent))+geom_histogram()+ggtitle("After removing overall SD filters")

#ggplot(starch_data_4,aes(x=NULL,starch_content_percent,fill=as.factor(FIELD_year)))+geom_boxplot()+ggtitle("After removing by year SD filters")


ggplot(starch_data_4,aes(x=NULL,starch_content_percent,color=actual_yield_level_1))+geom_boxplot()

ggplot(starch_data_4,aes(plant_density,starch_content_percent,color=actual_yield_level_1))+geom_point()+stat_smooth(method=lm)+xlab("HVPOP")

ggplot(starch_data_4,aes(plant_density,starch_content_percent,color=actual_yield_level_1))+geom_point()+geom_smooth(method="lm",formula = y ~ x + I(x^2))+xlab("HVPOP")


hybrids = unique(starch_data_4$hybrid_name)

#starch_content = filter(starch_data_2, hybrid_name%in% c("EW4048","EW3323"))

starch_content = filter(starch_data_4, hybrid_name%in% hybrids)


ggplot(starch_content,aes(plant_density,starch_content_percent,color=as.factor(FIELD_year)))+geom_point()+stat_smooth(method=lm)+xlab("HVPOP")+facet_grid(~hybrid_name)

ggplot(starch_content,aes(plant_density,starch_content_percent))+geom_point()+stat_smooth(method=lm)+xlab("HVPOP")+facet_grid(~hybrid_name)

ggplot(starch_content,aes(plant_density,starch_content_percent,color=actual_yield_level_1))+geom_point()+xlab("HVPOP")+facet_grid(~hybrid_name)+geom_smooth(method="lm",formula = y ~ x + I(x^2))

#starch_content = filter(starch_data_4, hybrid_name%in% c("EW4048","EW3323"))

#starch_content = filter(starch_data_4, hybrid_name%in% c("EW3323"))

# include dry matter in the model

model_lm = lm(starch_content_percent~dry_matter_yield_percent+plant_density+ I(mean_field_yield)+ I(mean_field_yield*plant_density),data=starch_content)
summary(model_lm)
# 0.1979

model_lm = lm(starch_content_percent~dry_matter_yield_percent+plant_density+ I(mean_field_yield),data=starch_content)
summary(model_lm)
# 0.1979

# Slavko's ANOVA flag for starch content per hybrid

add_rep_level_anova_flag_for_starch_content_percent = function(silage_fresh_yield_3){
  
  anova_results = lm(starch_content_percent~location_rep+plant_density, data=silage_fresh_yield_3)

 Stud.Residual = abs(stats::rstudent(anova_results))
    #print(length(Stud.Residual))
  ## Appending DSR values to the existing table
    sr.df=as.data.frame(Stud.Residual)
    sr.df$row_number=rownames(sr.df)
    silage_fresh_yield_3$row_number=rownames(silage_fresh_yield_3)
    silage_fresh_yield_3 = silage_fresh_yield_3%>% left_join(sr.df)
    
    silage_fresh_yield_3 = silage_fresh_yield_3 %>% mutate(location_rep_anova_flag_starch_content=ifelse(Stud.Residual>=3, TRUE, FALSE))
    return(silage_fresh_yield_3)
}

all_hybrids= unique(starch_content$hybrid_name)
anova_flags_df=data.frame()

for (i in 1:length(all_hybrids)){
  print(all_hybrids[i])
  model_starch_content = filter(starch_content, hybrid_name==all_hybrids[i])
  starch_data_5 = add_rep_level_anova_flag_for_starch_content_percent(model_starch_content)
  print(dim(starch_data_5))
  anova_flags_df = bind_rows(anova_flags_df,starch_data_5)
}

#starch_data_5 = add_rep_level_anova_flag_for_starch_content_percent(starch_content)

#




ggplot(anova_flags_df,aes(plant_density,starch_content_percent,color=location_rep_anova_flag_starch_content))+geom_point()+xlab("HVPOP")

#hybrids = c("EW4048")

starch_content_1 = filter(anova_flags_df, hybrid_name%in% hybrids)

ggplot(starch_content_1,aes(plant_density,starch_content_percent,color=location_rep_anova_flag_starch_content))+geom_point()+xlab("HVPOP")+facet_grid(~hybrid_name)

starch_content_1 = filter(anova_flags_df, location_rep_anova_flag_starch_content == "FALSE" )

hybrids = c("EW3521")

starch_content_2 = filter(starch_content_1, hybrid_name%in% hybrids)

## Add the dry matter percent to the model
model_lm_1 = lm(starch_content_percent~plant_density+ I(mean_field_yield)+ I(mean_field_yield*plant_density),data=starch_content_2)
summary(model_lm_1)

model_lm_2 = lm(starch_content_percent~dry_matter_yield_percent+plant_density+ I(mean_field_yield)+ I(mean_field_yield*plant_density),data=starch_content_2)
summary(model_lm_2)

model_lm_3 = lm(starch_content_percent~dry_matter_yield_percent+plant_density+ I(mean_field_yield),data=starch_content_2)
summary(model_lm_3)

#starch_content_2 = filter(starch_content_1,location_rep_anova_flag_starch_content=="FALSE")

#ggplot(starch_content_1,aes(plant_density,starch_content_percent,color=as.factor(FIELD_year)))+geom_point()+stat_smooth(method=lm)+xlab("HVPOP")+facet_grid(~hybrid_name)

ggplot(starch_content_1,aes(plant_density,starch_content_percent))+geom_point()+stat_smooth(method=lm)+xlab("HVPOP")+facet_grid(~hybrid_name)

#ggplot(starch_content_1,aes(plant_density,starch_content_percent,color=as.factor(FIELD_year)))+geom_point()+stat_smooth(method=lm)+xlab("HVPOP")+facet_grid(~hybrid_name)

ggplot(starch_content_1,aes(plant_density,starch_content_percent,color=actual_yield_level_1))+geom_point()+xlab("HVPOP")+facet_grid(~hybrid_name)+geom_smooth(method="lm",formula = y ~ x)

ggplot(starch_content_1,aes(plant_density,starch_content_percent,color=actual_yield_level_1))+geom_point()+stat_smooth(method=lm)+xlab("HVPOP")+facet_grid(~hybrid_name)

#ggplot(starch_content_1,aes(plant_density,starch_content_percent,color=actual_yield_level_1))+geom_point()+xlab("HVPOP")+facet_grid(~hybrid_name)+geom_smooth(method="lm",formula = y ~ x + I(x^2))

###model the starch content percent 

starch_content_summary = starch_content_1 %>% group_by(hybrid_name) %>% summarise(number_of_seasons = length(unique(FIELD_year)),
seasons = paste(sort(unique(FIELD_year)),collapse="; "),
number_of_locations = length(unique(unique_location_name)),
locations = paste(unique(unique_location_name), collapse="; "),
number_of_plots = length(unique(unique_plot_id)),
number_of_points = length(unique(unique_plot_id)))

hybrids=unique(starch_content_1$hybrid_name)


# Slavko's ANOVA flag for starch content per hybrid

add_model_flag_for_starch_content_percent = function(silage_fresh_yield_3){
  
  model_lm = lm(starch_content_percent~dry_matter_yield_percent+plant_density+ I(mean_field_yield)+ I(mean_field_yield*plant_density),data=silage_fresh_yield_3)

 Stud.Residual = abs(stats::rstudent(model_lm))
    #print(length(Stud.Residual))
  ## Appending DSR values to the existing table
    sr.df=as.data.frame(Stud.Residual)
    sr.df$row_number=rownames(sr.df)
    silage_fresh_yield_3$row_number=rownames(silage_fresh_yield_3)
    silage_fresh_yield_3 = silage_fresh_yield_3%>% left_join(sr.df)
    
    silage_fresh_yield_3 = silage_fresh_yield_3 %>% mutate(model_flag_starch_content=ifelse(Stud.Residual>2, TRUE, FALSE))
    return(silage_fresh_yield_3)
}

all_hybrids= unique(starch_content_1$hybrid_name)
anova_flags_df_1=data.frame()

for (i in 1:length(all_hybrids)){
  print(all_hybrids[i])
  model_starch_content = filter(starch_content_1, hybrid_name==all_hybrids[i])
  starch_data_6 = add_model_flag_for_starch_content_percent(model_starch_content)
  print(dim(starch_data_6))
  anova_flags_df_1 = bind_rows(anova_flags_df_1,starch_data_6)
}

#starch_data_5 = add_rep_level_anova_flag_for_starch_content_percent(starch_content)

#




ggplot(anova_flags_df_1,aes(plant_density,starch_content_percent,color=model_flag_starch_content))+geom_point()+xlab("HVPOP")

starch_content_model = filter(anova_flags_df_1, model_flag_starch_content == "FALSE" )

starch_content_summary = starch_content_model %>% group_by(hybrid_name) %>% summarise(number_of_seasons = length(unique(FIELD_year)),
seasons = paste(sort(unique(FIELD_year)),collapse="; "),
number_of_locations = length(unique(unique_location_name)),
locations = paste(unique(unique_location_name), collapse="; "),
number_of_plots = length(unique(unique_plot_id)),
number_of_points = length(unique(unique_plot_id)))

#EU3498,EU3497 ET3396

hybrids_subset=unique(starch_content_model$hybrid_name)
#EU3311
#hybrids_subset=hybrids[c(11)]
all_parameters_df=data.frame()
for (i in 1:length(hybrids_subset)){
print(hybrids_subset[i])
early_silage_2_1 = filter(starch_content_model, hybrid_name==hybrids_subset[i])

names(starch_content_1)[17]="plant_density"


number_of_seasons = length(unique(early_silage_2_1$FIELD_year))
seasons = paste(sort(unique(early_silage_2_1$FIELD_year)),collapse="; ")
```
