```{r message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, echo=F}
number_of_locations = length(unique(early_silage_2_1$unique_location_name))
number_of_plots = length(unique(early_silage_2_1$unique_plot_id))
number_of_points = length(unique(early_silage_2_1$unique_plot_id))

model_lm = lm(starch_content_percent~dry_matter_yield_percent+plant_density+ I(mean_field_yield)+ I(mean_field_yield*plant_density),data=early_silage_2_1)

parameters_reg = as.data.frame(t(summary(model_lm)$coefficients))
#lm_parameters = as.data.frame(t(summary(model_lm)$coefficients))
  a = parameters_reg$`(Intercept)`[1]
  b = parameters_reg$dry_matter_yield_percent[1]
  #c = parameters_reg$`I(plant_density^2)`[1]
  c = parameters_reg$`plant_density`[1]
  d = parameters_reg$`I(mean_field_yield)`[1]
 e = parameters_reg$`I(mean_field_yield * plant_density)`[1]
   pval_b = parameters_reg$dry_matter_yield_percent[4]
  #pval_c = parameters_reg$`I(plant_density^2)`[4]
  pval_c = parameters_reg$`plant_density`[4]
  pval_d = parameters_reg$`I(mean_field_yield)`[4]
  pval_e = parameters_reg$`I(mean_field_yield * plant_density)`[4]
#print(summary(model_lm))
print(summary(model_lm)$adj.r.squared)

#parameters_df = data.frame(hybrid_name=hybrids_subset[i],intercept=a, coeff_density=b, coeff_density_sqr=c,coeff_ye=d,coeff_ye_density=e,pvalue_density_coeff=pval_b,pvalue_density_sqr_coeff=pval_c,r_2=summary(model_lm)$r.squared,adj_r_2=summary(model_lm)$adj.r.squared, pvalue_ye=pval_d,pvalue_ye_density=pval_e)

parameters_df = data.frame(hybrid_name=hybrids_subset[i],intercept=a, coeff_dry_matter_yield_percent=b,                 coeff_plant_density=c,coeff_ye=d,coeff_ye_density=e,pvalue_dry_matter_yield_percent=pval_b,r_2=summary(model_lm)$r.squared,adj_r_2=summary(model_lm)$adj.r.squared, pvalue_plant_density=pval_c,pvalue_ye=pval_d,pvalue_ye_density=pval_e)

#parameters_df = data.frame(hybrid_name=hybrids_subset[i],intercept=a, coeff_density=b, coeff_ye=c,coeff_ye_density=d,pvalue_density_coeff=pval_b,r_2=summary(model_lm)$r.squared,adj_r_2=summary(model_lm)$adj.r.squared, pvalue_ye=pval_c,pvalue_ye_density=pval_d)

early_silage_2_1$predicted_df <- predict(model_lm, early_silage_2_1)

early_silage_2_1_1 = filter(early_silage_2_1, mean_field_yield == min(early_silage_2_1$mean_field_yield) | mean_field_yield == max(early_silage_2_1$mean_field_yield) | mean_field_yield == median(early_silage_2_1$mean_field_yield) )

# this is the predicted line of multiple linear regression
plot_model=ggplot(data = early_silage_2_1_1, aes(x = `HVPOP_Harvest Population_1000 Plants/Hectare`, y = silage_yield, fill=actual_yield_level_1)) + 
  geom_point(color='blue') +
  geom_line(color='red', aes(x=`HVPOP_Harvest Population_1000 Plants/Hectare`, y=predicted_df))#+facet_wrap(~actual_yield_level_1)
plot_model

# model_df = model_df %>% mutate(optimal_density = -coeff_density/(2*coeff_density_sqr),
#     yld_max = intercept + coeff_density*optimal_density + coeff_density_sqr*optimal_density^2,economic_density = (-1)*(coeff_density-0.023)/(2*coeff_density_sqr),yld_eco = intercept + coeff_density*economic_density + coeff_density_sqr*economic_density^2)
all_parameters_df = rbind(all_parameters_df,parameters_df)
}

all_parameters_df_high_r2 = filter(all_parameters_df,adj_r_2>=0.20)

#starch_content_model_hybrids = filter(starch_content_model,hybrid_name %in%  all_parameters_df_high_r2$hybrid_name)

#early_silage_2_1_summary = starch_content_model_hybrids %>% group_by(hybrid_name) %>% summarise(low_ye=12,low_mid_ye=15,mid_ye=18,mid_high_ye=21,high_ye=24)

early_silage_2_1_summary = starch_content_model %>% group_by(hybrid_name) %>% summarise(low_ye=12,low_mid_ye=15,mid_ye=18,mid_high_ye=21,high_ye=24)

lm_test_data= early_silage_2_1_summary%>% crossing(plant_density = seq(40,160,1))

lm_test_data$dry_matter_yield_percent= 34

lm_test_data_long = lm_test_data %>% gather(ye_level,mean_field_yield, 2:6)


#all_parameters_df_wrong_curves = filter(all_parameters_df,coeff_density_sqr>0)

#all_parameters_df_right_curves = filter(all_parameters_df,coeff_density_sqr<0)

lm_test_data_long = inner_join(lm_test_data_long,all_parameters_df)

#write_csv(all_parameters_df,"/mnt/results/silage_2023/starch_content_percent_summary.csv")

#lm_test_data_long$predicted_yield=predict(model_lm,lm_test_data_long)

lm_test_data_long = lm_test_data_long %>% mutate(predicted_yield=intercept+coeff_plant_density*plant_density+coeff_dry_matter_yield_percent*dry_matter_yield_percent+coeff_ye*mean_field_yield+coeff_ye_density*mean_field_yield*plant_density)


# lm_test_data_long = lm_test_data_long %>% mutate(optimal_density = -(coeff_density+mean_field_yield*coeff_ye_density)/(2*coeff_density_sqr),
#     yld_max = intercept + coeff_density*optimal_density + coeff_density_sqr*optimal_density^2+coeff_ye*mean_field_yield+coeff_ye_density*mean_field_yield*optimal_density,economic_density = (-1)*(coeff_density-0.023+mean_field_yield*coeff_ye_density)/(2*coeff_density_sqr),yld_eco = intercept + coeff_density*economic_density + coeff_density_sqr*economic_density^2+coeff_ye*mean_field_yield+coeff_ye_density*mean_field_yield*economic_density)

lm_test_data_long = lm_test_data_long %>% mutate(ye_level=ifelse(ye_level=="low_ye","1:Low YE (12 t/ha)",ifelse(ye_level=="low_mid_ye","2:Low mid YE (15 t/ha)",ifelse(ye_level=="mid_ye","3:Mid YE (18 t/ha)",ifelse(ye_level=="mid_high_ye","4:Mid high YE (21 t/ha)",ifelse(ye_level=="high_ye","5:High YE (24 t/ha)","NA"))))))



# optimal_density = unique(lm_test_data_long[,c(1,3,4,17,18)])
# names(optimal_density)[4] = "plant_density"
# names(optimal_density)[5] = "predicted_yield"
# optimal_density$density_type="Optimal density"
# 
# economic_density = unique(lm_test_data_long[,c(1,3,4,19,20)])
# names(economic_density)[4] = "plant_density"
# names(economic_density)[5] = "predicted_yield"
# economic_density$density_type="Slope constrained economic density"

#cost_economic_density = unique(lm_test_data_long[,c(1,3,4,24,25)])
#names(cost_economic_density)[4] = "plant_density"
#names(cost_economic_density)[5] = "predicted_yield"
#cost_economic_density$density_type="Seed cost constrained economic density"

hybrids = unique(lm_test_data_long$hybrid_name)

#hybrids =c("EW4048")
for (i in 1:length(hybrids)){

hybrid=hybrids[i]

#optimal_density_1 = rbind(optimal_density,economic_density)
#hybrid_name = "EW3415"
data = filter(lm_test_data_long, hybrid_name==hybrid)

data = filter(lm_test_data_long, hybrid_name==hybrid)
#opt_data = filter(optimal_density_1, hybrid_name=="EU3177")
summary_data= filter(starch_content_summary, hybrid_name==hybrid)


plot_model_1=ggplot(data, aes(x = plant_density, y = predicted_yield, color=ye_level)) +
  geom_line( aes(x=plant_density, y=predicted_yield,color=ye_level))+ggtitle(paste(data$hybrid_name[1],"- Density curve",sep=""))+facet_wrap(~hybrid_name)+xlab("Harvest population Density (1K seeds/ha)")+ylab("Starch content (%)")+labs(title = paste(hybrid,";","Seasons=",summary_data$number_of_seasons,";","locations=",summary_data$number_of_locations,";","plots =", summary_data$number_of_plots,";","Adj R2 = ",abs(round(data$adj_r_2[1],3)),sep=" "))+xlim(c(85,115))+ggsave(paste("/mnt/results/silage_2025_final/starch_yield/starch_percent/",hybrid, "_","Starch_content_percent_density_curve.pdf",sep=""), width = 25, height = 20, units = "cm")
print(plot_model_1)
}



```


```{r, eval=F}
#rep levelö ANOVAflag per YE per year

add_rep_level_anova_flag_for_starch_content_percent_per_YE = function(silage_fresh_yield_3){
  
  anova_results = lm(starch_content_percent~location_rep+plant_density+as.factor(actual_yield_level_1), data=silage_fresh_yield_3)

 Stud.Residual = abs(stats::rstudent(anova_results))
    #print(length(Stud.Residual))
  ## Appending DSR values to the existing table
    sr.df=as.data.frame(Stud.Residual)
    sr.df$row_number=rownames(sr.df)
    silage_fresh_yield_3$row_number=rownames(silage_fresh_yield_3)
    silage_fresh_yield_3 = silage_fresh_yield_3%>% left_join(sr.df)
    
    silage_fresh_yield_3 = silage_fresh_yield_3 %>% mutate(location_rep_anova_flag_starch_content_per_YE=ifelse(Stud.Residual>=1.5, TRUE, FALSE))
    return(silage_fresh_yield_3)
}

all_hybrids_1= unique(starch_content_1$hybrid_name)
anova_flags_df_1=data.frame()

for (i in 1:length(all_hybrids_1)){
  print(all_hybrids_1[i])
  model_starch_content = filter(starch_content_1, hybrid_name==all_hybrids[i])
  starch_data_6 = add_rep_level_anova_flag_for_starch_content_percent_per_YE(model_starch_content)
  print(dim(starch_data_6))
  anova_flags_df_1 = bind_rows(anova_flags_df_1,starch_data_6)
}

#starch_data_5 = add_rep_level_anova_flag_for_starch_content_percent(starch_content)

#starch_content_1 = filter(starch_data_5, hybrid_name%in% hybrids)

starch_content_2 = filter(anova_flags_df_1, location_rep_anova_flag_starch_content_per_YE == "FALSE" )


ggplot(starch_content_2,aes(plant_density,starch_content_percent,color=location_rep_anova_flag_starch_content))+geom_point()+xlab("HVPOP")+facet_grid(~hybrid_name)

#starch_content_2 = filter(starch_content_1,location_rep_anova_flag_starch_content=="FALSE")

#ggplot(starch_content_1,aes(plant_density,starch_content_percent,color=as.factor(FIELD_year)))+geom_point()+stat_smooth(method=lm)+xlab("HVPOP")+facet_grid(~hybrid_name)

ggplot(starch_content_2,aes(plant_density,starch_content_percent))+geom_point()+stat_smooth(method=lm)+xlab("HVPOP")+facet_grid(~hybrid_name)

#ggplot(starch_content_1,aes(plant_density,starch_content_percent,color=as.factor(FIELD_year)))+geom_point()+stat_smooth(method=lm)+xlab("HVPOP")+facet_grid(~hybrid_name)

ggplot(starch_content_2,aes(plant_density,starch_content_percent,color=actual_yield_level_1))+geom_point()+xlab("HVPOP")+facet_grid(~hybrid_name)+geom_smooth(method="lm",formula = y ~ x)

ggplot(starch_content_2,aes(plant_density,starch_content_percent,color=actual_yield_level_1))+geom_point()+stat_smooth(method=lm)+xlab("HVPOP")+facet_grid(~hybrid_name)


#to do:- overall sd filter

# stat_cor(label.y = 4.4) +
#stat_regline_equation(label.y = 4.2)

ggplot(starch_content_2,aes(plant_density,starch_content_percent,color=actual_yield_level_1))+geom_point()+stat_smooth(method=lm)+xlab("HVPOP")+facet_grid(~hybrid_name)

ggplot(starch_content_2,aes(plant_density,starch_content_percent,color=actual_yield_level_1))+geom_point()+xlab("HVPOP")+facet_grid(~hybrid_name)+geom_smooth(method="lm",formula = y ~ x + I(x^2))

ggplot(starch_content_2,aes(log(plant_density),log(starch_content_percent),color=actual_yield_level_1))+geom_point()+xlab("log(HVPOP)")+facet_grid(~hybrid_name)+stat_smooth(method=lm)
#+geom_smooth(method="lm",formula = log(y) ~ log(x))

ggplot(starch_content_2,aes(plant_density,starch_content_percent,color=actual_yield_level_1))+geom_point()+stat_smooth(method=loess)+xlab("HVPOP")+facet_grid(~hybrid_name)


#EW3521
#"EV3322" "EW3323" "EW3414" "EW3521" "EW4048"
test_hybrid = filter(starch_content_2, hybrid_name=="EV3322")

model2 = lm(starch_content_percent~plant_density+ I(mean_field_yield)+as.factor(FIELD_year),data=test_hybrid)
summary(model2)

model2 = lm(starch_content_percent~plant_density+ as.factor(actual_yield_level_1),data=test_hybrid)
summary(model2)

full = lm(starch_content_percent~plant_density+I(plant_density^2)+ I(mean_field_yield)+ I(mean_field_yield*plant_density),data=test_hybrid)



model1 = lm(starch_content_percent~plant_density+ I(mean_field_yield)+ I(mean_field_yield*plant_density),data=test_hybrid)

#actual_yield_level_1 test

#early_silage_2_1_summary = early_silage_2 %>% group_by(hybrid_name) %>% summarise(low_ye=12,low_mid_ye=15,mid_ye=18,mid_high_ye=21,high_ye=24)

#test_hybrid = test_hybrid %>% mutate(ye_level=ifelse(ye_level=="low_ye","1:Low YE (12 t/ha)",ifelse(ye_level=="low_mid_ye","2:Low mid YE (15 t/ha)",ifelse(ye_level=="mid_ye","3:Mid YE (18 t/ha)",ifelse(ye_level=="mid_high_ye","4:Mid high YE (21 t/ha)",ifelse(ye_level=="high_ye","5:High YE (24 t/ha)","NA"))))))

#lm_test_data_long = lm_test_data_long %>% mutate(ye_level=ifelse(ye_level=="low_ye","1:Low YE (12 t/ha)",ifelse(ye_level=="low_mid_ye","2:Low mid YE (15 t/ha)",ifelse(ye_level=="mid_ye","3:Mid YE (18 t/ha)",ifelse(ye_level=="mid_high_ye","4:Mid high YE (21 t/ha)",ifelse(ye_level=="high_ye","5:High YE (24 t/ha)","NA"))))))

model2 = lm(starch_content_percent~plant_density+ as.factor(actual_yield_level_1),data=test_hybrid)



model3 = lm(starch_content_percent~ I(mean_field_yield)+ I(mean_field_yield*plant_density),data=test_hybrid)

model4 = lm(log(starch_content_percent)~log(plant_density),data=test_hybrid)

model4 = lm(log(starch_content_percent)~log(plant_density)+ log(mean_field_yield),data=test_hybrid)

model4 = lm(log(starch_content_percent)~ log(mean_field_yield),data=test_hybrid)

ggfortify:::autoplot.lm(model4)

model5 = lm(starch_content_percent~ plant_density+I(plant_density^2),data=starch_content)
#model1 <- lm(mpg ~ disp + hp + wt + qsec, data = mtcars)
#model2 <- lm(mpg ~ disp + qsec, data = mtcars)
#model3 <- lm(mpg ~ disp + wt, data = mtcars)

ols_mallows_cp(model1, full)
ols_mallows_cp(model2, full)
ols_mallows_cp(model3, full)
ols_mallows_cp(model4, full)
ols_mallows_cp(model5, full)


library(olsrr)

starch_content = starch_content %>% mutate(ye_level=ifelse(mean_field_yield<=12,"1:Low YE (12 t/ha)",ifelse(mean_field_yield>=21,"5:High YE (24 t/ha)",ifelse(mean_field_yield>12 & mean_field_yield<=15,"2:Low mid YE (15 t/ha)",ifelse(mean_field_yield>15 & mean_field_yield<=18,"3:Mid YE (18 t/ha)",ifelse(mean_field_yield>18 & mean_field_yield<=21,"4:Mid high YE (21 t/ha)","NA"))))))

#choose the density greater than 60
starch_content = filter(starch_content,plant_density>=60 )

ggplot(starch_content,aes(plant_density,starch_content_percent,color=ye_level))+geom_point()+stat_smooth(method=lm)+xlab("HVPOP")+facet_grid(~hybrid_name)

ggplot(starch_content,aes(plant_density,starch_content_percent,color=ye_level))+geom_point()+stat_smooth(method=loess)+xlab("HVPOP")+facet_grid(~hybrid_name)



#full <- lm(mpg ~ ., data = mtcars)

full = lm(starch_content_percent~plant_density+I(plant_density^2)+ I(mean_field_yield)+ I(mean_field_yield*plant_density),data=starch_content)

model1 = lm(starch_content_percent~plant_density+ I(mean_field_yield)+ I(mean_field_yield*plant_density),data=starch_content)

model2 = lm(starch_content_percent~plant_density+ I(mean_field_yield),data=starch_content)

 #autoplot(model2, which = 1:6, ncol = 3, label.size = 3)
ggfortify:::autoplot.lm(model2)

model3 = lm(starch_content_percent~ I(mean_field_yield)+ I(mean_field_yield*plant_density),data=starch_content)

model4 = lm(starch_content_percent~ I(mean_field_yield),data=starch_content)

ggfortify:::autoplot.lm(model4)

model5 = lm(starch_content_percent~ plant_density+I(plant_density^2),data=starch_content)
#model1 <- lm(mpg ~ disp + hp + wt + qsec, data = mtcars)
#model2 <- lm(mpg ~ disp + qsec, data = mtcars)
#model3 <- lm(mpg ~ disp + wt, data = mtcars)

ols_mallows_cp(model1, full)
ols_mallows_cp(model2, full)
ols_mallows_cp(model3, full)
ols_mallows_cp(model4, full)
ols_mallows_cp(model5, full)

ggplot(starch_content,aes(starch_content_percent))+geom_histogram()

ggplot(starch_content,aes(x=NULL,starch_content_percent,color=actual_yield_level_1))+geom_boxplot()

ggplot(starch_content,aes(plant_density,starch_content_percent,color=actual_yield_level_1))+geom_point()+stat_smooth(method=lm)+xlab("HVPOP")

ggplot(starch_content,aes(plant_density,starch_content_percent,color=actual_yield_level_1))+geom_point()+geom_smooth(method="lm",formula = y ~ x + I(x^2))+xlab("HVPOP")

# try a linear model

hybrids_subset=hybrids
#EU3311
#hybrids_subset=hybrids[c(11)]
all_parameters_df=data.frame()
for (i in 1:length(hybrids_subset)){
print(hybrids_subset[i])
early_silage_2_1 = filter(starch_content, hybrid_name==hybrids_subset[i])

names(early_silage_2_1)[17]="plant_density"


number_of_seasons = length(unique(early_silage_2_1$FIELD_year))
seasons = paste(sort(unique(early_silage_2_1$FIELD_year)),collapse="; ")
number_of_locations = length(unique(early_silage_2_1$unique_location_name))
number_of_plots = length(unique(early_silage_2_1$unique_plot_id))
number_of_points = length(unique(early_silage_2_1$unique_plot_id))

model_lm = lm(starch_content_percent~plant_density+ I(mean_field_yield)+ I(mean_field_yield*plant_density),data=early_silage_2_1)

parameters_reg = as.data.frame(t(summary(model_lm)$coefficients))
#lm_parameters = as.data.frame(t(summary(model_lm)$coefficients))
  a = parameters_reg$`(Intercept)`[1]
  b = parameters_reg$plant_density[1]
  #c = parameters_reg$`I(plant_density^2)`[1]
  c = parameters_reg$`I(mean_field_yield)`[1]
 d = parameters_reg$`I(mean_field_yield * plant_density)`[1]
   pval_b = parameters_reg$plant_density[4]
  #pval_c = parameters_reg$`I(plant_density^2)`[4]
  pval_c = parameters_reg$`I(mean_field_yield)`[4]
  pval_d = parameters_reg$`I(mean_field_yield * plant_density)`[4]
#print(summary(model_lm))
print(summary(model_lm)$adj.r.squared)

#parameters_df = data.frame(hybrid_name=hybrids_subset[i],intercept=a, coeff_density=b, coeff_density_sqr=c,coeff_ye=d,coeff_ye_density=e,pvalue_density_coeff=pval_b,pvalue_density_sqr_coeff=pval_c,r_2=summary(model_lm)$r.squared,adj_r_2=summary(model_lm)$adj.r.squared, pvalue_ye=pval_d,pvalue_ye_density=pval_e)

parameters_df = data.frame(hybrid_name=hybrids_subset[i],intercept=a, coeff_density=b, coeff_density_sqr=NA,coeff_ye=c,coeff_ye_density=d,pvalue_density_coeff=pval_b,pvalue_density_sqr_coeff=NA,r_2=summary(model_lm)$r.squared,adj_r_2=summary(model_lm)$adj.r.squared, pvalue_ye=pval_c,pvalue_ye_density=pval_d)

#parameters_df = data.frame(hybrid_name=hybrids_subset[i],intercept=a, coeff_density=b, coeff_ye=c,coeff_ye_density=d,pvalue_density_coeff=pval_b,r_2=summary(model_lm)$r.squared,adj_r_2=summary(model_lm)$adj.r.squared, pvalue_ye=pval_c,pvalue_ye_density=pval_d)

early_silage_2_1$predicted_df <- predict(model_lm, early_silage_2_1)

early_silage_2_1_1 = filter(early_silage_2_1, mean_field_yield == min(early_silage_2_1$mean_field_yield) | mean_field_yield == max(early_silage_2_1$mean_field_yield) | mean_field_yield == median(early_silage_2_1$mean_field_yield) )

# this is the predicted line of multiple linear regression
plot_model=ggplot(data = early_silage_2_1_1, aes(x = `HVPOP_Harvest Population_1000 Plants/Hectare`, y = silage_yield, fill=actual_yield_level_1)) + 
  geom_point(color='blue') +
  geom_line(color='red', aes(x=`HVPOP_Harvest Population_1000 Plants/Hectare`, y=predicted_df))#+facet_wrap(~actual_yield_level_1)
plot_model

# model_df = model_df %>% mutate(optimal_density = -coeff_density/(2*coeff_density_sqr),
#     yld_max = intercept + coeff_density*optimal_density + coeff_density_sqr*optimal_density^2,economic_density = (-1)*(coeff_density-0.023)/(2*coeff_density_sqr),yld_eco = intercept + coeff_density*economic_density + coeff_density_sqr*economic_density^2)
all_parameters_df = rbind(all_parameters_df,parameters_df)
}

early_silage_2_1_summary = early_silage_2 %>% group_by(hybrid_name) %>% summarise(low_ye=12,low_mid_ye=15,mid_ye=18,mid_high_ye=21,high_ye=24)

lm_test_data= early_silage_2_1_summary%>% crossing(plant_density = seq(40,160,1))
lm_test_data_long = lm_test_data %>% gather(ye_level,mean_field_yield, 2:6)


#all_parameters_df_wrong_curves = filter(all_parameters_df,coeff_density_sqr>0)

#all_parameters_df_right_curves = filter(all_parameters_df,coeff_density_sqr<0)

lm_test_data_long = inner_join(lm_test_data_long,all_parameters_df)

#lm_test_data_long$predicted_yield=predict(model_lm,lm_test_data_long)

lm_test_data_long = lm_test_data_long %>% mutate(predicted_yield=intercept+coeff_density*plant_density+coeff_ye*mean_field_yield+coeff_ye_density*mean_field_yield*plant_density)


# lm_test_data_long = lm_test_data_long %>% mutate(optimal_density = -(coeff_density+mean_field_yield*coeff_ye_density)/(2*coeff_density_sqr),
#     yld_max = intercept + coeff_density*optimal_density + coeff_density_sqr*optimal_density^2+coeff_ye*mean_field_yield+coeff_ye_density*mean_field_yield*optimal_density,economic_density = (-1)*(coeff_density-0.023+mean_field_yield*coeff_ye_density)/(2*coeff_density_sqr),yld_eco = intercept + coeff_density*economic_density + coeff_density_sqr*economic_density^2+coeff_ye*mean_field_yield+coeff_ye_density*mean_field_yield*economic_density)

lm_test_data_long = lm_test_data_long %>% mutate(ye_level=ifelse(ye_level=="low_ye","1:Low YE (12 t/ha)",ifelse(ye_level=="low_mid_ye","2:Low mid YE (15 t/ha)",ifelse(ye_level=="mid_ye","3:Mid YE (18 t/ha)",ifelse(ye_level=="mid_high_ye","4:Mid high YE (21 t/ha)",ifelse(ye_level=="high_ye","5:High YE (24 t/ha)","NA"))))))



# optimal_density = unique(lm_test_data_long[,c(1,3,4,17,18)])
# names(optimal_density)[4] = "plant_density"
# names(optimal_density)[5] = "predicted_yield"
# optimal_density$density_type="Optimal density"
# 
# economic_density = unique(lm_test_data_long[,c(1,3,4,19,20)])
# names(economic_density)[4] = "plant_density"
# names(economic_density)[5] = "predicted_yield"
# economic_density$density_type="Slope constrained economic density"

#cost_economic_density = unique(lm_test_data_long[,c(1,3,4,24,25)])
#names(cost_economic_density)[4] = "plant_density"
#names(cost_economic_density)[5] = "predicted_yield"
#cost_economic_density$density_type="Seed cost constrained economic density"

hybrids = unique(lm_test_data_long$hybrid_name)
for (i in 1:length(hybrids)){

hybrid=hybrids[i]

#optimal_density_1 = rbind(optimal_density,economic_density)
#hybrid_name = "EW3415"
data = filter(lm_test_data_long, hybrid_name==hybrid)
#opt_data = filter(optimal_density_1, hybrid_name=="EU3177")
summary_data= filter(silage_summary, hybrid_name==hybrid)


plot_model_1=ggplot(data, aes(x = plant_density, y = predicted_yield, color=ye_level)) +
  geom_line( aes(x=plant_density, y=predicted_yield,color=ye_level))+ggtitle(paste(hybrid,"- Density curve",sep=""))+facet_wrap(~hybrid_name)+xlab("Harvest population Density (1K seeds/ha)")+ylab("Starch content (%)")+labs(title = paste(hybrid,";","Seasons=",summary_data$number_of_seasons,";","locations=",summary_data$number_of_locations,";","plots =", summary_data$number_of_plots,";","Adj R2 = ",round(data$adj_r_2[1],3),sep=" "))+ggsave(paste("/mnt/results/density_curves_priorities_2023/",hybrid, "_","Starch_content_percent_density_curve.pdf",sep=""), width = 25, height = 20, units = "cm")
print(plot_model_1)
}




hybrids_subset=hybrids

# test a simpler model (density + YE)
#all_parameters_df=data.frame()
for (i in 1:length(hybrids_subset)){
print(hybrids_subset[i])
early_silage_2_1 = filter(starch_content, hybrid_name==hybrids_subset[i])

names(early_silage_2_1)[17]="plant_density"
number_of_seasons = length(unique(early_silage_2_1$FIELD_year))
seasons = paste(sort(unique(early_silage_2_1$FIELD_year)),collapse="; ")
number_of_locations = length(unique(early_silage_2_1$unique_location_name))
number_of_plots = length(unique(early_silage_2_1$unique_plot_id))
number_of_points = length(unique(early_silage_2_1$unique_plot_id))

model_lm = lm(starch_content_percent~plant_density+ I(mean_field_yield)+ I(mean_field_yield*plant_density),data=early_silage_2_1)

parameters_reg = as.data.frame(t(summary(model_lm)$coefficients))
#lm_parameters = as.data.frame(t(summary(model_lm)$coefficients))
  #pval_e = parameters_reg$`I(mean_field_yield * plant_density)`[4]
#print(summary(model_lm))
print(summary(model_lm)$adj.r.squared)
print(summary(model_lm))


}

#EU3311
#hybrids_subset=hybrids[c(11)]
all_parameters_df=data.frame()
for (i in 1:length(hybrids_subset)){
print(hybrids_subset[i])
early_silage_2_1 = filter(starch_data_1, hybrid_name==hybrids_subset[i])

names(early_silage_2_1)[17]="plant_density"
number_of_seasons = length(unique(early_silage_2_1$FIELD_year))
seasons = paste(sort(unique(early_silage_2_1$FIELD_year)),collapse="; ")
number_of_locations = length(unique(early_silage_2_1$unique_location_name))
number_of_plots = length(unique(early_silage_2_1$unique_plot_id))
number_of_points = length(unique(early_silage_2_1$unique_plot_id))

model_lm = lm(starch_content_percent~plant_density+ I(plant_density^2)+ I(mean_field_yield)+ I(mean_field_yield*plant_density),data=early_silage_2_1)

parameters_reg = as.data.frame(t(summary(model_lm)$coefficients))
#lm_parameters = as.data.frame(t(summary(model_lm)$coefficients))
  a = parameters_reg$`(Intercept)`[1]
  b = parameters_reg$plant_density[1]
  c = parameters_reg$`I(plant_density^2)`[1]
  d = parameters_reg$`I(mean_field_yield)`[1]
 e = parameters_reg$`I(mean_field_yield * plant_density)`[1]
   pval_b = parameters_reg$plant_density[4]
  pval_c = parameters_reg$`I(plant_density^2)`[4]
  pval_d = parameters_reg$`I(mean_field_yield)`[4]
  pval_e = parameters_reg$`I(mean_field_yield * plant_density)`[4]
#print(summary(model_lm))
print(summary(model_lm)$adj.r.squared)

parameters_df = data.frame(hybrid_name=hybrids_subset[i],intercept=a, coeff_density=b, coeff_density_sqr=c,coeff_ye=d,coeff_ye_density=e,pvalue_density_coeff=pval_b,pvalue_density_sqr_coeff=pval_c,r_2=summary(model_lm)$r.squared,adj_r_2=summary(model_lm)$adj.r.squared, pvalue_ye=pval_d,pvalue_ye_density=pval_e)

early_silage_2_1$predicted_df <- predict(model_lm, early_silage_2_1)

early_silage_2_1_1 = filter(early_silage_2_1, mean_field_yield == min(early_silage_2_1$mean_field_yield) | mean_field_yield == max(early_silage_2_1$mean_field_yield) | mean_field_yield == median(early_silage_2_1$mean_field_yield) )

# this is the predicted line of multiple linear regression
plot_model=ggplot(data = early_silage_2_1_1, aes(x = `HVPOP_Harvest Population_1000 Plants/Hectare`, y = silage_yield, fill=actual_yield_level_1)) + 
  geom_point(color='blue') +
  geom_line(color='red', aes(x=`HVPOP_Harvest Population_1000 Plants/Hectare`, y=predicted_df))#+facet_wrap(~actual_yield_level_1)
plot_model

# model_df = model_df %>% mutate(optimal_density = -coeff_density/(2*coeff_density_sqr),
#     yld_max = intercept + coeff_density*optimal_density + coeff_density_sqr*optimal_density^2,economic_density = (-1)*(coeff_density-0.023)/(2*coeff_density_sqr),yld_eco = intercept + coeff_density*economic_density + coeff_density_sqr*economic_density^2)
all_parameters_df = rbind(all_parameters_df,parameters_df)
}

#early_silage_2_1_summary = early_silage_2 %>% group_by(hybrid_name) %>% summarise(min_ye=min(mean_field_yield),max_ye=max(mean_field_yield), median_ye=median(mean_field_yield))

early_silage_2_1_summary = early_silage_2 %>% group_by(hybrid_name) %>% summarise(low_ye=12,low_mid_ye=15,mid_ye=18,mid_high_ye=21,high_ye=24)

lm_test_data= early_silage_2_1_summary%>% crossing(plant_density = seq(40,160,1))
lm_test_data_long = lm_test_data %>% gather(ye_level,mean_field_yield, 2:6)


all_parameters_df_wrong_curves = filter(all_parameters_df,coeff_density_sqr>0)

all_parameters_df_right_curves = filter(all_parameters_df,coeff_density_sqr<0)

lm_test_data_long = inner_join(lm_test_data_long,all_parameters_df_right_curves)

#lm_test_data_long$predicted_yield=predict(model_lm,lm_test_data_long)

lm_test_data_long = lm_test_data_long %>% mutate(predicted_yield=intercept+coeff_density*plant_density+coeff_density_sqr*plant_density*plant_density+coeff_ye*mean_field_yield+coeff_ye_density*mean_field_yield*plant_density)


lm_test_data_long = lm_test_data_long %>% mutate(optimal_density = -(coeff_density+mean_field_yield*coeff_ye_density)/(2*coeff_density_sqr),
    yld_max = intercept + coeff_density*optimal_density + coeff_density_sqr*optimal_density^2+coeff_ye*mean_field_yield+coeff_ye_density*mean_field_yield*optimal_density,economic_density = (-1)*(coeff_density-0.023+mean_field_yield*coeff_ye_density)/(2*coeff_density_sqr),yld_eco = intercept + coeff_density*economic_density + coeff_density_sqr*economic_density^2+coeff_ye*mean_field_yield+coeff_ye_density*mean_field_yield*economic_density)

lm_test_data_long = lm_test_data_long %>% mutate(ye_level=ifelse(ye_level=="low_ye","1:Low YE (12 t/ha)",ifelse(ye_level=="low_mid_ye","2:Low mid YE (15 t/ha)",ifelse(ye_level=="mid_ye","3:Mid YE (18 t/ha)",ifelse(ye_level=="mid_high_ye","4:Mid high YE (21 t/ha)",ifelse(ye_level=="high_ye","5:High YE (24 t/ha)","NA"))))))



optimal_density = unique(lm_test_data_long[,c(1,3,17,18)])
names(optimal_density)[3] = "plant_density"
names(optimal_density)[4] = "predicted_yield"
optimal_density$density_type="Optimal density"

economic_density = unique(lm_test_data_long[,c(1,3,19,20)])
names(economic_density)[3] = "plant_density"
names(economic_density)[4] = "predicted_yield"
economic_density$density_type="Slope constrained economic density"

#cost_economic_density = unique(lm_test_data_long[,c(1,3,4,24,25)])
#names(cost_economic_density)[4] = "plant_density"
#names(cost_economic_density)[5] = "predicted_yield"
#cost_economic_density$density_type="Seed cost constrained economic density"

optimal_density_1 = rbind(optimal_density,economic_density)

hybrids = unique(lm_test_data_long$hybrid_name)

for (i in 1:length(hybrids))
{

hybrid=hybrids[i]

data = filter(lm_test_data_long, hybrid_name==hybrid)
opt_data = filter(optimal_density_1, hybrid_name==hybrid)

summary_data= filter(silage_summary, hybrid_name==hybrid)

plot_model_1=ggplot(data, aes(x = plant_density, y = predicted_yield, color=ye_level)) +
  geom_line( aes(x=plant_density, y=predicted_yield,color=ye_level))+ggtitle(paste(data$hybrid_name[1],"- Density curve",sep=""))+facet_wrap(~hybrid_name)+geom_point(data=opt_data,aes(x=plant_density,y=predicted_yield,shape=density_type),size=3)+xlab("Harvest population Density (1K seeds/ha)")+ylab("Starch Yield (t/ha)")+labs(title = paste(hybrid,";","Seasons=",summary_data$num_seasons,";","locations=",summary_data$num_locations,";","plots =", summary_data$num_plots,";","Adj R2 = ",round(data$adj_r_2[1],3),sep=" "))
#+ggsave(paste("/mnt/results/density_curves_combined_data/starch_content_percent_quadraric_density_curves/",hybrid, "_","Starch_density_curve.pdf",sep=""))#+facet_wrap(~actual_yield_level_1)#+
  #geom_point(data=highlight_df,
             #aes(x=lifeExp,y=gdpPercap, color=country),size=3)
print(plot_model_1)
}

hybrid="DKC3414"

data = filter(lm_test_data_long, hybrid_name==hybrid)
opt_data = filter(optimal_density_1, hybrid_name==hybrid)

summary_data= filter(silage_summary, hybrid_name==hybrid)

plot_model_1=ggplot(data, aes(x = plant_density, y = predicted_yield, color=ye_level)) +
  geom_line( aes(x=plant_density, y=predicted_yield,color=ye_level))+ggtitle(paste(data$hybrid_name[1],"- Density curve",sep=""))+facet_wrap(~hybrid_name)+geom_point(data=opt_data,aes(x=plant_density,y=predicted_yield,shape=density_type),size=3)+xlab("Harvest population Density (1K seeds/ha)")+ylab("Starch Yield (t/ha)")+labs(title = paste( hybrid,";","Seasons=",summary_data$number_of_seasons,";","locations=",summary_data$number_of_locations,";","plots =", summary_data$number_of_plots,";","Adj R2 = ",round(data$adj_r_2[1],3),sep=" "))#+ggsave(paste("/mnt/results/density_curves/",hybrid, "_","Starch_density_curve.pdf",sep=""))

#+facet_wrap(~actual_yield_level_1)#+
  #geom_point(data=highlight_df,
             #aes(x=lifeExp,y=gdpPercap, color=country),size=3)
print(plot_model_1)

# optimal_density_1_3414_3418 = filter(optimal_density_1, hybrid_name %in% c("DKC3414","DKC3418"))
# 
# 
# optimal_density_1_starch = optimal_density_1
# optimal_density_1_starch$crop = "Corn-Silage"
# optimal_density_1_starch$hybrid_type = "PS4 Conventional-tall"
# optimal_density_1_starch$trait = "starch_yield"
# 
# 
# all_parameters_df_starch_yield = all_parameters_df
# 
# all_parameters_df_starch_yield$crop = "Corn-Silage"
# all_parameters_df_starch_yield$hybrid_type = "PS4 Conventional-tall"
# all_parameters_df_starch_yield$trait = "starch_yield"
# 
# 
# all_parameters_df_starch_yield_silage = rbind(all_parameters_df_starch_yield,all_parameters_df_silage_yield)
# 
# 
# 
# lm_test_data_long_starch = lm_test_data_long

```


# Final density recommendation combining silage and starch yield

```{r message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, echo=F}
library(readr)
library(tidyr)
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
optimal_density_final = read_csv("/mnt/results/curve_results_csv/Silage_and_Starch_yield_optimal_densities_by_Hybrid_per_YE.csv")

flexibility = read_csv("/mnt/results/curve_results_csv/Silage_and_Starch_flexibility_predictions_by_Hybrid_per_YE.csv")

model_para = read_csv("/mnt/results/curve_results_csv/yield_density_model_parameters_df_starch_yield_silage.csv")

silage_summary = read_csv("/mnt/results/curve_results_csv/MD_Trial_Data_Summaries_by_hybrid.csv")


optimal_density_final_1 = optimal_density_final %>% unite(ye_level_optimal_trait, ye_level, trait,density_type, sep="__", remove=F)

optimal_density_final_1 = optimal_density_final %>% unite(optimal_trait,trait,density_type, sep="__", remove=F)

optimal_density_final_2 = filter(optimal_density_final_1,optimal_trait %in% c("starch_yield__Optimal density","silage_yield__Slope constrained economic density") )

#Method 1:- Mean of optimal starch density and eco densiy for silage yield
optimal_density_final_2_method_1 = optimal_density_final_2 %>% group_by(crop,hybrid_type,hybrid_name,ye_level) %>% summarise(density_recommendation_method_1_raw = mean(plant_density,na.rm=T))

optimal_density_final_2_method_1 = optimal_density_final_2_method_1 %>% mutate(density_recommendation_method_1_adjusted = ifelse(density_recommendation_method_1_raw >=120, 120,density_recommendation_method_1_raw ))

#silage yield max and starch yield max, r2 and confidence levels

model_parameters = model_para[,c(1,15,10,7,8,11,12)]
model_parameters_silage_starch = filter(model_parameters, !trait %in% c("starch_content_percent"))

model_parameters_silage_starch = model_parameters_silage_starch %>% group_by(hybrid_name) %>% summarise(mean_adj_r2=mean(adj_r_2, na.rm=T))
optimal_density_final_2_method_1 = inner_join(optimal_density_final_2_method_1,model_parameters_silage_starch)

silage_summary = silage_summary %>% inner_join(optimal_density_final_2_method_1)

silage_summary_method_1 = silage_summary %>% mutate(two_seasons_tested = ifelse(number_of_seasons>1, "TRUE", "FALSE"), atleast_ten_locations_tested= ifelse(number_of_locations>=10, "TRUE", "FALSE"),atleast_five_locations_tested= ifelse(number_of_locations>=5, "TRUE", "FALSE"),atleast_three_locations_tested= ifelse(number_of_locations>=3, "TRUE", "FALSE"))

silage_summary_method_1 = silage_summary_method_1 %>% mutate(r2_atleast_0.8 = ifelse(mean_adj_r2>=0.8, "TRUE", "FALSE"), r2_atleast_0.6= ifelse(mean_adj_r2>=0.6, "TRUE", "FALSE"),r2_atleast_0.4= ifelse(mean_adj_r2>=0.4, "TRUE", "FALSE"),r2_atleast_0.2= ifelse(mean_adj_r2>=0.2, "TRUE", "FALSE"))

#defining confidence levels for hybrids tested for 2 seasons
silage_summary_method_1 = silage_summary_method_1 %>% mutate(confidence_level_overall = (ifelse(two_seasons_tested=="TRUE" & atleast_ten_locations_tested == "TRUE" & r2_atleast_0.8 == "TRUE", "Very high",ifelse(two_seasons_tested=="TRUE" & atleast_ten_locations_tested == "TRUE" & r2_atleast_0.8 == "FALSE" & r2_atleast_0.6 == "TRUE", "High",ifelse(two_seasons_tested=="TRUE" & atleast_ten_locations_tested == "TRUE" & r2_atleast_0.8 == "FALSE" & r2_atleast_0.6 == "FALSE" & r2_atleast_0.4 == "TRUE" , "Medium",ifelse(two_seasons_tested=="TRUE" & atleast_ten_locations_tested == "TRUE" & r2_atleast_0.8 == "FALSE" & r2_atleast_0.6 == "FALSE" & r2_atleast_0.4 == "FALSE" & r2_atleast_0.2 == "TRUE" , "Low","NA"))))))

#defining confidence levels for hybrids tested for 1 season
silage_summary_method_1 = silage_summary_method_1 %>% mutate(confidence_level_overall = (ifelse(two_seasons_tested=="FALSE" & atleast_five_locations_tested == "TRUE" & r2_atleast_0.6 == "TRUE", "Medium",ifelse(two_seasons_tested=="FALSE" & atleast_five_locations_tested == "FALSE" & atleast_three_locations_tested == "TRUE" & r2_atleast_0.6 == "FALSE" & r2_atleast_0.4 == "TRUE", "Low",ifelse(two_seasons_tested=="FALSE" & atleast_three_locations_tested == "FALSE" & r2_atleast_0.8 == "FALSE" & r2_atleast_0.6 == "FALSE" & r2_atleast_0.4 == "FALSE" , "Very Low",confidence_level_overall)))))



write_csv(optimal_density_final_2_method_1, "/mnt/results/curve_results_csv/final_density_recommendation_method1_average.csv")
















#Method 2:- Laurent's algorithm
#Too much yield loss (or) starch content doesnt change much  2 reasons why the optimum density woudl be same as silage yield density optimum
#starch content percent :- threshold of atleast 0.5% 
#silage yield <= 0.5 t/ha
#Mixed product :- recommendation should not change much (silage yield, fxed ears, increasing density will not change the starch much) DKC3414, DKC3218, EW3414
#Pure silage product :- recommendation may change (silage yield, flex ears, increasing density will likely change the Starch much) EW3724, EW4048, EW3521
library(readr)
library(dplyr)

silage_parameters = read_csv("/mnt/results/silage_2023/silage_summary.csv")

silage_optimum = read_csv("/mnt/results/silage_2023/optimal_density.csv")

starch_content = read_csv("/mnt/results/silage_2023/starch_content_percent_summary.csv")

starch_content$crop = "Corn-Silage"

ssc_hybrids = c("EW6015XKL1","EW6436XKL1","EW6846XKL1","EW6846XKLZ","EW6015XKLZ","EW6436XKLZ")

starch_content = starch_content %>% mutate(hybrid_type = ifelse(hybrid_name %in% ssc_hybrids, "Smart corn", "Tall hybrid"))


#points_data_pmt2_with_ye_for_instinct_summary$hybrid_type = "PS4 Conventional-tall"
starch_content$trait = "starch_content_percent"
starch_content$trial_type = "Small plot DIT trials"
starch_content$region = "EME"

#write_csv(starch_content, "/mnt/results/density_curves_combined_data/starch_content_percent/model_results_for_starch_content_silage_for_instinct.csv")

#model_parameters = read_csv("/mnt/results/curve_results_csv/yield_density_model_parameters_df_starch_yield_silage.csv")

#hybrids = unique(optimal_density_final_1$hybrid_name)

#hybrids = c("DKC3218","DKC3414","EW3414","EW4048","EW3521","DKC3418","EW3323","EV3322")
hybrids=unique(starch_content$hybrid_name)

#hybrids = c("DKC3414")
final_recommendation_df=data.frame()
for (i in 1:length(hybrids)){
 #i=1
  hybrid_1 = hybrids[i]
  opt = filter(silage_optimum, hybrid_name==hybrid_1)
  ye_levels_all = unique(opt$ye_level)
  model_parameters_ye_yield_all = data.frame()
  for (j in 1:length(ye_levels_all)){
    #j=1
    #j=1
    ye_levels_sub = ye_levels_all[j]
    opt_ye= filter(opt,ye_level==ye_levels_sub)
    opt_ye = opt_ye %>% mutate(ye = ifelse(ye_level == "1:Low YE (12 t/ha)" ,12,ifelse(ye_level == "2:Low mid YE (15 t/ha)",15,ifelse(ye_level == "3:Mid YE (18 t/ha)",18,ifelse(ye_level =="4:Mid high YE (21 t/ha)",21,ifelse(ye_level =="5:High YE (24 t/ha)",24,NA))))))
    opt_ye = opt_ye %>% filter(density_type=="Seed cost constrained economic density")
    #silage_yield__Slope constrained economic density
    
    model_parameters_ye_starch = filter(starch_content,hybrid_name==hybrid_1)
    #model_parameters_ye_starch = filter(model_parameters_ye, trait == "starch_content_percent")
    model_parameters_ye_starch$mean_field_yield = opt_ye$ye[1]
    model_parameters_ye_starch$plant_density = opt_ye$plant_density[1]
    dry_matter_yield_percent=34
    model_parameters_ye_starch = model_parameters_ye_starch %>% mutate(predicted_starch_content=intercept+coeff_plant_density*plant_density+coeff_dry_matter_yield_percent*dry_matter_yield_percent+coeff_ye*mean_field_yield+coeff_ye_density*mean_field_yield*plant_density,                                                              threshold_starch_percent_upper_limit=predicted_starch_content+0.5, density_to_starch_upper_threshold=(threshold_starch_percent_upper_limit-(coeff_ye*mean_field_yield)-(coeff_dry_matter_yield_percent*dry_matter_yield_percent)-intercept)/(coeff_plant_density+(coeff_ye_density*mean_field_yield)),threshold_starch_percent_lower_limit=predicted_starch_content-0.5, density_to_starch_lower_threshold=(threshold_starch_percent_lower_limit-(coeff_ye*mean_field_yield)-(coeff_dry_matter_yield_percent*dry_matter_yield_percent)-intercept)/(coeff_plant_density+(coeff_ye_density*mean_field_yield)))
    
     #model_parameters_ye = filter(starch_content,hybrid_name==hybrid_1)
    model_parameters_ye_yield = filter(silage_parameters, hybrid_name==hybrid_1)
    model_parameters_ye_yield$mean_field_yield = model_parameters_ye_starch$mean_field_yield
    
    model_parameters_ye_yield$eco_density = model_parameters_ye_starch$plant_density
    
     model_parameters_ye_yield$predicted_starch_content = model_parameters_ye_starch$predicted_starch_content
     
     model_parameters_ye_yield$threshold_starch_percent_upper_limit = model_parameters_ye_starch$threshold_starch_percent_upper_limit
     
      model_parameters_ye_yield$threshold_starch_percent_lower_limit = model_parameters_ye_starch$threshold_starch_percent_lower_limit
     
     model_parameters_ye_yield$density_to_starch_upper_threshold = model_parameters_ye_starch$density_to_starch_upper_threshold
     
    model_parameters_ye_yield$density_to_starch_lower_threshold = model_parameters_ye_starch$density_to_starch_lower_threshold
    
    CP=100
   model_parameters_ye_yield = model_parameters_ye_yield %>% mutate(predicted_eco_yield=intercept+coeff_density*eco_density+coeff_density_sqr*eco_density*eco_density+coeff_ye*mean_field_yield+coeff_ye_density*mean_field_yield*eco_density,
                                                                    corrected_predicted_eco_yield=predicted_eco_yield-((eco_density*1000)*100/(50000*90)),
                                                                    predicted_upper_yield_limit=intercept+coeff_density*density_to_starch_upper_threshold+coeff_density_sqr*density_to_starch_upper_threshold*density_to_starch_upper_threshold+coeff_ye*mean_field_yield+coeff_ye_density*mean_field_yield*density_to_starch_upper_threshold,
                                                                    corrected_predicted_upper_yield_limit=predicted_upper_yield_limit-((density_to_starch_upper_threshold*1000)*100/(50000*90))  ,                                              predicted_lower_yield_limit=intercept+coeff_density*density_to_starch_lower_threshold+coeff_density_sqr*density_to_starch_lower_threshold*density_to_starch_lower_threshold+coeff_ye*mean_field_yield+coeff_ye_density*mean_field_yield*density_to_starch_lower_threshold,
                                                                    corrected_predicted_lower_yield_limit=predicted_lower_yield_limit-((density_to_starch_lower_threshold*1000)*100/(50000*90)),
                                                                    delta_yield_upper=corrected_predicted_upper_yield_limit-corrected_predicted_eco_yield,delta_yield_lower=corrected_predicted_lower_yield_limit-corrected_predicted_eco_yield)
   
   #add the density reco
   
   model_parameters_ye_yield = model_parameters_ye_yield%>% mutate(normal_eco_density_recommendation = eco_density, less_starch_density_recommendation = ifelse(abs(delta_yield_lower)>0.5,eco_density,density_to_starch_lower_threshold), more_starch_density_recommendation = ifelse(abs(delta_yield_upper)>0.5,eco_density,density_to_starch_upper_threshold))
   
   #final density reco
   
   
   model_parameters_ye_yield = model_parameters_ye_yield%>% mutate(final_normal_eco_density_recommendation = ifelse(eco_density>120, 120,eco_density) , final_less_starch_density_recommendation = ifelse(less_starch_density_recommendation>120, 120,less_starch_density_recommendation), final_more_starch_density_recommendation = ifelse(more_starch_density_recommendation>120, 120,more_starch_density_recommendation))
   
   
   model_parameters_ye_yield_all = rbind(model_parameters_ye_yield_all,model_parameters_ye_yield)
  }
  final_recommendation_df = rbind(final_recommendation_df,model_parameters_ye_yield_all)
}

write_csv(final_recommendation_df, "/mnt/results/density_curves_combined_data/starch_content_percent/final_density_recommendation_silage_detailed.csv")

library(tidyr)
#writing the final recommendations
final_recommendation_df_1 = unique(final_recommendation_df[,c(1,34,52:54)])

final_recommendation_df_1_long = final_recommendation_df_1 %>% gather(recommendation_type, final_density_recommendation, 3:5)

final_recommendation_df_1_long = final_recommendation_df_1_long %>% mutate(ye_level=ifelse(mean_field_yield==12,"1:Low YE (12 t/ha)",ifelse(mean_field_yield==15,"2:Low mid YE (15 t/ha)",ifelse(mean_field_yield==18,"3:Mid YE (18 t/ha)",ifelse(mean_field_yield==21,"4:Mid high YE (21 t/ha)",ifelse(mean_field_yield==24,"5:High YE (24 t/ha)","NA"))))))

final_recommendation_df_1_long$mean_field_yield = NULL

final_recommendation_df_1_long = final_recommendation_df_1_long[,c(1,4,2,3)]

final_recommendation_df_1_long = final_recommendation_df_1_long %>% mutate(recommendation_type = ifelse(recommendation_type == "final_normal_eco_density_recommendation","Silage yield max",ifelse(recommendation_type == "final_more_starch_density_recommendation","More Starch scenario","Less Starch scenario")))

final_recommendation_df_1_long$final_density_recommendation = round(final_recommendation_df_1_long$final_density_recommendation,3)

write_csv(final_recommendation_df_1_long, "/mnt/results/silage_2023/final_density_recommendation_silage_concise_for_instinct.csv")

write_csv(final_recommendation_df_1_long, "/mnt/results/silage_2023/final_density_recommendation_silage_concise.csv")
```


## Using a simple linear model against density to look for the slope/ rate of change

```{r message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, echo=F}

starch_data=early_silage_2
starch_data = filter(starch_data, starch_content_percent!="NA")
starch_data = filter(starch_data, field_starch_content_percent_sd_filter=="FALSE")

starch_data_1 = filter(starch_data, max_dry_matter_yield_percent_flag=="FALSE")

starch_data_1 = filter(starch_data_1, field_dry_matter_yield_percent_sd_filter=="FALSE")

hybrids=unique(starch_data_1$hybrid_name)

#EU3498,EU3497 ET3396

hybrids_subset=hybrids
#EU3311
#hybrids_subset=hybrids[c(11)]
all_parameters_df_linear=data.frame()
for (i in 1:length(hybrids_subset)){
print(hybrids_subset[i])
early_silage_2_1 = filter(starch_data_1, hybrid_name==hybrids_subset[i])

names(early_silage_2_1)[17]="plant_density"

model_lm = lm(starch_content_percent~plant_density,data=early_silage_2_1)

parameters_reg = as.data.frame(t(summary(model_lm)$coefficients))
#lm_parameters = as.data.frame(t(summary(model_lm)$coefficients))
  a = parameters_reg$`(Intercept)`[1]
  b = parameters_reg$plant_density[1]
  
   pval_b = parameters_reg$plant_density[4]
  
#print(summary(model_lm))
print(summary(model_lm)$adj.r.squared)

parameters_df = data.frame(hybrid_name=hybrids_subset[i],intercept=a, coeff_density=b, pvalue_density_coeff=pval_b,r_2=summary(model_lm)$r.squared,adj_r_2=summary(model_lm)$adj.r.squared)

early_silage_2_1$predicted_df <- predict(model_lm, early_silage_2_1)

early_silage_2_1_1 = filter(early_silage_2_1, mean_field_yield == min(early_silage_2_1$mean_field_yield) | mean_field_yield == max(early_silage_2_1$mean_field_yield) | mean_field_yield == median(early_silage_2_1$mean_field_yield) )

# this is the predicted line of multiple linear regression
plot_model=ggplot(data = early_silage_2_1_1, aes(x = `HVPOP_Harvest Population_1000 Plants/Hectare`, y = silage_yield, fill=actual_yield_level_1)) + 
  geom_point(color='blue') +
  geom_line(color='red', aes(x=`HVPOP_Harvest Population_1000 Plants/Hectare`, y=predicted_df))#+facet_wrap(~actual_yield_level_1)
plot_model

# model_df = model_df %>% mutate(optimal_density = -coeff_density/(2*coeff_density_sqr),
#     yld_max = intercept + coeff_density*optimal_density + coeff_density_sqr*optimal_density^2,economic_density = (-1)*(coeff_density-0.023)/(2*coeff_density_sqr),yld_eco = intercept + coeff_density*economic_density + coeff_density_sqr*economic_density^2)
all_parameters_df_linear = rbind(all_parameters_df_linear,parameters_df)
}

```





# Interaction between lodging and density per hybrid

```{r message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, echo=F}
#hybrid summary in terms of testing
hybrids_summary = complete_dataset_1 %>% group_by(hybrid_name) %>% summarise(number_of_countries_tested=length(unique(FIELD_Country)),number_of_seasons_tested=length(unique(FIELD_year)), number_of_locations_tested=length(unique(unique_location_name)))


two_seasons_tested_hybrids = filter(hybrids_summary, number_of_seasons_tested>1)

two_seasons_tested_hybrids_data = filter(complete_dataset_1,hybrid_name%in% two_seasons_tested_hybrids$hybrid_name)

# classify locations based on stalk and root lodging
lodging_type = two_seasons_tested_hybrids_data[,c(9,14,33,28)]
#lodging_type = mutate(lodging_type, total_lodging=`STLP_Percent Stalk Lodging_Percent`+`RTLP_Root Lodged Percent_Percent`)
lodging_type_summary = lodging_type %>% group_by(unique_location_name,FIELD_year) %>% summarise(stalk_lodging=mean(`STLP_Percent Stalk Lodging_Percent`, na.rm=T),root_lodging=mean(`RTLP_Root Lodged Percent_Percent`, na.rm=T),total_lodging=sum(stalk_lodging,root_lodging, na.rm=T))

lodging_type_summary_2020= filter(lodging_type_summary,FIELD_year==2020)

lodging_type_summary_2021= filter(lodging_type_summary,FIELD_year==2021)

lodging_type_summary_1 = lodging_type_summary %>%
    group_by(FIELD_year) %>%
    summarize(n_locations = n_distinct(unique_location_name), n_lodged_locations = sum(total_lodging > 0))

lodging_type_summary_2 = filter(lodging_type_summary,total_lodging>0)

#classify hybrids base don root and stalk lodging
hybrid_lodging_type = two_seasons_tested_hybrids_data[,c(112,9,14,67,33,28,83)]

hybrid_lodging_type = filter(two_seasons_tested_hybrids_data,unique_location_name %in% lodging_type_summary_2$unique_location_name)
#hybrid_lodging_type = mutate(hybrid_lodging_type, total_lodging=`STLP_Percent Stalk Lodging_Percent`+`RTLP_Root Lodged Percent_Percent`)
hybrid_lodging_type_summary = hybrid_lodging_type %>% group_by(hybrid_name,unique_location_name,FIELD_year,final_target_density) %>% summarise(stalk_lodging=mean(`STLP_Percent Stalk Lodging_Percent`, na.rm=T),root_lodging=mean(`RTLP_Root Lodged Percent_Percent`, na.rm=T),total_lodging=sum(stalk_lodging,root_lodging, na.rm=T))

hybrid_lodging_type_summary_1 = hybrid_lodging_type_summary %>%
   filter(total_lodging>0)

hybrid_lodging_type_summary_1$final_target_density = factor(hybrid_lodging_type_summary_1$final_target_density,levels = c("65", "80", "95", "110", "125","140"))

ggplot(hybrid_lodging_type_summary_1,aes(final_target_density,total_lodging))+geom_point()+geom_smooth(method="lm",formula = y ~ x + I(x^2))+facet_wrap(~hybrid_name)+ylab("Total lodging (Stalk + Root), %")

#ggplot(hybrid_lodging_type_summary_1,aes(as.integer(final_target_density),total_lodging))+geom_point()+geom_smooth(method="lm",formula = y ~ x + I(x^2))+facet_wrap(~hybrid_name)+ylab("Total lodging (Stalk + Root), %")

```

```{r message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, echo=F}
hybrids =  unique(hybrid_lodging_type_summary_1$hybrid_name)#[1:10]
 
#subset_data = filter(dit_data_after_qc_2,subset_data %in% hybrids)
 
lodging_df_1 = data.frame()
 
 
for(i in 1:length(hybrids)){
  g=hybrids[i]
  print(g)
  #parameters_df= data.frame()
  lodging_data <- dplyr::filter(hybrid_lodging_type_summary_1, hybrid_name == g)
  model_lm = lm(total_lodging~as.integer(final_target_density),data=lodging_data)
  print(summary(model_lm))

parameters_reg = as.data.frame(t(summary(model_lm)$coefficients))
#lm_parameters = as.data.frame(t(summary(model_lm)$coefficients))
  a = parameters_reg$`(Intercept)`[1]
  b = parameters_reg$`as.integer(final_target_density)`[1]
 #  c = parameters_reg$`I(plant_density^2)`[1]
 #  d = parameters_reg$`I(mean_field_yield)`[1]
 # e = parameters_reg$`I(mean_field_yield * plant_density)`[1]
    pval_b = parameters_reg$`as.integer(final_target_density)`[4]
 #  pval_c = parameters_reg$`I(plant_density^2)`[4]
 #  pval_d = parameters_reg$`I(mean_field_yield)`[4]
 #  pval_e = parameters_reg$`I(mean_field_yield * plant_density)`[4]
#print(summary(model_lm))
print(summary(model_lm)$adj.r.squared)

parameters_df = data.frame(hybrid_name=g,intercept=a, coeff_density=b, pvalue_density_coeff=pval_b,r_2=summary(model_lm)$r.squared,adj_r_2=summary(model_lm)$adj.r.squared)
lodging_df_1 = rbind(lodging_df_1,parameters_df)

}
```


```{r message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, echo=F,fig.width=10, fig.height=10,eval=F}
#http://agroninfotech.blogspot.com/2018/06/split-plot-analysis-in-r-agron-stats.html#:~:text=Split%2Dplot%20design%20is%20frequently,or%20more%20factors%20are%20applied.
#install.packages("agricolae")
library(agricolae)
 
 
#sit3_harvest_file_7_no_flags_stat = filter(sit3_harvest_file_7_no_flags, !Target_density %in% c(160000,130000,145000,90000))
 
#git2_harvest_file_7_no_flags_1 = sit3_harvest_file_7_no_flags %>% group_by(Hybrid,Replicate,Target_density) %>% summarise(number_points=n(),mean_dry_yield=mean(SYLD_TN_HA,na.rm=T),mean_wet_yield=mean(SYLDFR_TN_HA,na.rm=T),mean_starch_percent=mean(StrchPrcnt,na.rm=T),mean_as_planted=mean(as_planted_density,na.rm=T))

attach(early_silage_2)

AOV <- aov(silage_yield ~ REP_repetitionNumber + final_target_density*hybrid_name + Error(REP_repetitionNumber*unique_location_name/final_target_density),data=early_silage_2)
summary(AOV)

model = AOV
 
model <- sp.plot(block = unique_location_name*REP_repetitionNumber, 
                 pplot = final_target_density, 
                 splot = hybrid_name, 
                 Y = silage_yield)
 
Edf_a <- model$gl.a
#Edf_a
# Get second error df
Edf_b <- model$gl.b
#Edf_b
# Get first error MS
EMS_a <- model$Ea
#EMS_a
# Get second error MS
EMS_b <- model$Eb
#EMS_b
 
# out1 <- LSD.test(y = mean_wet_yield, 
#                  trt = Target_density,
#                  DFerror = Edf_a, 
#                  MSerror = EMS_a,
#                  alpha = 0.1,
#                  p.adj = "BH",
#                  group = TRUE,
#                  console = TRUE)
 
 
 
out2 <- LSD.test(y = silage_yield, 
                 trt = hybrid_name,
                 DFerror = Edf_a, 
                 MSerror = EMS_a,
                 alpha = 0.1,
                 p.adj = "BH",
                 group = TRUE,
                 console = TRUE)
 
 
 
lsmeans = out2$meanssss
lsmeans$hybrid = rownames(lsmeans)
groups = out2$groups
groups$hybrid = rownames(groups)
 
lsmeans = inner_join(lsmeans,groups)
pd <- position_dodge(0.1)s
plot_lsmeans=ggplot(lsmeans,aes(reorder(hybrid,-mean_wet_yield ),mean_wet_yield, fill=groups))+geom_bar(stat="identity")+xlab("Hybrid")+ylab(" LSMeans (Silage wet yield (t/ha))")+
  #theme_classic() + 
  theme( axis.text = element_text( size = 10 ),
         axis.text.x = element_text(angle=90, size = 10 ),
         axis.title = element_text( size = 10, face = "bold" ),strip.text = element_text(size = 13, face = 'bold') ) +
     geom_text(aes(label=round(mean_wet_yield,2)), position=pd, vjust=0.05,hjust=0.5, size=3)+ theme(axis.text.x = element_text(  vjust = 0.5, hjust=1))+
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin=mean_wet_yield-std, ymax=mean_wet_yield+std), width=.2,
                 position=position_dodge(.9)) 
print(plot_lsmeans)
 
write_csv(lsmeans,paste(trial_id, "Silage_wet_yield_statistical_means.csv",sep="_"))


library(lme4)
model1 <- lmer(silage_yield ~ as.factor(final_target_density)*hybrid_name+ (1|unique_location_name/REP_repetitionNumber) + (1|unique_location_name/REP_repetitionNumber:final_target_density), data=early_silage_2)

library(lmerTest)
anova(model1, ddf='Kenward-Roger')

library(lsmeans)
cld(lsmeans(model1, silage_yield ~ final_target_density + hybrid_name)) # for Tukey test
```
